Support.name: 支援 Support
Support.text:
感谢你购买 Battlezoo Eldamon！请访问 Roll For Combat Discord 服务器 来提交你发现的任何问题，或讨论该模块。

你也可以通过电子邮件 help@rollforcombat.com 向我们反馈你发现的任何问题。报告问题时，请按以下步骤操作，以确保我们能够处理：

  1. 重现此问题的详细步骤（如愿意也可附上图片）。

  2. 说明正在发生什么。

  3. 说明本应发生什么/正确结果应是什么，而不是当前结果。

Battlezoo Eldamon 版本 1.0

该模块现已结束 beta！我们对 Eldamon 和 元素化身做出了一些重大改动。

对于现有的 元素化身 角色，我们建议将一份新的职业物品副本（@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.classes.Item.B750MfqoM0QytxwI]{元素化身}）拖到该角色（actor）上，以刷新其职业特性。

对于 Eldamon，我们建议使用新的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.macros.Macro.1swTxu7xGpOgpNGx]{创建 Eldamon} 宏来重新制作它们！该宏将允许你快速生成任意等级的 eldamon，并带有正确的力量组；如果你愿意，它还会自动使用标记。你可以在 这个快速视频 中看到该宏的实际效果！

我们还加入了一个修改版的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.cGyrKKzFra9Hypl6]{强力打击缠手带（Eldamon）}，它会将其物品加值赋予力量攻击掷骰。请像普通缠手带一样确保其已注能。与此相关，带有攻击掷骰的力量现在将能与诸如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.IAjvwqgiDr3qGYxY]{无畏战歌} 等会给予攻击掷骰加值的法术，以及其他类似效果，正常互动。

更完整的更新日志见下方。

谢谢你，
Roll For Combat 团队

使用本模块

如果你时间紧张，你首先应该查看有用的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.poQwaaGdoziyaQP0.JournalEntryPage.SEAPdEgNoIphZoHM#quickstart-guide-for-players]{玩家快速入门指南} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.poQwaaGdoziyaQP0.JournalEntryPage.SEAPdEgNoIphZoHM#quickstart-guide-for-gms]{GM 快速入门指南} 章节，它们会准确告诉你要开始需要阅读哪些内容。

在 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.poQwaaGdoziyaQP0]{第 1 章：Eldamon 的世界} 中，你可以找到各种用于你游戏的世界背景信息。如果你想帮助把事情放进语境中，并理解 eldamon 如何融入你的世界，就阅读这一章。

在 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm]{第 2 章：角色职业} 中，你将找到本书中新 eldamon 训练师 与 元素化身 职业的全部信息。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt]{第 3 章：元素力量} 包含你的化身与 eldamon 将使用的魔法力量——为你的游戏带来一个全新的魔法系统！

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.SUEJ4rJaCs7WNc2B]{第 4 章：Eldamon 条目} 包含本书中 162 种 eldamon 各自的背景与规则全部信息。

更新日志

1.0.6

  • 修复 Potfox 缺失力量组
  • 修复 元素喷溢 的内联掷骰
  • 为 Force Propel 添加内联掷骰

1.0.5

  • 修复 Eldamon 训练师 的 强化抗力 与 缓解弱点 专长

1.0.4

  • 修复 元素护盾 加值。这将需要 元素化身 将等级调到 0 再调回去；或者他们可以从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ZY4eKLzGrU2WmMGF]{元素护盾} 能力中取出规则元素，并替换其角色（actor）上该物品副本的规则。

1.0.3

  • 将剩余图像转换为 webp

1.0.2

  • 修复 eldamon 技能未能正确升级

  • 改进 元素喷溢 的自动化

  • 防止 eldamon 缠手带创建一个打击

  • 默认隐藏 eldamon 的基础徒手打击

  • 修复 天生防御 的负载

  • 修复 pangeolil 的魅力调整值

  • 通过 eldamon 斗士感召 赋予 元素护盾 动作

  • 为受训于威吓的 eldamon 赋予 威吓凝视

  • 修复 专注训练：恐怖 所赋予的专长

  • 修复 漂移斩击 的描述

1.0.1

  • 修复 专注训练 与 传奇技能 Eldamon 训练师 专长的自动化

  • 修复 eldamon 创建宏生成的 actor 具有不正确的原型标记设定

  • 添加 天生防御 护甲物品并将其赋予 eldamon。

1.0

  • 添加宏以快速创建 eldamon
  • 元素化身 的 职业DC 与 力量DC 已被修复
  • 攻击力量 已改为使用一个新的数据值，改进自动化
  • 修复若干 刷新 力量的使用频率
  • 为若干缺失的力量添加攻击掷骰
  • 修复若干与标记与美术相关的问题
  • 修复 元素 抗力
  • 本地化了该模块的大部分内容，改进翻译支援并使实现更易理解与维护
  • 修复 日志 与描述中的文本格式
  • 确保所有资料库物品都有正确的 slug，修复使用本地化模块的用户所遇到的问题
  • 降低 火 与 光 eldamon 上 光 规则元素的强度
  • 为许多力量添加额外自动化，尤其是生命力量
  • 在力量中添加成长信息，使在资料库中浏览力量时成长更直观
  • 修复所有力量的使用频率

Thank you for purchasing Battlezoo Eldamon! Please visit the Roll For Combat Discord server to submit any issues you find or discuss the module.

You can also E-mail us at help@rollforcombat.com with any issues you find. When reporting an issue, please follow these steps to ensure we can address them:

  1. Detailed steps on how to recreate this issue (include pictures as well if you wish).

  2. An explanation of what is occurring.

  3. An explanation of what should be happening/the correct outcome rather than the current outcome.

Battlezoo Eldamon version 1.0

The module is now out of beta! We made some big changes to Eldamon and Elemental Avatar.

For existing Elemental Avatar characters we recommend dragging a new copy of the class item (@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.classes.Item.B750MfqoM0QytxwI]{Elemental Avatar}) to the actor to refresh their class features.

For Eldamon we recommend remaking them with the new @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.macros.Macro.1swTxu7xGpOgpNGx]{Create Eldamon} macro! This macro will let you quickly generate an eldamon of any level with the right power set and using the tokens automatically if you wish. You can see this macro in action in this quick video!

We have also included a modified @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.cGyrKKzFra9Hypl6]{Handwraps of Mighty Blows (Eldamon)} that give their item bonus to power attack rolls. Make sure these are invested, like normal handwraps. Along this line, powers with attack rolls will now work properly with spells like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.IAjvwqgiDr3qGYxY]{Courageous Anthem} and others that give a bonus to attack rolls.

See below for a more complete changelog.

Thank you,
The Roll For Combat team

Using this Module

If you're short for time, the first thing you should do is check the helpful @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.poQwaaGdoziyaQP0.JournalEntryPage.SEAPdEgNoIphZoHM#quickstart-guide-for-players]{Quickstart Guide for Players} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.poQwaaGdoziyaQP0.JournalEntryPage.SEAPdEgNoIphZoHM#quickstart-guide-for-gms]{Quickstart Guide for GMs} sections, which will tell you exactly what you need to read to get started.

In @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.poQwaaGdoziyaQP0]{Chapter 1: A World of Eldamon}, you can find all sorts of world lore information for your game. Read this chapter if you want to help put things into context and understand how eldamon fit in your world.

In @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.rQfWyTrPhyQg2EQm]{Chapter 2: Character Classes}, you'll find all the information on the new eldamon trainer and elemental avatar classes in this book.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt]{Chapter 3: Elemental Powers}, contains the magical powers your avatars and eldamon will use, a brand new magic system for your game!

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.SUEJ4rJaCs7WNc2B]{Chapter 4: Eldamon Entries} has all the information on the lore and rules of each of the 162 eldamon in this book.

Changelog

1.0.6

  • Fix missing power set from Potfox
  • Fix inline roll on Elemental Effusion
  • Add inline roll to Force Propel

1.0.5

  • Fix Eldamon Trainer's Enhance Resistances and Mitigate Weakness feats

1.0.4

  • Fix Elemental Shield bonus. This will require elemental avatars to go to level 0 and back up, or they can take the rule elements from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-features.Item.ZY4eKLzGrU2WmMGF]{elemental shield} ability and replace the rules on their actor's copy of the item.

1.0.3

  • Convert remaining images to webp

1.0.2

  • Fix eldamon skills not ugrading properly

  • Improve automation of Elemental Effusion

  • Prevent eldamon handwraps from creating a strike

  • Hide basic unarmed strike on eldamon by default

  • Fix bulk of innate defenses

  • Fix pangeolil's charisma modifier

  • Grant elemental shield action with eldamon battler calling

  • Grant intimidating glare to eldamon trained in intimidation

  • Fix granted feats of Focused Training: Terrifying

  • Fix description of Drifting Slash

1.0.1

  • Fix automation of the Focused Training and Legendary Skill Eldamon Trainer feats

  • Fix eldamon creation macro making actors with incorrect prototype token settings

  • Add innate defenses armor item and grant it to eldamon.

1.0

  • Add macro to quickly create eldamon
  • Class DC and power DCs have been fixed for Elemantal Avatar
  • Attack powers have been changed to use a new statistic, improving automation
  • Fixed the frequencies of several refresh powers
  • Added attack rolls to several powers that were missing them
  • Fixed several issues with tokens and art
  • Fixed elemental resistances
  • Localized much of the module, improving translation support and making the implementation easier to follow and maintain
  • Fixed text formatting in journals and descriptions
  • Ensured all compendium items have a proper slug assigned, fixing issues encountered by those using localization modules
  • Tone down light rule elements on fire and light eldamon
  • Added additional automation to many powers, particularly life powers
  • Added scaling information in powers to make the scaling obvious when browsing powers in compendium
  • Fix frequencies on all powers

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
“噢！噢！那个！”辛德兴奋地叫道，小小的火焰松鼠灰蜷着身子激动地趴在弗拉克西的肩头，急着从摊位上挑些新鲜农产。

微风扑腾着飞上前，在弗拉克西耳边用空气般的沙沙细语低声说着什么；这只空气蝙蝠一如既往地害羞，而变变犬莫蒂则跳起来想看得更清楚。

“微风说得对，”弗拉克西指给辛德看，“你不能把这些留在你的收藏里。它们会烂掉的。”

“我知道！我知道！”辛德吱吱叫着，“但看起来好好吃！把我相位进来，这样我就能吃了。”

一名路过的精灵惊讶地盯着集市里这么多艾达兽，而戴着眼镜的矮人商贩却对这景象完全不为所动。“本地最上等的，”他向弗拉克西和辛德保证道，“无论王族还是灵体都适合！”

“我不是灵体。我是辛德！”小松鼠灰争辩道。

“当然，”商贩立刻转了话锋，显然对艾达兽天马行空的想象很有经验，“而且它也很适合您，噢辛德，火之化身。”

“好啦好啦，”辛德咯咯笑着说，“我又不是什么基托帕兹之类的。你不用说服我。我就是想要！弗拉克西，给我买嘛？”

“行吧，不过之后要是你又看上什么想塞进你的收藏里，可别来找我哭，”弗拉克西讨价还价道，明智地意识到她该趁机收敛一下辛德的花钱习惯，“我们也给微风买点水果。”

听到这话，害羞的小泰罗噗芙那双细小的红眼睛欣喜地亮了起来；而莫蒂对农产失去了兴趣，转而瞥向一名抽着烟斗的兽人旅人。

“你对我有意见？”那兽人眯起眼睛，转身去质问这只死亡狗艾达兽，也连带质问与之相关的弗拉克西。

“别介意莫蒂，”弗拉克西向他保证，“不过……他对终结与新开端有点感官。如果他对你感兴趣，你路上可要小心。”

“那我得记住了。多谢，”兽人礼貌地回答，随后转过身，大步走出了集市。

欢迎来到Battlezoo Eldamon！我很高兴能与你分享这个庞大而雄心勃勃的项目。在诸多梦想之中，我一直希望能做出一个可用的怪物训练系统，就像我们最喜欢的怪物训练游戏那样：它能与游戏的其他部分并行运作，不会造成干扰，也不会强迫整个剧情都围着怪物训练师打转；而借由这本书，我实现了这个梦想。但这本书不止于此：它还包含13种元素（如果一切按计划进行，最终将达到20种）以及超过300种元素力量，呈现独特的玩法风格，并提供另一种看待魔法的方式。通过元素化身职业，你可以直接调用这些力量，而不必成为艾达兽训练师；未来也有潜力推出更多以不同方式运用这些力量的职业（想想看，一个能汲取自然能量、并从多种元素中随机获得力量的职业会有多酷？）。

这里有很多内容需要消化，也就意味着你需要一点时间来学习这些新力量。它们比学习如何管理法术与施法者要简单，但很可能——除非你是全新的玩家——你已经学会了如何使用与管理法术。这两个新职业在某些方面的玩法与施法者相似，但两者都引入了桌面角色扮演游戏所特有的新概念与新玩法风格。

在游戏中，元素化身职业非常容易上手，并能发挥很强效果，而且也有方法让它用起来更顺畅。作为一种对年轻玩家尤其有用的游戏辅助，我建议把你可用的力量名称写在卡片上。你可以用卡片来追踪力量的可用性：使用后将其“弃置”，在你刷新它们之后再把卡片拿回来。

艾达兽的世界与它们的力量，任你依照自己的决定来使用！桌面角色扮演游戏最棒之处就在于弹性：你与团队可以用最适合你们的方式来使用规则组件。基于此，我确保提供了书中所呈现的“默认设定”之外的替代方案；全书也穿插了多处侧栏，讨论各类组件在设计上的一些影响，帮助你决定究竟想如何使用本书及其内容。

你会注意到的一点是：艾达兽与元素化身主要专注于爆发输出（而在生命元素的情况下则偏向于伤害减免），他们以放弃施法者与动能者所拥有的强力功能性选项为代价，换取直接的伤害与战斗效果。因此，他们的伤害可以相当不错，尤其是当他们花些时间用自己的元素完成连招铺垫时（例如用木种下种子、用电累积充能，等等）。在那些以伤害为核心的职业处于巅峰时，他们不会把其他职业远远甩在身后，但这些职业具有可持续性，不会耗尽每日资源。我在设计Paizo职业时所采用的方法论——包括主导野蛮人、吟游诗人、冠军、发明家、召唤师、游侠剑客、奇术师的设计，并共同主导德鲁伊与核心四职业：牧师、战士、游荡者、法师——再加上一场前所未有地漫长且高度聚焦的职业试玩测试（我们进行了多次迭代）的帮助，让我确信我们已在这些力量及其职业上找到了最佳平衡点。尽管如此，每个团体都不同；当你加入某个并非中庸的万金油新内容时，它很可能会在某些方面特别强。我相信这会成为你游戏中既有趣又平衡的选择，但如果你的团体在特定情境或玩法风格下，发现某个力量或某种组合由于任何原因过于强大，请联系我，我会尽力给你调整建议，让它更适合你们。这对玩家或GM都适用；如果其他玩家拿不准，也请随意把这份寄望城展示给他们。

让我们一起探索这些元素与艾达兽，讲述前所未见的新故事吧！

——Mark Seifter，《为战斗而掷骰》游戏设计总监

"Ooh! Ooh! That one!" Cinder chirped, the little fiery squirrelash hunched up excitedly on Fraxi's shoulder, eager to choose some fresh produce from the stand.

Breeze flapped up to whisper something in airy sussurations in Fraxi's ear, the air bat shy as ever, while Morty the morpup leaped up for a better view.

"Breeze is right," Fraxi pointed out to Cinder, "You can't keep these in your collection. They'd rot."

"I know! I know!" Cinder squeaked, "But it looks tasty! Phase me in so I can eat it."

While an elven passerby stared in surprise to see so many eldamon in the marketplace, the bespectacled dwarven merchant was completely unfazed by the sight. "Finest in the land," he assured Fraxi and Cinder, "Fit for royalty or spirits alike!"

"I'm not a spirit. I'm Cinder!" the little squirrelash quibbled.

"Of course," the merchant pivoted quickly, clearly experienced with eldamon's flights of fancy, "And it is fit for you, O Cinder, incarnation of fire."

"OK, OK," Cinder giggled, "I'm not a kitopaz or something. You don't have to convince me. I want it anyway! Get it for me Fraxi?"

"Fine then, but don't come asking later if you find something for your collection," Fraxi bargained, wisely realizing that she should take the chance to rein in Cinder's spending habit, "And we'll get some fruit for Breeze too."

At this, the shy little tairopoof's tiny red eyes lit up with delight, as Morty, having lost interest in the produce, glanced over at an orc traveler smoking his pipe.

"You have a problem with me?" the orc narrowed his eyes and turned to address the death dog eldamon, as well as Fraxi by association.

"Don't mind Morty," Fraxi assured him, "Although... he has something of a sense for endings and new beginnings. If he's taken an interest in you, be careful on your journey."

"I shall have to remember that, then. My thanks," the orc replied politely, as he turned his back and strode out of the marketplace.

Welcome to Battlezoo Eldamon! I'm excited to share this enormous and ambitious project with you. It's been a dream of mine, among many others, to create a workable system for monster training like in our favorite monster training games, one that works alongside the rest of the game without causing disruptions or forcing the entire plot to center around the monster trainer, and with this book, I've realized that dream. But this book is more than that: it also contains 13 elements (out of an eventual 20 if all goes to plan) and over 300 elemental powers that present unique playstyles and another way of looking at magic. With the elemental avatar class, you can tap into those powers directly without needing to be an eldamon trainer, and there's potential for more classes down the line that use the powers in different ways (how cool would a class that taps into natural energies and randomly gains powers from a variety of elements be?).

There's a lot to take in here, which means it will take a little while to learn the new powers. They're simpler than learning how to manage spells and spellcasters, but chances are, unless you're a brand-new player, you've already learned how to use and manage spells. These two new classes play similarly to spellcasters in some ways, but both introduce new concepts and playstyles unique to TTRPGs.

In play, the elemental avatar class is easy to use to great effect, and there are ways to make it even smoother. As a gameplay aid that's especially useful for younger players, I suggest putting the names of your available powers on cards. You can use them to keep track of your powers' availability, "discarding" them when used and taking them back after you refresh them.

The world of Eldamon and their powers are yours to do with as you decide! The best part of a TTRPG is the flexibility to use rules components the way that's best for you and your group. For this reason, I made sure to offer alternatives to the "default setting" presented in the book, and there are several sidebars throughout discussing some of the design implications of various components to help you decide exactly how you'd like to use this book and its contents.

One thing you'll notice is that eldamon and elemental avatars are focused blasters (or damage mitigators in the case of the life element) who trade away the powerful utility options that spellcasters and kineticists have available for straightforward damage and combat effects. As a result, their damage can be quite good, especially if they spend some time setting up a combo with their element (planting seeds with wood, building charge with electricity, and so on). They're not going to leave other damage-focused classes in the dust at those classes' peak, but these classes are sustainable and won't run out of daily resources. Using the same methodologies I used when I worked to design the Paizo classes—including leading the barbarian, bard, champion, inventor, summoner, swashbuckler, and thaumaturge, plus co-leading druid and the core four cleric, fighter, rogue, and wizard—and with the help of an unprecedentedly long and focused class playtest where we iterated numerous times, I'm confident that we've hit a sweet spot with these powers and their classes. Still, every group is different, and whenever you add something new that isn't a middle-ofthe-road jack-of-all-trades, it's likely to be especially good at something. I'm confident that this will be a fun and balanced option for your game, but if your group finds some power or combination overpowered for any reason in your specific situation or playstyle, contact me, and I'll try to give you advice on how to adjust it to make it fit better. That goes for players or GMs, and feel free to show that promise to the other players if they're unsure.

Let's explore these elements and eldamon together and tell new stories the likes of which we've never seen!

—Mark Seifter, Roll for Combat Director of Game Design

Chapter 3: Elemental Powers.name: 第3章：元素力量 Chapter 3: Elemental Powers

Elemental Powers.name: 元素力量 Elemental Powers
Elemental Powers.text:
一种全新的魔法

虽然它们不是法术，但力量是魔法能力，而元素力量则需要相当程度的专注。任何阻止所有魔法的效果（例如一片魔法不起作用的区域），以及任何阻止你进行施法的效果（例如处于战斗形态时），都会阻止你使用力量。除此之外，大多数只适用于法术或施法的效果并不适用于力量，不过GM应当判断除上述示例外，还有哪些类似的限制仍然适用。

元素力量需要专注才能显现，因此它们总是具有专注（特征），但它们很少具有操作（特征），因为它们不需要复杂的手势动作与魔法材料。作为元素的原始具现，它们张扬而显眼，带有明显的视觉与听觉显现。元素力量被划分为不同元素，并且每个元素力量都拥有一个表示其元素的特征。此外，每个元素力量都属于三种不同类别之一：主动力量、反应力量与刷新力量。主动力量与刷新力量几乎总是2或3动作行动，而反应力量则是反应动作。刷新力量具有刷新特征。

使用与刷新力量

每个主动与反应元素力量都需要布置一种独特的元素能量构型，因此不可能立刻再次使用同一个力量。一旦一只eldamon或元素化身使用了某个主动或反应力量，它就无法再次使用该力量，直到它刷新其力量并重新排列其周围的元素能量。虽然可以仅用刷新动作来刷新，但在绝大多数情况下，eldamon与元素化身会通过使用刷新力量来进行刷新。刷新力量可使用任意次数，即使不进行刷新也可以（不过由于它们会立即刷新已使用的力量，这通常只在首次尝试使用刷新力量被打断时才相关）。在一段短时间内不再有元素能量翻涌之后，当地元素不再处于紊乱状态，使得eldamon或元素化身在不处于战斗遭遇（或GM所判定的类似短期压力情境）时，会立刻自动刷新。

元素涌动

当周围区域没有足够的元素能量来施展完整力量，或当一只eldamon或元素化身的常规节奏被打乱时，它们可以用元素涌动代替力量，以在其下一回合为一个力量充能。

临时裁定弱点与抗力

有时，生物即便按理说应当如此，也不会列出对某元素或其特征的直接弱点，例如影子的光脆弱性或吸血鬼（特征）对阳光的脆弱性。在其他情况下，游戏中的某些效果可能并未带有它们理应具有的这些元素特征。例如，尽管时间（特征）确实存在且用于生物，但过去多数时间法术与效果——那些明确说明是由于时间操控或快速老化而发生的——并未包含该特征。在这些情况下，GM应当决定何时将弱点与抗力应用于更为深奥的元素。建议倾向于更频繁地适用它们。即使采用最宽松的解释，木eldamon对时间效果的抗力也只会很少派上用场，因此最好不要因为排除一个缺少时间（特征）的时间效果，而把它终于派上用场时的兴奋变成失望。

元素图表

下方展示的十三张星图描绘了本书中十三种元素各自的优势与弱点。复杂度指该元素学习与游玩的简易程度。进攻是该元素造成伤害的能力。防御是该元素提高你或盟友防御的能力，包括生命值。控制是该元素消耗或控制对手动作的能力。最后，减益是该元素以伤害以外的方式削弱敌人的能力（造成伤害则属于进攻），或通过剥夺动作与控制来削弱敌人。

下方的元素克制图表展示了各元素的优势与弱点。虽然这些信息也包含在每只eldamon的统计数据中，但该图表将所有信息集中于一处。根据攻击方eldamon选择行，根据防守方eldamon选择列。绿色加号表示该攻击命中防守方的弱点，红色减号表示该攻击命中防守方的抗力，空白表示两者皆非。

A New Kind of Magic

While they aren't spells, powers are magical abilities, elemental powers require a significant amount of concentration. Effects that prevent all magic (such as an area where magic doesn't work) and those that prevent you from spellcasting (such as being in a battle form) prevent you from using powers. Otherwise, most effects that apply solely to spells or spellcasting do not apply to powers, though the GM should determine which other restrictions similar to the examples above still apply.

Elemental powers require concentration to manifest, and so they always have the concentrate trait, but they rarely have the manipulate trait, as they don't require complex hand motions and magical ingredients. As raw embodiments of the elements, they are flagrant and obvious, with noticeable visual and auditory manifestations. Elemental powers are split into various elements, and they each possess a trait indicating their element. Additionally, each elemental power belongs to one of three different categories: active powers, reactive powers, and refresh powers. Active powers and refresh powers both nearly always are two or three action activities, while reactive powers are reactions. Refresh powers possess the refresh trait.

Using and Refreshing Powers

Each active and reactive elemental power requires the arrangement of a unique configuration of elemental energy, making it impossible to use the same power again right away. Once an eldamon or elemental avatar uses an active or reactive power, they can't use that power again until they Refresh their powers and rearrange the elemental energies around them. While it's possible to Refresh with the Refresh activity on its own, in the vast majority of cases, eldamon and elemental avatars Refresh by using a refresh power. Refresh powers are usable any number of times, even without refreshing (however, since they instantly refresh used powers, this is normally only relevant if the first attempt to use the refresh power is disrupted). After a short while without elemental energies swirling around, the local elements are no longer in disarray, causing an eldamon or elemental avatar to automatically refresh immediately when not in a combat encounter (or a similar short term stressful situation as determined by the GM).

Elemental Surge

When there's not enough elemental energy in the surrounding area for a full power, or when an eldamon or elemental avatar's routine is disrupted, they can use an elemental surge in place of a power to charge up a power on their next turn.

Improvising Weaknesses and Resistances

Sometimes creatures won't list a direct weakness to the element or its trait, even when it would otherwise make sense, like a shadow's light vulnerability or a vampire's vulnerability to sunlight. In other cases, effects in the game might not have traits for these elements that they probably should. For example, while the time trait exists and is used in creatures, most time spells and effects that specifically say that they occur due to temporal manipulation or rapid aging haven't included it in the past. In these cases, the GM should determine when to apply weaknesses and resistances to the more esoteric elements. It's recommended to err on the side of applying them more often. Even with the most generous interpretation, a wood eldamon's resistance to time effects is only going to come up rarely, so it's best not to turn the excitement when it finally comes up into disappointment by excluding a temporal effect that lacked the time trait.

Elemental Charts

The thirteen star charts featured below depict the various strengths and weaknesses of each of the thirteen elements in this book. Complexity refers to how simple an element is to learn and play. Offense is the element's damage-dealing capacity. Defense is the element's ability to increase your or an ally's defense, including Hit Points. Control is the element's ability to use up or control an opponent's actions. Lastly, debuff is the element's ability to weaken a foe in a way other than damage dealing (which would be offense) or action denial and control.

The element matchup chart below depicts the strengths and weaknesses of various elements. While these are included in each individual eldamon's statistics, the chart gives all the information in one place. Choose the row based on the attacking eldamon and the column based on the defending eldamon. A green plus means that the attack is against the defender's weakness, a red minus means the attack is against the defender's resistance, and a blank space means neither is true.

Air.name: 空气 Air
Air.text:
气之元素代表空气那轻柔、反复无常、永不停歇的流动本性。因此，气之力量常常会在战场上移动使用者，或从极远距离发动攻击。所有允许使用者进行行进（Stride）的气之力量，若使用者具有飞行速度（fly Speed），也同样允许使用者飞行（Fly）。

关联伤害类型：挥砍

关联特性：气

幸运效果与力量攻击检定

力量具有力量攻击检定，其运作方式不同于武器、徒手攻击或法术攻击检定。它们往往比法术攻击检定准确得多（尤其在特别低与特别高的等级之外），并且有可能把相当强的威力集中在一次攻击检定中。因此，值得考虑是否要禁止诸如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} 这类低成本的幸运效果适用于力量攻击检定。然而，一名魔战士（magus），尤其是配合强力的专注法术时，同样能以与力量相同的准确度（因为他们使用武器或徒手攻击检定）在一次爆发中打出大量伤害。因此，带有 sure strike 的力量攻击检定通常不会给你的团体带来问题——除非带有 sure strike 的魔战士也会造成问题。请考虑你们团体的游玩风格与实际情况，并作出最适合你的决定。默认情况下，sure strike 适用。

主动力量

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.GaO9ze6zrzAu9HQY]{Backlash Gust}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.J5PB6NfFhnI2lo0t]{Wind Rush}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.eccA4qcEnO2BsYjY]{Wind Sniper}

5级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.BLQcRIlr8BH5WgW3]{Whirlwind}

7级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.dGbVsgpINoiLOkvl]{Wind Cutter}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.tnB95rpZrFAgkwJ2]{Rushing Embrace}

11级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.0K4CHc0e1LOYQYAI]{Zephyr Slash}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Mw7YXQnhUrZPOblF]{Gusting Curtain}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.555MdyDg141hiya8]{Galeforce Launch}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Rdo8zKRGwmHxgyo0]{Peregrine Gust}

15级

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.xBGHzd6GaJqG7186]{Tempest}

19级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.FLcU6OCRqoLlaaSE]{Aeolus}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.12XetHRfe55mHoqW]{Kamaitachi}

反应力量

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.75b0ity3hSyFkb7z]{Dispersing Retreat}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.r756hwLQxEikpYR7]{Reflect Projectiles}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.i6IHSC1NAFVaOzcB]{Hindering Winds}

刷新力量

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.79WVMsWWlRR0L2mc]{Rushing Refresh}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KemTJVA03sydeW0p]{Wind Barrier}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.vqOqf1zkTClhoTrw]{Ineluctable Flight}

可视化力量

力量不同于法术，其可用性会随着你使用与刷新而不断变化。你当然可以在角色卡上记下当前可用的力量，并在用过的力量名称旁做某种标记，但这会涉及大量的擦除与重写。一个可能更容易处理、也更直观的方法是把你的力量写在索引卡或其他小卡片上，把可用的力量握成一叠（或扇开以便看清），然后把已经用过的放到另一叠。这样你就能一眼看出哪些力量可用，也不需要反复擦写。

其他能力

如果你的元素是气，你会从元素涌动（Elemental Surge）动作、元素护盾（Elemental Shield）动作，以及随元素变化的元素化身（elemental avatar）专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 当你使用你的气之力量时，你可以在一段时间内飞行（Fly），即使你平常不能飞行。在使用那些“若你具有飞行速度则允许你飞行”的气之力量时，如果你在坚实表面上使用该力量，你可以飞行至你正常的陆地速度。若你在移动结束时停在无法支撑你重量的地方（例如半空中），你会坠落。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控（Elemental Manipulation）时，你可以以细微方式控制空气与风，让你能够制造或平息微风。这可以帮助你在炎热温度下降温，类似于穿着温暖天气装束；也能通过嗅觉让你更难被侦测——方法是让你处于下风处（除非风正强烈地往相反方向吹）；等等。在GM酌情决定下，你还可以对空气与风做出其他微小调整。

元素抗性 风是你的盟友，绝非你的敌手。你对抗气效果的豁免获得+1环境加值；并且若你在该豁免上掷出成功，你改为获得大成功或大失败中的大成功。通常会成为困难地形的风对你而言不会是困难地形；通常会成为更高等困难地形的风，对你而言仅视为普通困难地形。若你拥有“强化抗性（Enhanced Resistance）”专长，你对抗气效果的环境加值提升至+2；通常会成为更高等困难地形的风对你而言完全不会是困难地形；并且若你在对抗气效果的豁免上掷出大成功或大失败中的大失败，你改为获得失败。

元素塑形师 当你使用元素塑形师（Elemental Sculptor）专长时，你能比元素操控更大幅度地移动与控制空气与风。这使你可以制造足够的风，让一片区域对飞行者而言成为困难地形，或对穿过该区域的物理远程攻击施加–1环境减值；或者以类似速度减缓风。你塑形时，影响范围大约为一个10英尺×10英尺方格或更小，不过风通常至多持续1分钟。在GM酌情决定下，你可以对空气与风的形状或位置做出其他类似调整。

元素感官 风会把各式各样的气味带到你身边，使你拥有极其敏锐的嗅觉。你获得嗅觉，作为一种不精确感官，范围30英尺。与嗅觉的常规规则相同，当你处于上风处时范围通常缩短；当你处于下风处时范围通常增加。

元素护盾 该护盾也使你对反射豁免获得+1环境加值。

元素涌动 你行进（Stride）至多等于你正常陆地速度的一半；或飞行至多等于你正常飞行速度的一半（若你有）；或踏步（Step）。

强化机动 你可以借着背后的风自由飞行。你在任何时候都获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

我正如鱼得水！

虽然各元素有所不同，但大多数力量使用者都擅长造成可持续的伤害，尤其是在范围内。力量可以整天使用；而那些以伤害为主的元素（除生命以外的多数元素）也能造成相当可观的伤害，足以在许多等级与专注爆破的术士所使用的更强法术位竞争——却没有每日次数限制；并且相较于非施法者的随意使用（at will）元素力量，用一个2动作力量能打出更高伤害。作为交换，力量使用者在重复性方面困难得多——你必须想办法把每个力量都用过一次，而不是反复施放那一个完美的法术或冲动（impulse）；否则就会被迫更早刷新，而用于刷新的回合也会让你的节奏比其他魔法伤害职业更慢。再加上对你元素主题的高度聚焦，这意味着你的元素化身或艾达蒙（eldamon）是专精的；你可以自信地用火扮演强力爆破手，打出高伤害，而不必管理复杂的动作流程，也不必翻阅几十个法术、并在对付首领时切换到增益、减益与功能性效果。作为交换，你不会拥有其他职业所提供的那种灵活性：元素化身只使用单一元素；而尽管艾达蒙训练师（eldamon trainer）可以在数个艾达蒙之间做选择，艾达蒙也无法像角色那样从专长中获得那么多选项。在决定如何引导你的元素力量，并与同伴玩家一同组建冒险队伍时，请将这些因素纳入考量。

The element of air represents the breezy, capricious, constantly moving nature of air. Thus, air powers often move the user around the battlefield or attack from a great distance. All air powers that allow the user to Stride also allow the user to Fly if they have a fly Speed.

Associated Damage Type: Slashing

Associated Traits: Air

Fortune Effects and Power Attack Rolls

Powers have power attack rolls, which work differently from weapon, unarmed attack, or spell attack rolls. They are often significantly more accurate than spell attack rolls, except at especially low and especially high levels, and they can potentially pack a lot of punch into one attack roll. As such, it's worth considering whether to disallow low cost fortune effects like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike} to apply to power attack rolls. However, a magus, especially when used with a powerful focus spell, is equally capable of putting out large damage amounts at once with the same accuracy as powers have (since they used weapon or unarmed attack rolls). Thus, power attack rolls with sure strike shouldn't cause your group issues unless a magus with sure strike does. Consider your group's playstyle and situation and make the right decision for you. By default, sure strike applies.

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.vqOqf1zkTClhoTrw]{Ineluctable Flight}

Visualizing Powers

Powers, unlike spells, change in their availability constantly, as you use them and refresh them. While you could keep your available powers written down on a character sheet with some kind of mark next to their name when you've used them, that would involve a substantial amount of erasing and rewriting. A way that might be easier to handle and more intuitive is to write your powers down on index cards or other small cards, hold your available powers in a pile (or fanned out for visibility), and put the ones you've already used in another pile. That way you can see what powers are available at a glance, and there's no need to keep erasing.

Other Abilities

If your element is air, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion When you use your air powers, you can Fly for a time, even though you can't Fly normally. While using your air powers that allow you to Fly if you have a fly Speed, if you use the power on a solid surface, you can Fly up to your normal land Speed. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you fall.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control air and wind in minor ways, allowing you to create or calm down light breezes. This can help cool you down in hot temperatures, similarly to wearing a warm weather outfit, make it harder to detect you via scent by making you downwind (unless the wind is blowing strongly in the other direction), and the like. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to air and wind.

Elemental Resistance The winds are your allies, never your adversaries. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against air effects and if you roll a success on your saving throw, you get a critical success instead. Wind that would normally be difficult terrain isn't difficult terrain for you, and wind that would normally be greater difficult terrain is only standard difficult terrain for you. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus against air effects increases to +2, wind that would normally be greater difficult terrain isn't difficult terrain at all for you, and if you roll a critical failure on a saving throw against an air effect, you get a failure instead.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control air and wind to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to create enough wind to make an area difficult terrain for fliers or provide a –1 circumstance penalty to physical ranged attacks that move through the area, or slow down wind at a similar speed. When you sculpt, you affect roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square or less, though the wind typically lasts 1 minute at most. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to air and wind's shape or position.

Elemental Senses The wind carries all sorts of scents your way, granting you an extremely keen sense of smell. You gain scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet. As normal for scent, the range is typically reduced when you're upwind and increased when you're downwind.

Elemental Shield The shield also grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves.

Elemental Surge You Stride up to half your normal land Speed, fly up to half your normal fly Speed (if you have one), or Step.

Enhanced Locomotion You can fly freely with the wind at your back. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed at all times.

I'm In My Element!

While elements vary, most power users excel at dealing sustainable damage, particularly in areas. Powers can be used all day long, but the damaging elements (which is most of them, except life) also do a very respectable amount of damage, able to compete at many levels with the stronger spell slots used by a blasting sorcerer without having a daily limit and doing a lot more damage with a 2 action power than at will elemental powers from non-spellcasters. In exchange, power users have much more difficulty with repeatability—you have to find a way to use every power once, instead of repeating the perfect spell or impulse, or be forced to refresh sooner, and the turns refreshing also slow down your tempo compared to other magical damaging classes. This combined with a heavy focus on your element's theme means that your elemental avatar or eldamon is specialized; you can confidently play a strong blaster with fire and do high damage without needing to manage complicated action routines or read through dozens of spells and switch to buffs, debuffs, and utility effects against bosses. In exchange, you won't have the kind of flexibility those other classes offer: elemental avatars use only a single element, and while an eldamon trainer can choose between several eldamon, eldamon don't have access to as many options from feats as a character would have. Keep these factors in mind when deciding how to channel your elemental powers and build an adventuring party alongside your fellow players.

Darkness.name: 黑暗 Darkness
Darkness.text:
黑暗元素代表未知之谜，以及遮蔽、朦胧与hide的能力。尽管有些人认为黑暗与未知令人恐惧而残酷，它也能带来慰藉，保护你免受光亮的严酷。黑暗元素也会操控形成于光亮与黑暗交界处边缘的阴影。黑暗艾达蒙与元素化身以阴影与黑暗笼罩自身，并操控它们以隐藏其行动与意图。

相关伤害类型： 寒冷

相关特性： 黑暗，阴影

黑暗关键词

你会在许多黑暗元素能力中看到下列术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded}：黑暗能力与效果可能会使一个生物获得shrouded状态。shrouded状态总是具有数值，从1到3。环绕shrouded生物的光线会根据该状态的数值与其周围的光照等级而被遮蔽。这会影响shrouded生物的视力，也会影响其他生物看见该shrouded生物的能力。本质上，shrouded状态会使该shrouded生物所处的光照等级降低若干步，步数等于该状态的数值（明亮光照变为昏暗光照，昏暗光照变为黑暗，黑暗变为类似4环黑暗法术的超自然黑暗），但有一项例外：在昏暗光照中，shrouded 1会使一个生物对弱光视野呈现为隐蔽，而不是制造完全黑暗。此外，一个生物在进行用于Hide与Sneak的隐匿检定时，会获得等同于其shrouded状态数值的环境加值。处于shrouded时，你可以通过沉入阴影来Hide与Sneak，但在明亮区域中，由于黑暗的阴霾，你的大致位置仍可能很明显；这就像你在身周带着可见光环潜行仍可能暴露你一样；在这种情况下，你会处于hidden而不是undetected。一个本应变为显映的（Limned）shrouded生物会改为失去其shrouded状态，反之亦然。关于如何在每一种shrouded数值与每一种光照等级下应用shrouded状态的完整说明，见下方边栏。

主动能力

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.PAgCeevPl2dcH2O8]{Gloaming Backstab}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.AFlHh4LgGwLjLnF0]{Tendrils of Shade}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KdUzpqJIDXw0jclb]{Pall of 黑暗}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.yGTgM6U2w48wIdRZ]{黑暗斗篷}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.FyUveZnScY9fBMrH]{Outstretched Shadow}

7级

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.yf7Ynnwe6XEKurEN]{Become the Shadow}

Shrouded完整示例

如果你不确定shrouded状态的某种交互，下列列出了shrouded数值与光照等级的所有可能组合。shrouded状态会叠加在区域的光照等级之上，而区域光照等级也可能来自光亮与黑暗法术与效果；但授予shrouded的能力与本领属于带有黑暗（特征）的魔法效果，并且可能会被带有光亮（特征）且明确以其为目标的效果所对抗。对于那些没有明确以shrouded状态来源为目标的光亮与黑暗效果，先应用它们以确定区域的真实光照等级，然后再用shrouded来判断该shrouded生物有多么@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}，以及其视野变得多么shrouded。如果一个生物与其目标都处于shrouded，这些状态不会累加；只应用数值较高的shrouded状态的效果。

一个处于shrouded 3的生物会被超自然黑暗所笼罩，不受光照等级或其他光源影响。如果其拥有黑暗视觉但没有更强黑暗视觉，则其周围的一切都是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}（若其没有黑暗视觉则完全看不见）；并且如果其他生物拥有黑暗视觉但没有更强黑暗视觉，则该shrouded生物对其而言是隐蔽（若其没有黑暗视觉则完全看不见该shrouded生物）。

对于处于shrouded 2的生物，除非其位于明亮光照区域，否则适用相同效果；若其位于明亮光照区域，则其被普通黑暗所笼罩，若其拥有黑暗视觉便可正常视物，而其他生物若拥有黑暗视觉也可正常看见它。

如果该生物仅处于shrouded 1，则光照等级降低1步（昏暗光照有不同效果）：因此在明亮光照中，它会被昏暗光照所笼罩，且除非对方拥有弱光视野或黑暗视觉，否则它对对方而言为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}；并且除非它拥有弱光视野或黑暗视觉，否则一切对它而言皆为隐蔽。在昏暗光照中，阴影加深，使它除非面对拥有黑暗视觉的生物，否则为隐蔽；并且除非它拥有黑暗视觉，否则一切对它而言皆为隐蔽。在黑暗中，它会被超自然黑暗所笼罩，甚至对拥有黑暗视觉的生物也为隐蔽；并且即使它拥有黑暗视觉，一切对它而言仍为隐蔽。

其他能力

如果你的元素是黑暗，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得下列能力与效果。

元素机动 当你移动时，阴影与黑暗环绕着你，使你更容易四处潜行。多亏黑暗，即使没有掩蔽或没有处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，你也可以Hide并@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}；但隐藏你的不自然黑暗与阴影可能会暴露你，因此你为此进行的隐匿检定承受–2减值。如果你拥有“传奇潜行者（Legendary Sneak）”技能专长（或其他给予你与传奇潜行者相同收益的能力，例如地精血脉专长“非常、非常鬼祟（Very, Very Sneaky）”），你不再承受该减值，转而在用于Hide与Sneak的隐匿检定上获得+2环境加值。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以控制黑暗与阴影，略微改变其形态布局，或让你自己或一个自愿且被你触碰的盟友获得shrouded 1，持续1回合。由GM裁定，你也可以对黑暗做出其他细微调整。

元素抗性 你会受到保护以对抗黑暗与阴影。你获得等同于你等级一半的抗性，用于对抗来自黑暗与阴影效果的伤害，并且对抗此类效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。如果你拥有“强化抗性（Enhanced Resistances）”，该环境加值提升至+2。

元素塑形师 当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以比元素操控更大幅度地移动并控制黑暗与阴影。这使你能够像影子木偶一样扭曲并塑造阴影，调整它们的位置或外观；作用范围为20尺内、最大10尺×10尺的区域。由GM裁定，你可以对黑暗与阴影的形状或位置做出其他类似调整。

元素感官 你获得更强黑暗视觉，使你即使在极端黑暗区域（例如来自4级黑暗法术或shrouded 3）中也能清晰视物。

元素护盾 当你的元素护盾被举起时，你处于隐蔽时敌人以你为目标所需进行的DC 5平坦检定提升为DC 6。

元素涌动 你或所选的自愿生物获得shrouded 1，直到你下个回合结束。

强化机动 你可以从一个阴影传送到另一个阴影，从一片黑暗传送到另一片黑暗。若你处于昏暗光照或黑暗区域（仅有shrouded状态并不足够），则以单动作（具有移动与传送（特征）），你可以沉入阴影并在30尺内另一处昏暗光照或黑暗中的空间重新出现。你仍需要对该空间具有效果线，但你不需要穿过中间的方格，使你能够避开障碍物与有害地形，并且该移动不会触发基于移动的反应。

笼罩敌人

当你笼罩一个敌人时，除了让该敌人更难看见之外，也会使该敌人更难看见东西。根据你的小队是否拥有弱光视野、黑暗视觉与更强黑暗视觉，仔细考虑是否选择能笼罩敌人的能力。在低等级时，如果你的小队缺乏这些视觉能力，你可能想避免选择笼罩敌人的能力；而在高等级时，你可以考虑让队伍以团体方式获取黑暗视觉选项（无论如何都是个好主意），以便利用这些能力的优势。

The element of darkness represents the mystery of the unknown and the ability to shroud, obscure, and hide. While some find the darkness and the unknown terrifying and cruel, it can also be comforting, protecting from the harshness of the light. The darkness element also manipulates the shadows that form on the edges between light and darkness. Darkness eldamon and elemental avatars shroud themselves in shadows and darkness and manipulate them to keep their movements and intentions hidden.

Associated Damage Type: Cold

Associated Traits: Darkness, Shadow

Darkness Key Terms

You’ll see the following term in many darkness elemental powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.SXQzSmgPZv0IFSlN]{Shrouded}: Darkness powers and effects might give a creature the shrouded condition. The shrouded condition always has a value, from 1 to 3. The light surrounding a shrouded creature is occluded depending on the condition’s value and the level of light surrounding them. This affects the shrouded creature’s ability to see as well as other creatures’ ability to see the shrouded creature. Essentially the shrouded condition causes the light level to be a number of steps lower for the shrouded creature equal to the condition’s value (bright light to dim light, dim light to darkness, darkness to supernatural darkness akin to the 4th-rank darkness spell), except that shrouded 1 in dim light causes a creature to be concealed to low-light vision, rather than creating full darkness. Additionally, a creature gains a circumstance bonus on Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak equal to the shrouded condition’s value. It’s possible to Hide and Sneak while shrouded by sinking into the shadows, but in a bright area, your general position might still be obvious due to the pall of darkness, in the same way as sneaking around with a visible aura around you might still give you away; in that case, you would be hidden instead of undetected. A shrouded creature that would become limned instead loses its shrouded condition, and vice versa. For a full description of how to apply the shrouded condition for every possible value of shrouded and every possible level of lighting, see the following sidebar.

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.ZjAKdGJfI4iMVpxn]{Umbral Call}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.yf7Ynnwe6XEKurEN]{Become the Shadow}

Shrouded Full Examples

If you're not sure of an interaction with the shrouded condition, the following are all possible combinations of shrouded values and light levels. The shrouded condition applies on top of the light level in the area, which could also be based on light and darkness spells and effects, but powers and abilities that grant shrouded are magical effects that have the darkness trait and can potentially be counteracted by effects with the light trait explicitly targeted against them. When it comes to light and darkness effects that don't explicitly target the source of the shrouded condition, apply all of those first to determine the true light level in the area, then use shrouded to see how well @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} the shrouded creature is and how shrouded its vision has become. If a creature and its target are both shrouded, the conditions aren't cumulative; apply only the higher valued shrouded condition's effect.

A creature that is shrouded 3 is shrouded in supernatural darkness, regardless of the light level or other light sources. If they have darkvision but not greater darkvision, everything around them is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} (and they can't see at all if they don't have darkvision), and if other creatures have darkvision but not greater darkvision, the shrouded creature is concealed (and they can't see the shrouded creature at all if they don't have darkvision).

For a creature that's shrouded 2, the same effect applies unless they are in an area of bright light, in which case they are shrouded in normal darkness and can see normally if they have darkvision and other creatures can see them normally if they have darkvision.

If the creature is only shrouded 1, the light level is one step lower (with a different effect for dim light), so in bright light, they're shrouded in dim light and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} except to creatures with low-light vision or darkvision, and everything is concealed to them unless they have low-light vision or darkvision; in dim light, the shadows deepen, causing them to be concealed except to creatures with darkvision, and everything is concealed to them unless they have darkvision; and in darkness, they're shrouded in supernatural darkness and concealed even to creatures with darkvision and everything is concealed to them even with darkvision.

Other Abilities

If your element is darkness, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion The shadows and darkness surround you while you move, making it easy for you to sneak around. Thanks to the darkness, you can Hide and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} even without cover or being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, though the unnatural darkness and shadows that hide you might give you away, so you take a –2 penalty to your Stealth checks to do so. If you have the Legendary Sneak skill feat (or another ability that gives you the same benefit as Legendary Sneak, such as the goblin ancestry feat Very, Very Sneaky), you no longer take the penalty and instead gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control darkness and shadows, slightly changing their configuration or giving yourself or a willing touched ally shrouded 1 for 1 round. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to darkness.

Elemental Resistance You become protected against darkness and shadow. You gain resistance equal to half your level against damage from darkness and shadow effects and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against such effects. If you have Enhanced Resistances, the circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control darkness and shadows to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to twist and shape shadows like shadow puppets, adjusting their position or appearance, in up to a 10-foot by 10-foot area within 20 feet. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to darkness and shadows' shape or position.

Elemental Senses You gain greater darkvision, which allows you to see clearly even in areas of extreme darkness (such as from a 4th level darkness spell or shrouded 3).

Elemental Shield While your Elemental Shield is raised, the flat check to target you when you're concealed increases from 5 to 6.

Elemental Surge You or the chosen willing creature become shrouded 1 until the end of your next turn.

Enhanced Locomotion You can transport from shadow to shadow, from patch of darkness to patch of darkness. If you're in an area of dim light or darkness (the shrouded condition isn't sufficient), as a single action, which has the move and teleportation traits, you can sink into the shadows and then reappear in another space in dim light or darkness within 30 feet. You still need line of effect to the space, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Shrouding Foes

When you shroud a foe, it makes them difficult to see, in addition to making it harder for the foe to see. Think carefully about whether to choose powers that shroud foes based on whether your group has low-light vision, darkvision, and greater darkvision. At low levels, if your group doesn't have much of either, you might want to avoid the powers that shroud foes, while at higher levels, you can consider gaining darkvision options as a group (a good idea anyway) in order to take advantage of those powers.

Death.name: 死亡 Death
Death.text:
死亡元素代表生命的终结，是自然循环的一部分。死亡力量代表终末，因此它们会削弱并杀死活物与不死生物。由于死亡力量具有死亡（特征），它们会直接杀死其目标，而不是让其昏迷且仍然活着。作为自然元素的不死化身，eldamon 不会被死亡力量杀死，不过它们仍会如同其他造成伤害的效果一样正常受到伤害并被消耗。在 eldamon 对战中这点很幸运，否则死亡 eldamon 将会被禁止参赛。

最终终结：死亡力量对活的生物造成虚无伤害，抽离其生命；但它们改为对不死生物造成力场伤害，并且在对抗不死生物时失去死亡与虚无特性。即便如此，不死生物有时仍会免疫死亡力量的一些额外效果，例如即死效果。既非活也非死的生物（如构装体）则超出死亡元素的触及范围。

生命抽离：死亡力量会利用生命力被削弱的生物，对那些已处于流失（状态）的目标造成更多伤害。每当一个死亡力量将流失（状态）施加于一个已经处于流失（状态）的生物时，该流失的生物会受到额外的虚无伤害，数值等于其等级乘以其既有的流失（状态）与新施加的流失（状态）两者中较低者。例如：一个 9 级且流失 2 的生物若将被某个死亡力量流失 1，则它会额外受到 9 点虚无伤害；而一个 7 级且流失 2 的生物若将被某个死亡力量流失 3，则它会额外受到 14 点虚无伤害。

关联伤害类型：虚无

关联特性：虚无

准备去死吧！

死亡 eldamon 及其力量对某些敌人来说可能很可怕，尤其是“无可避免的终焉”，它带有可见的倒计时。和任何情况一样，GM 可以选择对与死亡力量配合采取的某些类型行动给予环境加值或减值。例如，如果你在非战斗状态下且对方正处于“无可避免的终焉”的效果影响下，那么你使用“快速胁迫”来胁迫某人可能会更容易。与往常一样，何时给予这些好处由 GM 决定。

其他能力

如果你的元素是死亡，你会从“元素涌动”动作、“元素护盾”动作以及随元素变化的“元素化身”专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你可以在移动时以死亡能量环绕自身，迫使敌人让路，否则就要承担后果。以单动作，你可以在死亡能量包裹下疾走。在这次移动期间，你可以尝试穿过一个敌人的空间。该敌人有一个选择：要么允许你穿过其空间，要么阻止你的移动，并承受 1 点虚无伤害外加你每拥有 1 级再追加 1 点虚无伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免。若敌人选择以这种方式阻止你的移动，你的移动会立刻结束，即使你本来还能继续移动更远距离。

元素操控当你使用“元素操控”时，你可以以细微方式控制死亡，使你能够将一个生物的濒死值最多提高或降低 2，或仅以一次接触就杀死一株微型的非生物植物。在 GM 的裁量下，你还可以进行其他涉及死亡的小幅调整，但这永远不足以杀死一个尚未处于濒死的生物。

元素抗性你的身体对死亡的召唤更具抗性。你在对抗死亡效果的豁免上获得 +1 环境加值，并获得等同于你等级一半的虚无伤害抗性。若你拥有“强化抗性”专长，你对抗死亡效果的环境加值提升为 +2。

元素塑形师当你使用“元素塑形师”专长时，你能做到比“元素操控”更大程度的作为。这使你能够杀死一片区域内的非生物植物（大致为 10 尺×10 尺的一格或更小），或在 20 尺内杀死一株非生物植物，或杀死一个濒死生物。在 GM 的裁量下，你也可以进行其他类似的、涉及死亡与杀戮的调整，但这仍不足以杀死一个尚未处于濒死的生物。

元素感官你可以感知一个生物距离死亡有多近。仅凭观察一个生物，你就能判断其是否健康（高于 3/4 生命值）、受伤（介于一半与 3/4 生命值之间）、重伤（介于 1/4 与一半生命值之间）或命悬一线（低于 1/4 生命值）。若一个生物正主动尝试伪装其生命力或受伤程度，它可以如常尝试一次欺瞒检定来对抗你的察觉 DC；否则你的感知无需尝试检定即可生效。

元素护盾该护盾也会给予强韧豁免 +1 环境加值。

元素涌动所选生物若未能成功通过对抗你力量 DC 的强韧豁免，则在 1 轮内陷入虚弱 1 或笨拙 1（由你选择）。

强化机动你与死亡的联结使你能够出现在最近死亡或几乎死亡的生物身旁，几乎如同送魂者或末日先兆。以单动作（具有移动特性），你可以短暂转化为死亡能量，然后在 60 尺内任何一个正在濒死或在过去 1 分钟内死亡的生物相邻的空间中再现。你仍需要对该生物有效果线，并且必须能以一种精确感官侦测到对方；但你不需要穿越中间的格子，从而能避开障碍物与有害地形，并且此移动不会触发基于移动的反应。

The element of death represents the end of life, part of the natural cycle. Death powers represent the end, so they weaken and kill living things and undead alike. Because death powers have the death trait, they kill their targets outright, rather than leave them unconscious and alive. As undying incarnations of natural elements, eldamon aren't killed by death powers, though they're still harmed and depleted as normal for other damaging effects. This is fortunate when it comes to eldamon battles, as otherwise death eldamon would be banned from competing.

Final End: Death powers deal void damage to living creatures, draining away their life, but they deal force damage to undead instead, losing the death and void traits against undead. Even so, undead are sometimes immune to some of a death power's additional effects, such as instant death effects. Creatures neither alive nor dead, such as constructs, are beyond the reach of the death element.

Life Drain: Death powers take advantage of creatures with weakened life force, dealing more damage to those who are already drained. Whenever a death power applies the drained condition to a creature that's already drained, the drained creature takes additional void damage equal to its level multiplied by the lower of its existing drained condition and the new drained condition. For example, if a 9th-level creature with drained 2 would be drained 1 by a death power, it takes 9 additional void damage, and if a 7th-level creature with drained 2 would be drained 3 by a death power, it takes 14 additional void damage.

Associated Damage Type: Void

Associated Traits: Void

Prepare to Die!

Death eldamon and their powers can be scary for some foes, especially Inexorable Demise, with its visible countdown. Just like in any situation, the GM can choose to grant circumstance bonuses or penalties to certain types of actions taken in conjunction with death powers. For instance, it might be easier to Coerce someone with Quick Coerce if you're out of combat and they're under the effect of Inexorable Demise. As always, the GM determines when to grant these benefits.

Other Abilities

If your element is death, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can surround yourself with death energy as you move, forcing foes to get out of your way or suffer the consequences. As a single action, you can Stride while swathed in death energy. During this movement, you can attempt to move through a foe's space. The foe has a choice: they can either allow you to move through their space, or they can prevent your movement, taking 1 void damage plus 1 void damage for each level you have, with a basic Fortitude save. If a foe chooses to prevent your movement in this way, your movement immediately ends, even if you still had more distance you could travel.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control death in minor ways, allowing you to increase or decrease a creature's dying value by up to 2 or kill a tiny non-creature plant with just a touch. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments involving death, though this is never sufficient to kill a creature that isn't already dying.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes resistant to death's call. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against death effects and gain resistance equal to half your level against void damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus against death effects increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can bring to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to kill noncreature plants in an area roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square or less up to 20 feet away or to kill a dying creature. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments involving death and killing, though it's still insufficient to kill a creature that isn't already dying.

Elemental Senses You can sense how close a creature is to death. Just by looking at a creature, you can tell if they are healthy (above 3/4 Hit Points), hurt (between half and 3/4 Hit Points), injured (between 1/4 and half Hit Points) or at death's door (below 1/4 Hit Points). A creature actively attempting to disguise its life force or level of injury can attempt a Deception check against your Perception DC as normal, but otherwise your sense works without needing to attempt a check.

Elemental Shield The shield also grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature is enfeebled 1 or clumsy 1 (your choice) for 1 round unless they succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion Your connection to death allows you to appear by the side of recently or nearly dead creatures, almost like a psychopomp or harbinger of doom. As a single action, which has the move trait, you can briefly transition into death energy and then reappear in a space adjacent to any creature that is dying or has died in the past minute within 60 feet. You still need line of effect to the creature and you must be able to detect them with a precise sense, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Earth.name: 大地 Earth
Earth.text:
大地元素代表岩石与石头的力量与耐久。因此，它的力量往往拥有较短的射程，但侧重于让使用者承受各类攻击并占据上风。

关联伤害类型：钝击

关联特性：大地

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.PGWQoYE0blIBmHP6]{复仇反噬}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.7P7bWkQckiNfrsOX]{大地重槌}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.yJ3YIx9FtHHn5jqP]{自动石化}

其他能力

如果你的元素为大地，你会从元素涌动动作（第70页）、元素护盾动作（第57页），以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素移动你可以攀爬岩石、石头与泥土表面。你获得一个攀爬速度，数值等于你陆地速度的一半；你可以在任何岩石或泥土表面使用该攀爬速度。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以移动石头与泥土物体，或以轻微方式翻动大地，使你能够翻耕土壤、拖拽一个负载至多为8的石质物体移动至多15尺，等等。在GM裁量下，你还可以对大地或岩石进行其他小幅调整。

元素抗力你身体与大地的连结使你只要站在坚实地面上就能抵抗移动。只要你站在坚实表面上，你针对试图推撞或绊摔你的行为，其强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。该加值同样适用于针对试图将你击倒为俯卧的法术或效果的豁免。此外，若任何效果会在你站在坚实表面上时强迫你移动10尺或更多，你只会被移动一半距离。如果你拥有强化抗力专长，该环境加值提高至+4。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以将松散泥土塑造成你想要的形状。元素塑形师的一次使用无法创造出足以抵御外力的坚固物体，也无法创造出足够精美以凭审美价值出售的作品；不过在很长时间内反复施用，或许能让你使用元素塑形师来制作某物。泥土雕塑必须小到能容纳在单个10尺×10尺方格或更小的范围内，并且你可以对20尺外的泥土进行塑形。在GM裁量下，你还可以对大地形状或位置进行其他类似调整。

元素感官你可以通过震动感知与同一表面接触的任何其他事物。你获得颤动感知，作为一种模糊感官，范围至30尺。

元素护盾在你使用元素护盾后，你第一次受到物理伤害时，若该伤害并非精金，伤害减少等于你等级的一半（最少1）。

元素涌动你获得等于你等级一半（最少1）的抗力，持续1轮，用于抵抗物理伤害（精金除外）。

强化移动你可以掘地而行。你获得一个掘地速度，数值等于你陆地速度的一半或20尺，取较小者。你可以使用该掘地速度在松软土壤中掘进，但无法在坚硬岩石中掘进，这与掘地速度的常规限制相同。

The element of earth represents the strength and endurance of rock and stone. Thus, its powers tend to have a shorter range but focus on allowing their user to endure various attacks and come out on top.

Associated Damage Type: Bludgeoning

Associated Traits: Earth

Active Powers

1st Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.1BeMRN2OuD8CHJkH]{Boulder Smash}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.P6kFbkQmO5JPnX4C]{Tremor Stomp}

3rd Level

5th Level

13th Level

15th Level

17th Level

19th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.juy8Aj9uX42FUu7f]{Yamazu}

Reactive Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.k5LY26lx9qUCaQeU]{Harden}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.mlIDQiVcm4AJPHl4]{Rock Shield}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.p16zJEy7kjSfsNGr]{Disrupting Tremor}

Refresh Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.sarOSsJ5ckTzePs1]{Rock Cover}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.xK0uZEWncg1WsrZU]{Shifting Ground}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.yJ3YIx9FtHHn5jqP]{Auto-Petrification}

Other Abilities

If your element is earth, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action (page 70), the Elemental Shield action (page 57), and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can climb up rock, stone, and earthen surfaces. You gain a climb Speed equal to half your land Speed, which you can use on any rock or earthen surface.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can move stone and earthen objects, or churn through earth in minor ways, allowing you to till soil, drag a stone object of up to 8 Bulk up to 15 feet, and so on. At your GM’s discretion, you can make other small adjustments to earth or rock.

Elemental Resistance Your body’s connection to the earth allows you to resist movement as long as you’re standing on solid ground. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to Shove or Trip you as long as you are standing on a solid surface. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you prone. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more while you’re standing on a solid surface, you are moved only half the distance. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, the circumstance bonus increases to +4.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can shape and sculpt loose earth into a desired shape. A single use of Elemental Sculptor doesn’t create something solid enough to stand up to force or artistic enough to sell off aesthetic merit, though repeated application over a long period of time might allow you to Craft something using Elemental Sculptor. The earthen sculpture must be small enough to fit in a single 10-foot by 10-foot square or less, and you can sculpt earth up to 20 feet away. At the GM’s discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to earth’s shape or position.

Elemental Senses You can sense anything else in contact with the same surface via tremors. You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield The first time you take physical damage after using Elemental Shield, if the damage isn’t adamantine, reduce the damage by half your level (minimum 1).

Elemental Surge You gain resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to physical damage (except adamantine) for 1 round.

Enhanced Locomotion You can burrow into the earth. You gain a burrow Speed equal to half your land Speed or 20 feet, whichever is less. You can use this burrow Speed to burrow through soft earth but not solid rock, as normal for a burrow Speed.

Electricity.name: 电击 Electricity
Electricity.text:
电的元素代表闪电与其他电流的带电流动和压倒性的震击。电系艾达蒙与元素化身会积蓄电荷，以发动极其强大的攻击。

关联伤害类型：电击

关联A:特征：电击

电击关键术语

你几乎会在每个电击元素能力中看到以下术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}：电系艾达蒙与电击元素化身可以获得带电状态。带电状态总是具有数值，从1到3。如果一个带电生物已经带电并将要再次变为带电，则其改为将自身的带电状态数值提高1，最高至带电3。只要生物处于带电，它就处于震慑状态。任何会移除震慑状态的效果，改为将带电状态数值降低1。大多数电击能力会提供放电选项，将带电状态降低1，以获得额外效果。带电状态持续到遭遇结束；在遭遇之外获得的任何电荷，会在下一次刷新期间失去。因此，电系艾达蒙与元素化身总是在遭遇开始时处于未带电状态。若电系艾达蒙或元素化身未带电，则不能使用需要其放电的能力（或能力中需要放电的可选收益）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked}：震慑状态通常没有数值。处于震慑的生物被电性充能，使电击更容易伤害它。它对造成电击伤害的攻击处于措手不及（即使只是额外的电击伤害，例如震击武器），并且对抗电击效果的强韧与反射豁免承受–2环境减值。震慑状态通常持续至所列持续时间结束，但若生物从非持续电击伤害的来源受到任意数量的电击伤害，或其花费一个交互动作将电荷无害地放散，则该状态会提前结束

主动能力

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.veFrnrxYjlqca13w]{Electric Surge}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KWQgx7RMeY3RKW6J]{Static Shock}

3级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.QIYppaP0zcGvb5Bd]{Electric Shot}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.WPgjJc2nP7tTAFtO]{Polarize}

5级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.hQOa1yaP9C6wajNn]{Anvil Crawler Lightning}

7级

9级

11级

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KMioRIPBKBem8UOF]{Spasmodic Shock}

15级

17级

19级

反应能力

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.geZCat82IOuShmmk]{Retributive Shock}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.fzV5Ly3a9nEsfcAJ]{Reactive Chain}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Pn7dTIVzOhynNelJ]{Protective Shock}

刷新能力

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.9bElF2uVf5FCJtb9]{High Voltage}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.vWaGFTP9WbRzqcFk]{Devour Charge}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.7PyTj9viwKAUJCDb]{Recharge}

其他能力

如果你的元素是电击，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你几乎能瞬间像一道闪电般弹射而出，作为一个单动作，且具有移动A:特征，并从一处坚实表面起始。你可以沿任意方向（甚至垂直向上）以直线移动，最远至你陆地速度的一半，且不会触发基于移动的反应。如果你的目的地包含一个足够显著、并且能大量导电的物体或生物（例如铜、银或金），则你可以移动至你的陆地速度，而不是你的陆地速度的一半。如果你在无法支撑你重量的位置结束移动（例如半空中），你会坠落。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以控制电与电流，偏转电流或电荷。你也可以让一个相邻生物获得持续2回合的震慑状态。在GM裁定下，你还可以对电做出其他小幅调整。

元素抗性你的身体会受到保护以抵御电涌，因为你体内的能量会偏转敌意的电击。环境中的电击效果永远不会偶然击中你，不过这并不能保护你免受电击攻击或魔法控制的天气影响。你获得等同于你等级一半的电击伤害抗性。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你能以比元素操控更大的幅度移动并控制电。这使你能够引导显著的电流，甚至将附近环境中的电击引导至你选择的另一个目标。例如，如果一束来自雷暴的闪电（不是法术、能力或其他本领）即将击中一棵树，你可以改将其偏转至附近的敌人身上。在GM裁定下，你也可以对电的形状或位置做出其他类似的调整。

元素感官你获得30尺范围的不精确伏特感知，使你能够感知电势与电流。它不仅能让你注意到电能在你周围流动，还可能让你注意到大多数活生物，因为它们依赖电流来驱动神经系统。然而，活生物的电流相当微弱，并且很容易被环境中各种电流所掩盖，即使该生物并未采取预防伏特感知的措施。另一方面，更强的电击则几乎不可能在你面前隐藏。

元素护盾如果敌人之所以未命中其近战攻击，只是因为元素护盾对AC的环境加值，则护盾会电击该敌人，使其在你的下一回合结束前处于震慑状态。

元素涌动被选中的生物会处于震慑状态，持续到你的下一回合结束，除非其在对抗你能力DC的反射豁免中成功。

强化机动你可以让你的元素机动所产生的闪电弹射，像连锁闪电一样在导电材料间之字形串联。只要你继续使用闪电弹射并在每回合至少移动一次，即使你在半空中结束移动，你也不会坠落，直到你的下一回合结束。与飞行速度不同，你可以笔直向上移动而不将该移动视为困难地形，并且你仍会以闪电弹射无视基于移动的反应，但你仍只能以一系列直线移动。

The element of electricity represents the charging flow and overwhelming shocks of lightning and other electricity. Electric eldamon and elemental avatars build up charge in order to launch extremely powerful attacks.

Associated Damage Type: Electricity

Associated Traits: Electricity

Electricity Key Terms

You'll see the following terms in almost every electricity elemental power.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.Bi2aHykg6CZrQCnR]{Charged}: Electricity eldamon and electricity elemental avatars can gain the charged condition. The charged condition always has a value, from 1 to 3. If a charged creature is already charged and would become charged, they instead increase the value of their charged condition by 1 to a maximum of charged 3. A charged creature is shocked as long as it is charged. Any effect that would remove the shocked condition instead reduces the charged condition value by 1. Most electricity powers offer options to discharge, reducing the charged condition by 1, in order to gain additional effects. The charged condition lasts until the end of an encounter; any charge gained outside an encounter is lost during the next refresh. As a result, electricity eldamon and elemental avatars always begin an encounter uncharged. An electricity eldamon or elemental avatar can't use a power (or an optional benefit within a power) that requires them to discharge if they aren't charged.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.1fZbuJEbVmE3J4XL]{Shocked}: The shocked condition normally doesn't have a value. A shocked creature is electrically charged, making it easy for electricity to harm it. It's off-guard against attacks that deal electricity damage (even if it's only additional electricity damage, such as a shock weapon) and takes –2 circumstance penalty on Fortitude and Reflex saving throws against electricity effects. The shocked condition normally lasts for the duration listed, but it ends early if the creature takes any amount of electricity damage from a source other than persistent electricity damage, or if they spend an Interact action to discharge the electricity harmlessly

Active Powers

1st Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.veFrnrxYjlqca13w]{Electric Surge}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KWQgx7RMeY3RKW6J]{Static Shock}

3rd Level

Other Abilities

If your element is electricity, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can jolt off like a bolt of lightning almost instantly, as a single action, which has the move trait, starting from a solid surface. This allows you to move in a straight line in any direction (even vertically), at a distance out to half your land Speed, without triggering reactions based on movement. If your destination contains an object or creature of significant size that substantially conducts electricity (such as copper, silver, or gold), you can move up to your land Speed instead of half your land Speed. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you fall.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control electricity and electric current, diverting electric currents or electric charge. You can also give an adjacent creature the shocked condition for 2 rounds. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to electricity.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes protected against electric surges, as the energy within you diverts hostile electricity. Environmental electricity effects never strike you by chance, though this doesn't protect you from electric attacks or magically controlled weather. You gain resistance equal to half your level against electricity damage.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control electricity to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to channel significant electric current and even direct nearby environmental electricity to another target of your choice. For instance, if a lightning bolt from a thunderstorm (not a spell, power, or other ability) was about to hit a tree, you could divert it to a nearby foe instead. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to electricity's shape or position.

Elemental Senses You gain imprecise voltsense out to 30 feet, which allows you to sense electric potential and currents. Not only does it allow you to notice electric power moving around you, it can potentially allow you to notice most living creatures, as they rely on electric currents to power their nervous systems. However, the electric current from a living creature is quite small and easily hidden amidst the various currents in the environment, even if a creature isn't taking precautions against voltsense. Stronger electricity, on the other hand, is almost impossible to hide from you.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield zaps the foe, and they become shocked until the end of your next turn.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature becomes shocked until the end of your next turn unless they succeed at a Reflex save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion You can chain the lightning jolts from your elemental locomotion zigzagging through conductive materials like chain lightning. As long as you continue using lightning jolts to move at least once per turn, you don't fall until the end of your next turn, even if you end your movement in mid-air. Unlike a fly Speed, you can move straight up without counting the movement as difficult terrain, and you continue ignoring reactions based on movement with your lightning jolts, but you can still only move in a series of straight lines.

Fire.name: 火 Fire
Fire.text:
火元素代表烈焰吞噬一切的威能。因此，它的核心围绕着能造成高额伤害并附带持续火焰伤害的力量。在所有元素之中，火能造成最多的纯粹伤害，使火系艾达蒙与元素化身得以将敌人化为灰烬。

双重灼烧：当你的敌人被你的火焰覆盖时，你可以催逼那火焰让其烧得更猛烈。每当某个火系力量或涌动对一名已因你的火系力量或涌动而承受等同或更高持续火焰伤害的生物造成持续火焰伤害时，你改为造成等同于新的持续火焰伤害的火焰伤害。若造成该新的持续火焰伤害的效果也会造成火焰伤害，则在应用弱点、抗力等之前，先将双重灼烧造成的伤害与其火焰伤害相加。

关联伤害类型：火

关联特性：火

其他能力

如果你的元素为火，你会从“元素涌动”动作（第70页）、“元素护盾”动作，以及随元素而变化的“元素化身”专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动只要你站在坚实表面上，你就能以单动作从身体喷射一股火焰喷流；该动作具有移动特性，用于进行一次火焰跳跃。这使你能够以直线向任意方向移动（甚至可垂直向上），移动距离最远等同于你的陆地速度。若你在一个无法支撑你体重的位置结束移动，例如在半空中，你可以在坠落前额外进行一次不具有移动特性的单动作，或使用一次单个主动火系力量。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你能以细微方式呼唤并控制火焰，使你能从指尖制造小火花来点燃易燃物体、移动极小的火焰，或以接触熄灭蜡烛等极其微小的火焰。在GM酌情决定下，你也能对火焰做出其他微小调整。

元素抗力你的身体对火焰与高温变得习惯。你会受到保护而免于严酷的环境高温影响，并获得等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害抗力。若你拥有“强化抗力”专长，你也会受到保护而免于极端的环境高温影响。

元素塑形师当你使用“元素塑形师”专长时，你能以比元素操控更强的程度移动并控制火焰。这使你能将一个面积至多为10英尺×10英尺方形区域的火焰，移动到最远20英尺外，或塑造火焰的形态以改变其美学外观，例如让火焰看起来呈现巨龙的形状。在GM酌情决定下，你也能对火焰的形状或位置做出其他类似调整。

元素感官火焰、烟雾及其各种后续效果不会对你的视野造成阻碍。你可以透过火焰、烟雾与热浪看见。它们不会妨碍你的视野，而那些仅因火焰、烟雾或热浪而会处于隐蔽状态的生物，对你而言不会处于隐蔽状态。

元素护盾若一名敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中你，仅仅是因为元素护盾对AC提供的环境加值，则该护盾会灼烧敌人，使其受到等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害（最少1）。

元素涌动被选定的生物以针对你力量DC的基础反射豁免，承受等同于你等级一半的持续火焰伤害（最少1）。若其已具有持续火焰伤害，则改为以针对你力量DC的基础反射豁免，承受等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害。

强化机动你可以继续喷射火焰喷流以进行飞行。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，但以此方式飞行时，你无法使用元素机动中的单动作来进行火焰跳跃。

The element of fire represents the allconsuming might of flame. Thus, it's centered around powers that deal high damage along with persistent fire damage. Of all the elements, fire does the most raw damage, allowing fire eldamon and elemental avatar to turn their foes to ash.

Double Burn: When your foes are covered in your fire, you can push that fire to burn them more. Whenever a fire power or surge deals persistent fire damage to a creature that already has equal or more persistent fire damage from your fire powers or surges, you instead deal fire damage equal to the new persistent fire damage. If the effect that caused the new persistent fire damage also deals fire damage, add the damage from double burn together before applying weaknesses, resistances, and the like.

Associated Damage Type: Fire

Associated Traits: Fire

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.zHF9SR35N3kMgGd6]{Reborn in Flames}

Other Abilities

If your element is fire, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action (page 70), the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can shoot off a jet of flame from your body as a single action, which has the move trait, to make a fire jump, as long as you are on a solid surface. This allows you to move in a straight line in any direction (even vertically), at a distance out to your land Speed. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you can take a single additional action that doesn't have the move trait, or use a single active fire power, before falling.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can call and control flames in minor ways, allowing you to create small sparks from your fingers that can ignite flammable objects, move very small flames, or put out candles and other extremely small fires by touch. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to fires.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes inured to flames and heat. You are protected from severe environmental heat and gain resistance equal to half your level against fire damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, you also become protected against extreme environmental heat.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control flames to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to move a fire with at most a 10-foot by 10-foot square area up to 20 feet away, or to sculpt the shape of a fire to change its aesthetic appearance, such as making the flames seem to take the shape of a dragon. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to a fire's shape or position.

Elemental Senses Flames, smoke, and their various aftereffects provide no impediment to your vision. You can see through fire, smoke, and heat haze. They don't impair your vision, and creatures who would be concealed only due to fire, smoke, or heat haze aren't concealed to you.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack against you only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield burns the foe, and they take fire damage equal to half your level (minimum 1).

Elemental Surge The chosen creature takes persistent fire damage equal to half your level (minimum 1) with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. If they already have persistent fire damage, they instead take fire damage equal to half your level with a basic Reflex save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion You can continue shooting jets of flame in order to fly. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, but while flying in this way, you can't use the single action from elemental locomotion to make a fire jump.

Force.name: 力场 Force

刷新力量

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.gtTHwDh5MNAKk9Pv]{Force Gambit}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.SpZNKC51ZuOJKtYL]{Force Field}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.vaUnJD4nlrmxkH1m]{Disruptive Impulse}

其他能力

如果你的元素是力，你会从“元素涌动”动作、“元素护盾”动作，以及随元素而变化的“元素化身”专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 你运用对力的掌控在空气中移动自己，作为一个单动作，且具有移动特性。只要你从坚实的表面起步，你就可以以任意方向（甚至垂直方向）沿直线移动，距离至多等同于你的陆地速度。若你在无法支撑你体重的位置结束移动，例如在半空中，你可以在坠落前再进行一个不具有移动特性的额外单动作，或使用一个单个力的力量。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以用力移动一个负载为1或更低且位于20尺内的物体，最多移动20尺。这仅仅是将物体从一处移动到另一处，并不会执行操弄或交互动作等类似行为。

元素抗力 你的身体逐渐适应超自然的力。你对抗力场效果的豁免获得+1环境加值，并获得等同于你等级一半的力场伤害抗力。若你拥有“强化抗力”专长，你对抗力场效果的豁免的环境加值提升为+2。

元素塑形师 当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以塑造力以移动一个负载至多40的物体，将其移动至多20尺远；该物体所占空间不大于10尺×10尺×10尺，且移动距离至多20尺。这仅仅是将物体从一处移动到另一处，并不会执行操弄或交互动作等类似行为。

元素感官 你投射出一片力感测场以侦测附近的动静。你获得动觉作为一种模糊感官，范围30尺。

元素护盾 若敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中，仅仅是因为元素护盾给予AC的环境加值，那么护盾的力会短暂扰乱敌人的防御，使其在你下个回合结束前对下一次针对它进行的攻击陷入措手不及。

元素涌动 你可以将所选生物重新定位5尺，除非其在对抗你力量DC的强韧豁免中成功。

强化机动 你能如此轻松地以力推动自身，几乎就像在飞行。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，但以此方式飞行时，你无法使用来自元素机动的单动作来以力推动自己。

The element of force embodies a mystical metaphysical force that can move or blast things even at a distance. Thus, it focuses on powers that move other creatures around the battlefield, taking advantage of positioning to throw off your foes' rhythm.

Associated Damage Type: Force

Associated Traits: Force

Other Abilities

If your element is force, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You use your power over force to move yourself through the air, as a single action, which has the move trait. This allows you to move in a straight line in any direction (even vertically), at a distance out to your land Speed, as long as you start on a solid surface. If you end the movement somewhere that can't support your weight, such as in mid-air, you can take a single additional action that doesn't have the move trait or use a single force power, before falling.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can use force to move an object of 1 Bulk or less and within 20 feet up to 20 feet. This just moves an object from one place to another, it doesn't perform manipulate or Interact actions or the like.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes accustomed to supernatural force. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against force effects and gain resistance equal to half your level against force damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus on saving throws against force effects increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt force in order to move an object up to 40 Bulk up to 20 feet away and taking up no larger than a 10-foot by 10-foot by 10-foot space up to 20 feet. This just moves an object from one place to another, it doesn't perform manipulate or Interact actions or the like.

Elemental Senses You project a field of force sensors to detect nearby movement. You gain motionsense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield's forces disrupt the foe's defenses momentarily, and they become off-guard against the next attack made against them before the end of your next turn.

Elemental Surge You can reposition the chosen creature 5 feet unless they succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion You can propel yourself with force so easily that you might as well be flying. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, but while flying in this way, you can't use the single action from elemental locomotion to propel yourself with force.

Ice.name: 冰 Ice
Ice.text:
冰之元素体现了冬季的极地寒意、冰与雪。因此，它专注于能够冻结并妨碍敌人的力量。尽管冻结状态本身无法直接夺走敌人的动作，但结合移动与站位，冰系力量能将敌人逼入一种不得不二选一的境地：要么花费一个动作移除冰层，要么由于移动速度降低而被迫移动两次。冰系使用者会利用这些无解局面来降低敌人的输出，并且还能学会其他手段来惩罚那些选择保持不动的敌人，借由他们较高的冻结值加以利用。

冰霜累积： 虽然通常情况下冻结状态不可累积，但冰系艾达兽与冰系元素化身可以将自身力量造成的冻结状态累积，最高为5＋其每4个等级＋1（20级时最高10）。这意味着，如果同一个元素化身先使一个敌人获得冻结2状态，随后又使其获得冻结3状态，则该敌人变为冻结5。若有两只艾达兽或元素化身都对同一生物施加冻结状态，其数值不累积。

关联伤害类型： 寒冷

关联特征： 寒冷

冰系关键词

你会在几乎每个冰系元素力量中看到下列术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{冻结}： 冻结状态总是具有数值。处于冻结的生物其身体会逐渐结冰，导致其所有速度承受等同于–5尺×冻结值的状态减值，例如冻结4则为–20尺。冻结生物或其相邻盟友可以花费一个交互动作移除冰层，使冻结状态降低4。具有火焰（特征）的生物则改为使其（或其盟友的）冻结状态降低5。对冻结生物使用具有火焰（特征）的效果，或会造成火焰伤害的效果时，无论该生物是否承受任何火焰伤害，使用者都可以选择使该冻结生物的冻结值降低4。虽然冻结状态通常（和其他状态一样）不可累积，但冰系艾达兽与元素化身拥有一项特殊能力，使其能够将自身力量造成的冻结状态累积。

主动力量

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.CdPOqQxpDgSau0XF]{冰寒接触}

11级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.zW095Mt3Ob4ts15C]{霜华枢纽}

无手交互

规则中对于没有手的生物是否能使用交互动作存在一些模糊之处；但反过来说，如果它们不能，那么这些生物就不可能移除弓的武器大成功专精效果。无论如何，就冻结状态而言，任何生物都可以执行移除冻结所需的交互动作。

其他能力

若你的元素为冰，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得下列能力与效果。

元素机动 你将脚下空气中的水冻结，使你能在短暂时间内行走于空中，随后冰会融化。行走在这条冰径上通常属于困难地形。当你从坚实表面开始疾行时，你可以在稀薄空气上移动，以最大45度角上升或下降；不过在你的疾行动作结束后，若你不在能够支撑你重量的表面上，你可以执行一个不具有移动特征的单动作或使用一个冰系力量，然后你会坠落。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以以细微方式控制寒冷与冰，使你能够冷却一件物体，甚至让一件极小的物体结冰或除霜，从而可能为对抗环境热量提供短暂缓解、让被冷却的金属稍微收缩、让某些饮品更美味，等等。由GM酌情决定，你也可以做出其他类似的小幅调整。

元素抗性 你的身体逐渐适应冰川般的寒意。你会受到保护，不受严酷的环境寒冷影响，并获得等同于你等级一半的寒冷伤害抗性。若你拥有“强化抗性”专长，你也会受到保护，不受极端的环境寒冷影响。

元素塑形师 当你使用“元素塑形师”专长时，你可以比元素操控更大幅度地塑形与控制冰和雪。这使你能够在区域内用冰与雪制造粗略的形状与特性，每次大致为一个10尺×10尺的方格，最远至20尺，随着时间推移可能形成更大的雕塑。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对冰、雪与魔法寒冷区域做出其他类似调整。

元素感官 你能像看穿晴朗天空一样轻易看穿坠落的冰与雪。你能看穿暴风雪、冰暴等类似现象。它们不会妨碍你的视线，且那些仅因这种降水而会变为隐蔽的生物，对你而言并非隐蔽。此外，你还能清晰看穿原本会遮蔽另一侧事物的半透明冰层，但你无法看穿坚实不透明的冰墙或雪墙。

元素护盾 若敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中，仅因为元素护盾给予AC的环境加值，则护盾会冻结该敌人，使其变为冻结2。

元素涌动 被选中的生物除非在对抗你力量DC的反射豁免中成功，否则会变为冻结2；若成功，则为冻结1。若为大成功，则不会冻结。

强化机动 当你冻结你下方的空气以支撑自身重量时，一座稳定的冰平台会在你脚下保持冻结，直到你走开。这使你能够行走于空中，并想停留多久就停留多久。

The element of ice embodies the arctic chill of winter, ice, and snow. Thus, it focuses on powers that freeze and hamper enemies. While the frozen condition can't take away a foe's actions on its own, combined with movement and positioning, ice powers can put the foe in a position where it's forced to either spend an action removing the ice or moving twice, thanks to a reduced move speed. Ice users use these no-win situations to reduce their enemies' output, and they can learn other tricks to punish foes who choose to stay immobile, exploiting their high frozen value.

Ice Accumulation: While normally the frozen condition isn't cumulative, ice eldamon and ice elemental avatars can accumulate the frozen condition from their own powers to a maximum of 5 plus 1 for every 4 levels they have (maximum 10 at 20th level). This means that if a single elemental avatar causes a foe to gain the frozen 2 condition and then the frozen 3 condition, the foe becomes frozen 5. If two eldamon or elemental avatars both cause frozen conditions on the same creature, the values aren't cumulative.

Associated Damage Type: Cold

Associated Traits: Cold

Ice Key Terms

You'll see the following term in almost every ice elemental power.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.OyojvmEKkLrUxX1W]{Frozen}: The frozen condition always has a value. A frozen creature's body is slowly freezing over, causing it to take a status penalty to its Speeds equal to –5-feet × the frozen value, for instance –20-feet for frozen 4. A frozen creature or an adjacent ally can spend an Interact action to remove the ice, reducing the frozen condition by 4. A creature with the fire trait instead reduces its (or its ally's) frozen condition by 5. A creature using an effect with the fire trait, or an effect that would deal fire damage, on a frozen creature can choose to reduce the frozen creature's frozen value by 4, whether the creature takes any fire damage or not. While the frozen condition is normally not cumulative (like other conditions), ice eldamon and elemental avatars have a special ability allowing them to accumulate the frozen condition from their own powers.
