  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.mmBlhirXIo5Ab1hj]{Ice Shield}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.U2TbhTupSYeDHpkM]{Slippery Ice}

Refresh Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.yWJSgMiYy22gjbsx]{Intensify Cold}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.7JTthmrk5AhUSpez]{Ice Armor}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.zW095Mt3Ob4ts15C]{Rime Nexus}

Interacting Without Hands

There is some ambiguity in the rules as to whether or not a creature without hands can use the Interact action; on the other hand, if they couldn't, it would be impossible for those creatures to remove the effect of bow critical specialization. In any case, for the purpose of the frozen condition, any creature can take the Interact action needed to remove frozen.

Other Abilities

If your element is ice, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You freeze the water in the air beneath your feet, allowing you to momentarily walk on the air, before it thaws. Walking on this ice path is normally difficult terrain. When you Stride starting from a solid surface, you can move over thin air, ascending or descending at a maximum of a 45-degree angle, though after your Stride action is complete, if you aren't on a surface that can support your weight, you can take a single action that doesn't have the move trait or use an ice power and then you fall.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control cold and ice in minor ways, allowing you to chill an object or even freeze over or defrost a very small object, potentially providing momentary relief against environmental heat, slightly contracting chilled metal, making certain drinks tastier, and so on. At your GM's discretion, you can make other similar small adjustments.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes accustomed to glacial chill. You are protected from severe environmental cold and gain resistance equal to half your level against cold damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, you also become protected against extreme environmental cold.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt and control ice and snow to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to create rough shapes and features out of ice and snow in the area, roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square at a time out to 20 feet, potentially allowing for a larger sculpture over time. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to ice, snow, and areas of magical cold.

Elemental Senses You can see through falling ice and snow as easily as through a clear sky. You can see through snow storms, ice storms, and the like. They don't impair your vision, and creatures who would be concealed only due to such precipitation aren't concealed to you. Additionally, you can see clearly through partially transparent sheets of ice that would otherwise conceal whatever was on the other side, but you can't see through solid opaque walls of ice or snow.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield freezes the foe, and they become frozen 2.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature becomes frozen 2 unless they succeed at a Reflex save against your power DC, or frozen 1 on a success. They aren't frozen on a critical success.

Enhanced Locomotion When you freeze the air beneath you to support your weight, a stable platform of ice remains frozen beneath your feet until you step away. This allows you to walk on the air and remain in mid-air as long as you wish.

Life.name: 生命 Life
Life.text:
生命元素体现了诞生、治疗性的重生，以及渗透所有活生物的生命精华，赋予它们本能、直觉与集体信念。生命使用者专注于保存与复苏，主要通过临时生命值来实现，使自己与盟友无论面对何种威胁都能保持健康与振奋。

生命涌动：你的临时生命值充满了复涌的生命能量。若某个生物生命值为0，并从你的生命力量获得临时生命值，则该生物恢复1点生命值。每小时一次，你可以选择不以你的生命力量给予临时生命值，而是改为治疗一个生物等量的生命值；之后，该生物会对这种替换暂时免疫1小时。

关联伤害类型：活力

关联特性：活力

生命关键术语

你会在数个生命元素力量中看到以下术语。

复苏：复苏效果是一种治疗效果，用于从特定伤害来源中恢复。复苏效果通常与某个伤害来源同时发生，从而有效降低伤害。复苏效果绝不能治疗超过该生物因所关联的伤害来源而失去的实际生命值（非临时生命值）的伤害量，即使数个复苏效果同时发生也是如此。当治疗与伤害同时发生时，它可能防止被治疗的生物降至0生命值并陷入昏迷；然而若剩余伤害仍足以令其昏迷，则该治疗不会唤醒它。以不同时间点发生的复苏效果则可如常将生物从昏迷中唤醒，但即使与其他复苏效果合并，也仍不能治疗超过其所失去的实际生命值。

主动能力

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.0IIUhxWyymjKngPB]{治疗微粒}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.6xep3uGlHDZcmO7J]{生命缓冲}

3级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.G4ThYolCwSZ08Xjl]{生命联结}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.EPGTJfl5HcTHNoVw]{活力接触}

5级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.I6lKFVnSTho0QCRc]{满溢喷涌}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.IOj5wTvB5CY5hL8c]{舒缓复苏}

7级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Ai6MSoKp6guHFHDP]{生命反弹}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.OmgRCNrPMDcwLbQw]{生命之路}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.EJ87YaoMGxbRo1y3]{强制链接}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.IY7Zv34gyksSVnJA]{活力吐息}

11级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Y0i6fqVyb5THFr0B]{活力崩解}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.a7qZ46X8yHC1Gt2d]{蓬勃接种}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.9Q6Ufd1S3At1Z9Is]{生命导体}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.g6GIIfK6qWtegV2G]{救生泡泡}

15级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.5i7SJBErf074bw6Z]{生命镣铐}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.fuVcuAqmwYJrI2fW]{共享活力}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.q8KTRG7X9X9EzUUw]{生命风暴}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.mDZPll8XXrmQUSGX]{活力奇点}

19级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.bBHTgigIjKYsf6Bh]{阿姆利塔}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.jGNAwv9dv24u5NzP]{极乐境}

反应能力

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.fqcy1IqaGBgs7L2v]{活力献祭}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.mo0o8FWxdMlztvJy]{报复性复苏}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.9Oldp673M7kYQkKA]{凡躯喘息}

刷新能力

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.ozMb4QgqbPJAGEMG]{生命茧}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.qyqVnOrZlvus9XiA]{保存生命}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.m0EnaY7eIZeXIS5t]{生命涡旋}

其他能力

若你的元素为生命，你将从“元素涌动”动作、“元素护盾”动作，以及依元素而异的“元素化身”专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素移动你可以通过某个生物的生命力来传导自身，以穿过它的空间进行移动。以单动作（具有移动特性）进行，你可以穿过一个相邻活生物的空间，即使其是敌人亦可，并移动到任何一个与该生物相邻的其他空间。此移动不会触发基于移动的反应。

元素操控当你使用“元素操控”时，你可以向30尺内的一个处于濒死（状态）的生物送入生命波动以使其稳定。该生物失去濒死（状态），但仍会在0生命值时处于昏迷。此外，只要你有一只手空闲，你就可以在没有医疗工具包的情况下使用医疗，并在这样做时于3级获得对你的医疗检定的+1物品加值、9级获得+2物品加值、17级获得+3物品加值。若你拥有“虹吸元素”职业特性，你获得“战地医疗”技能专长，并可用你的生命力量进行“治疗伤口”与提供“战地医疗”，且无需医疗工具包；当你以此方式使用“治疗伤口”与“战地医疗”时，成功时目标额外恢复等同于你等级的生命值，且目标仅会对“战地医疗”暂时免疫1小时，而非1天。由GM裁定，你还可以对生命力进行其他类似的小幅调整。

元素抗性你的身体被生命能量强化，保护你免于死亡。当你处于濒死（状态）且在复苏检定中失败时，你的濒死（状态）不会增加；若你大失败，你的濒死（状态）仅增加1。若你拥有“强化抗性”专长，你在所有复苏检定中自动大成功。

元素塑形师当你使用“元素塑形师”专长时，你比起使用“元素操控”更容易塑造并控制生命力。你可以用“元素塑形师”在60尺范围内使用任何消耗不超过两个动作的医疗技能动作，或“治疗伤口”。

元素感官你可以感知附近活生物的生命力，以及其在不死生物体内的对抗力量。你获得生命感知，作为一种不精确感官，范围30尺。

元素护盾当护盾结束时，复苏等同于你等级一半的生命值，或你在护盾生效期间所受伤害量，两者取其低者。这是一个复苏效果。

元素涌动被选定的生物获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续1轮。

强化移动你与盟友的连接使你能够从远处汲取他们的生命力，将自己带到他们身边。以单动作（具有移动特性）进行，你可以短暂转化为生命能量，然后在60尺内一名盟友相邻的空间中再现。你仍需要对你的盟友有效果线，并且你必须能以精确感官或以不精确的生命感知侦测到他们，但你无需穿越其间的方格，从而能避开障碍与有害地形，且此移动不会触发基于移动的反应。

The element of life embodies birth, healing rebirth, and the vital essence that permeates all living creatures, giving them their instincts, intuition, and collective faith. Life users focus on preservation and rejuvenation, mainly via temporary Hit Points, keeping themselves and their allies healthy and refreshed no matter the threat.

Vital Resurgence: Your temporary Hit Points are full of resurgent life energy. If a creature has 0 Hit Points and gains temporary Hit Points from your life power, they regain 1 Hit Point. Once per hour, instead of granting temporary Hit Points with your life power, you can choose to heal a creature for an equal amount of Hit Points; the creature then becomes temporarily immune to this substitution for 1 hour.

Associated Damage Type: Vitality

Associated Traits: Vitality

Life Key Terms

You'll see the following term in several life elemental powers.

Recovery: A recovery effect is a healing effect that recovers from a particular damage source. Recover effects often happen simultaneously to a damage source, effectively reducing the damage. A recovery effect can never heal more damage than the amount of actual Hit Points (not temporary Hit Points) the creature loses from the linked damage source, even if several recovery effects happen at once. When the healing is simultaneous to the damage, it can potentially prevent the healed creature from being reduced to 0 Hit Points and becoming unconscious, though if the remaining damage is still enough to knock them unconscious, the healing doesn't wake them up. Recovery effects that happen at a different timing can wake a creature from being unconscious as normal, though they still can't heal a creature more than the amount of actual Hit Points they lost, even in combination with other recovery effects.

Active Powers

1st Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.0IIUhxWyymjKngPB]{Healing Motes}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.6xep3uGlHDZcmO7J]{Life Buffer}

3rd Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.G4ThYolCwSZ08Xjl]{Lifebond}

5th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.IOj5wTvB5CY5hL8c]{Soothing Recovery}

7th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Ai6MSoKp6guHFHDP]{Life Rebound}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.OmgRCNrPMDcwLbQw]{Path of Life}

9th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.IY7Zv34gyksSVnJA]{Vital Breath}

11th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Y0i6fqVyb5THFr0B]{Vital Collapse}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.a7qZ46X8yHC1Gt2d]{Vibrant Inoculation}

13th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.9Q6Ufd1S3At1Z9Is]{Life Conductor}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.g6GIIfK6qWtegV2G]{Lifeguard Bubble}

15th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.5i7SJBErf074bw6Z]{Life Shackles}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.fuVcuAqmwYJrI2fW]{Shared Vitality}

17th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.q8KTRG7X9X9EzUUw]{Lifestorm}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.mDZPll8XXrmQUSGX]{Vital Singularity}

19th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.bBHTgigIjKYsf6Bh]{Amrita}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.jGNAwv9dv24u5NzP]{Elysium}

Reactive Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.fqcy1IqaGBgs7L2v]{Vital Sacrifice}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.mo0o8FWxdMlztvJy]{Retributive Rejuvenation}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.9Oldp673M7kYQkKA]{Mortal Reprieve}

Refresh Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.ozMb4QgqbPJAGEMG]{Life Cocoon}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.qyqVnOrZlvus9XiA]{Preserve Life}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.m0EnaY7eIZeXIS5t]{Life Vortex}

Other Abilities

If your element is life, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can transmit yourself through a creature's life force in order to move through its space. As a single action, which has the move trait, you move through an adjacent living creature's space, even if they're a foe, to any other space adjacent to that creature. This movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can send waves of life into a dying creature within 30 feet in order to stabilize them. The creature loses the dying condition, though it remains unconscious at 0 Hit Points. Additionally, you can use Medicine without a healer's kit as long as you have a hand free, receiving a +1 item bonus to your Medicine check when you do so at 3rd level, a +2 item bonus at 9th level, and a +3 item bonus at 17th level. If you have Siphoning Element class feature, you gain the Battle Medicine skill feat and can use your life powers to Treat Wounds and provide Battle Medicine with your powers and without a healer's kit; when you use Treat Wounds and Battle Medicine in this way, on a success the target recovers additional Hit Points equal to your level, and the target becomes temporarily immune to Battle Medicine for only 1 hour, not 1 day. At your GM's discretion, you can make other similar small adjustments to life force.

Elemental Resistance Your body becomes bolstered by life energy, protecting you from dying. If you fail a recovery check while dying, your dying condition does not increase; if you critically fail, your dying condition increases by only 1. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, you automatically critically succeed at all recovery checks.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt and control life force more easily than with Elemental Manipulation. You can use Elemental Sculptor to use any Medicine skill action that takes two actions or fewer, or Treat Wounds, at a range of 60 feet.

Elemental Senses You can sense the life force of living creatures nearby, and its counterforce within undead. You gain lifesense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield When the shield expires, recover Hit Points equal to half your level, or the amount of damage you took while the shield was active, whichever is less. This is a recovery effect.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature gains temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 round.

Enhanced Locomotion Your connection to your allies allows you to tap into their life force from a distance to bring yourself to their side. As a single action, which has the move trait, you can briefly transition into life energy and then reappear in a space adjacent to an ally within 60 feet. You still need line of effect to your ally and you either must be able to detect them with a precise sense or with imprecise lifesense, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Light.name: 光 Light
Light.text:
光之元素揭示真相，以及那些被隐藏或未曾看见之物。然而，真相并非只有一个客观版本，因此当光被弯折或塑形以符合使用者的意志时，也能通过揭示被扭曲的真相来误导他人。

光埃尔达蒙与元素化身运用光，去揭露并强调他们选择向他人展示的真相。

关联伤害类型：火

关联特征：光

光 关键术语

你会在许多光元素能力中看到下列术语。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{显映的}：光能力与效果可能会令一个生物获得显映的状态。显映的生物被光所环绕，使其如火炬般发光，勾勒其轮廓并令其位置一目了然。由于发光之故，显映的生物通常无法变为隐蔽（状态）；但若该生物在其他情况下会是隐形的，则其改为隐蔽（状态）。处于显映的状态而仍为隐蔽（状态）的隐形生物，无法使用隐蔽（状态）来躲藏或潜行，因为光会暴露其确切位置。显映的状态不会阻止一个拥有掩蔽的生物进行躲藏或潜行。若一个生物拥有在没有掩蔽或隐蔽（状态）的情况下躲藏或潜行的能力（例如使用伪装），只要这束光仍可见，显映的状态所带来的耀眼光芒就会使之困难得多，使该生物的隐匿检定获得–4环境减值，并且其对抗“搜寻”动作的隐匿DC也同样获得该减值。一个本应变为显映的笼罩的生物会改为失去其笼罩的状态，反之亦然。

主动能力

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.2N737tDjqSBl9jPa]{光之刃}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.AEJrFzbnO951dWpd]{明耀光束}

其他能力

若你的元素为光，你将从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动当你在移动时，你以光闪耀，令那些试图阻止你的人目眩。你移动期间，若敌人对你使用反应或自由动作（），他们在结算该反应或自由动作（）时会短暂地目眩。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以控制光，召来一道光并将其附着在一个生物或物体上，或让其漂浮于半空中，其效果如同光戏法。由你的GM决定，你也可以对光做出其他小幅调整。

元素抗性你会受到对光的防护。你获得等同于你等级一半的抗性，用于对抗来自光效果的伤害，并且对抗此类效果的豁免获得+1环境加值，同时也适用于任何会令你目眩或失明的效果。若你拥有强化抗性，该环境加值提高至+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以比元素操控更大幅度地移动并控制光。这使你能够将光扭曲并塑造成各种形态，在你20尺内、最大10尺×10尺的区域中调整其位置或外观。由GM决定，你也可以对光的形状或位置做出其他类似调整。

元素感官光会揭示你周围隐藏的秘密。当你进入一个隐藏的物体、生物或暗门的10尺内时，GM会为你掷一次自动的秘密察觉检定来发现它，即使你并未进行搜索。此能力不会帮助你发现或辨识陷阱、怨灵与其他危害；它只适用于物体、生物与暗门。

元素护盾若一名敌人的近战攻击之所以未命中，仅因为元素护盾对AC提供的环境加值，则该护盾以光炫目敌人，使其目眩直到你下个回合结束。

元素涌动被选中的生物获得显映的状态直到你下个回合结束。

强化机动你可以如同一道光线般以光速沿直线移动。若你以直线疾走（或若你有其他移动方式则使用该方式），你可以选择以光速进行。若你如此做，生物与危害无法对你使用反应或自由动作（），除非他们能以快于光速的速度作出反应；并且你可以沿墙壁或其他垂直表面奔跑，只要你在移动结束时停在一个能够支撑你的表面上。

The element of light reveals the truth and that which was hidden or unseen. But there is no one objective truth, and so light, when bent or shaped to the user's will, is also capable of misleading by revealing a distorted truth.

Light eldamon and elemental avatars use the light to reveal and emphasize the truth that they choose to show others.

Associated Damage Type: Fire

Associated Traits: Light

Light Key Terms

You'll see the following term in many light elemental powers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.conditions.Item.5tWqbv3Iu1FlrOx6]{Limned}: Light power and effects might give a creature the limned condition. A limned creature is surrounded by light, causing it to glow like a torch, outlining it and making its position obvious. A limned creature can't normally become concealed, due to the glowing light, though if the creature would otherwise be invisible, they become concealed instead. An invisible creature concealed while limned can't use the concealed condition to Hide or Sneak, as the lights give its exact location away. The limned condition doesn't prevent a creature with cover from Hiding or Sneaking. If a creature has the ability to Hide or Sneak without cover or concealment (such as by using camouflage), the shining light from the limned condition makes that much more difficult as long as the light is visible, giving a –4 circumstance penalty to the creature's Stealth check, as well as to its Stealth DCs against the Seek action. A shrouded creature that would become limned instead loses its shrouded condition, and vice versa.

Other Abilities

If your element is light, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion When you're in motion, you shine with light, dazzling those who try to stop you. While you're moving, foes who use a reaction or free action against you are momentarily dazzled while resolving their reaction or free action.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control light, calling forth a light and attaching it to a creature or object, or letting it float in mid-air, with the effects of a light cantrip. At your GM's discretion, you can make other small adjustments to light.

Elemental Resistance You become protected against light. You gain resistance equal to half your level against damage from light effects and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against such effects, as well as any effect that would make you dazzled or blinded. If you have Enhanced Resistances, the circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can move and control light to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to twist and shape light into various forms, adjusting their position or appearance, in up to a 10-foot by 10-foot area within 20 feet. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to light's shape or position.

Elemental Senses The light reveals hidden secrets around you. When you come within 10 feet of a hidden object, creature, or secret door, the GM rolls an automatic secret Perception check for you to find it, even if you aren't Searching. This doesn't help you find or identify traps, haunts, and other hazards, only objects, creatures, and secret doors.

Elemental Shield If a foe misses their melee attack only because of the Elemental Shield's circumstance bonus to AC, the shield dazzles the foe with light, and they become dazzled until the end of your next turn.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature becomes limned until the end of your next turn.

Enhanced Locomotion You can move in a straight line with the speed of light, like a ray of light. If you Stride (or use another form of movement if you have it) in a straight line, you can choose to do so at the speed of light. If you do, creatures and hazards can't use reactions or free actions against you unless they can react faster than the speed of light, and you can run up walls or other vertical surfaces, as long as you end your movement on a surface that can support you.

Mind.name: 心智 Mind
Mind.text:
心智元素涵盖心智本质的元素性质，它是星界位面、梦境诸境以及其他心智领域的基础。因此，它专注于侵袭、迷惑或压倒他人心智的力量。

致命创伤：你的心智力量足以造成能致死的精神创伤。当你使用一种造成精神伤害的心智力量时，你可以选择是否让该力量获得非致命（特征）。如果你不这么做，该力量可能是致命的。

关联伤害类型：精神

关联特征：精神

其他能力

如果你的元素是心智，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及会随元素而变化的元素化身专长中获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你可以纯粹以意念推动身体，尽管这种移动较为粗糙。只要你沿直线移动，疾步动作对你而言就是纯心智动作，这意味着即使你处于麻痹时也能采取它。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以轻微调整20尺内一个生物的心智状态。通常这只是细微的情绪变化，但它可能使该生物在社交场景中的一次技能检定更容易或更困难成功。

元素抗力你的心智对精神效果很有韧性，尤其是那些控制你的动作或情绪的效果。你对会导致被控制（状态）或具有情绪（特征）的精神效果进行的豁免检定获得+1环境加值，并且你获得等于你等级一半的精神伤害抗力。如果你拥有强化抗力专长，你对这些豁免检定的环境加值提高至+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以更显著地影响一个生物的心智状态。这让你能将信息迅速传入对方心智，产生类似心灵联结的效果，或帮助一个生物冷静下来，使其恐惧值降低1。在GM裁定下，你或许还能对生物的心智状态进行其他类似的调整。

元素感官你可以侦测附近其他生物的思绪。你获得思绪感知，作为30尺范围内的模糊感官。

元素护盾该护盾也会给予意志豁免+1环境加值。

元素涌动所选生物将昏聩1，持续至你下个回合结束，除非其成功通过一次对抗你力量DC的意志豁免。

强化机动你的纯心智移动尤其精细。你可以仅用意念正常进行疾步与挪步，并且如果你拥有其他速度，你也能用意念来进行相应的移动动作，即使你通常需要拍动翅膀才能飞行或摆动鳍肢才能游泳。

The element of mind encompasses the elemental nature of mental essence, the foundation of the Astral Plane, the Dreamlands, and other mental realms. Thus, it focuses on powers that assault, bewilder, or overwhelm the minds of others.

Lethal Trauma: Your mind powers are capable of causing enough psychic trauma to kill. When you use a mind power that deals mental damage, you can choose whether or not to give the power the nonlethal trait. If you don't, the power is potentially lethal.

Associated Damage Type: Mental

Associated Traits: Mental

Other Abilities

If your element is mind, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You can propel your body purely with your mind, though the movement is coarse. As long as you move in a straight line, the Stride action is a purely mental action for you, which means you can take it while paralyzed.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can slightly adjust the mental state of a creature within 20 feet. Normally this is a minor mood alteration, but it could potentially make it slightly easier or harder to succeed at a skill check in a social situation.

Elemental Resistance Your mind is resilient to mental effects, especially those that control your actions or emotions. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against mental effects that cause the controlled condition or have the emotion trait, and you gain resistance equal to half your level against mental damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus on saving throws increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can more significantly affect the mental state of a creature. This allows you to communicate information into their mind rapidly, with an effect similar to mindlink or to help a creature calm down, decreasing their frightened value by 1. At the GM's discretion, you might be able to perform other similar adjustments to a creature's mental state.

Elemental Senses You can detect nearby thoughts from other creatures. You gain thoughtsense as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet.

Elemental Shield The shield also grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves.

Elemental Surge The chosen creature is stupefied 1 until the end of your next turn unless they succeed at a Will save against your power DC.

Enhanced Locomotion Your purely mental motion is especially refined. You can Stride and Step normally using only your mind, and if you have other Speeds, you can use the associated move actions with your mind as well, even if you would normally need to flap your wings to Fly or move your fins to Swim.

Water.name: 水 Water
Water.text:
水元素体现了水流奔涌与恒常变化，以及潮汐的涨落起伏。正如水以循环的方式存在，作为水的使用者，只要你学会最大化利用变化的潮汐，你就能掌控战场。

水流牵引：盟友若在你的水能力的区域内（或你选择以其为目标），不会因你的水能力而受到伤害；并且他们可以从该能力的成功度中任选一种，并让该能力将他们移动相应的距离。例如，若你的能力在大成功或大失败时不会移动生物，在成功时将其推开10尺，在失败时推开20尺，在大失败时推开40尺，那么你的盟友可以选择留在原地，或被推开10、20或40尺（不过奔涌之水过于迅疾，无法精确控制，因此他们不能选择介于其间的其他距离）。

潮汐变换：每当你投掷先攻、在一次遭遇中刷新你的能力，或（若你是水艾达蒙）相位进入时，选择高潮或低潮。这是你的初始潮汐。每当你使用一个水能力，你先获得你当前潮汐的效果，然后切换到另一种潮汐（高潮变为低潮，或低潮变为高潮）。以此方式，你会让你的能力在两种潮汐之间交替，直到你刷新并改为你偏好的任一潮汐。通常在遭遇之外你没有潮汐。

水下钝击者：钝击的水能力操控的是水本身，因此它们在水下不受减值影响，即便它们包含近战或远程攻击也是如此。

关联伤害类型：钝击

关联特征：水

水关键术语

在几乎每个水元素能力中，你都会看到以下术语中的一个或两个。通常，水能力会依据你使用它时处于高潮还是低潮而产生特殊效果。

高潮：在高潮时，你的能力会无所顾忌地向外推涌，蓄势冲破海岸。任何时候，当一个水能力说它会“移动”一个敌人时，若你处于高潮，除非另有说明，你将把该敌人直接推离你。高潮能力往往造成额外伤害，但它们通常也会带来某种防御上的缺陷。

低潮：在低潮时，你的能力会保护性地回涌向你。任何时候，当一个水能力说它会“移动”一个敌人时，若你处于低潮，除非另有说明，你将把该敌人直接拉向你。低潮能力往往把敌人拉向你，且其伤害低于高潮，但它们通常也会带来某种防御上的益处。

主动能力

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.5biC5NmevUpOyCnq]{Aqua Punch}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.D8om4SLybAGlsRId]{Sea Spray}

3级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.I3xxz8AgusHqpuFa]{Hydro Bullet}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.NdyBHUrh9vTd4OWH]{Ocean Torrent}

5级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KkjKKumvnvXOb3Wu]{Storm Surge}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.NuwtcRMcXBMXQdgU]{Unrelenting Jet}

7级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.WKYZIUmD4B98lOHC]{Bubble Burst}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.cgsVtRG4HBRFvIZN]{Flowing River}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.XEqGRoYsa0v3f7aU]{Aqueous Embrace}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.PjezJ9Zbq52X1j7a]{Rushing Current}

11级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.zAt8LP3MhItAcTAl]{Relentless Drench}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.4nD9k8Fyie35N7XU]{Water Curtain}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.zxau92pnCfrsqJKz]{Cloudburst}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.i2yr9FEdTSGoYzyY]{Immortal Water Dragon}

15级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.8CwkctnoUIT39hJH]{Water Gaol}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.hNulcHDr21dx3WWV]{Tsunami}

19级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.7kuqijyrWkOSi9yd]{Leviathan}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.gXGcDna7NDYd6vca]{Charybdis}

反应能力

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KrY7cjpruKR4t5x8]{Retributive Wave}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.f6A1QYMfE7stBfuR]{Liquefy Air}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.GG0wWrHZsxXXJbWv]{Interrupting Torrent}

刷新能力

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.TFTs5xSe6Ec3wCbc]{Bubble Swarm}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.GK4pT5OFmZPjHbqX]{Water Barrier}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.6SrqJSAcFuGyQPH3]{Hidden in the Mist}

其他能力

若你的元素为水，你将从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及按元素变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动你获得等同于你陆地速度的游泳速度（或若你是通常没有陆地速度的水生生物，则反之），并且可以在水下呼吸（或若你是水生生物，则可以呼吸空气）。若你处于高潮，你的游泳速度获得+10尺状态加值；若你处于低潮，你对抗由你游泳移动所触发之反应时，你的AC获得+1环境加值。

元素操控当你使用元素操控时，你可以以细微方式控制你周遭的水，使你能够移动与过滤少量的水、在潮湿区域将空气中的水汽凝结成水、蒸发少量的水，并执行其他类似动作，由GM决定。

元素抗性你的身体受水保护，也受水所庇护。你对抗水效果的豁免检定获得+1环境加值，并且对水伤害获得等同于你等级一半的抗性。若你拥有“强化抗性”专长，你对抗水效果的豁免检定之环境加值提升为+2。

元素塑形师当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你可以塑形水，使你能够移动大量的水（最多40负载），其位置可在你20尺内，且其占据的空间不大于一个10尺×10尺×10尺、并可移动至最多20尺。你也可以将水的形态塑造成奇巧的造型；但若水没有容器承装，在你停止塑形后不久它就会飞溅成一滩水。

元素感官你会察觉你周遭水中的震颤。你获得波感作为一种不精确感官，范围60尺。

元素护盾该护盾在持续期间也给予你等同于你等级一半的强酸与火焰抗性。对水艾达蒙而言，其火焰抗性会与他们的基础抗性累加。

元素涌动你可以将所选生物推开（若你处于高潮）或拉近（若你处于低潮）10尺，除非其在对抗你的能力DC的强韧豁免中成功。由于元素涌动动作并非能力，使用它不会改变你的潮汐。

强化机动通过感召你周身的水之潮汐，你可以在陆地与空中游泳。你可以用你的游泳速度在陆地上游泳并游向空中。你如此做时，你会唤起一股个人浪潮承载你前行。若你位于无法承受你重量的位置（例如半空中），则若你在你的回合中未至少游泳一次，你会在回合结束时坠落。

The element of water embodies the rush and constant change of currents and the ebb and flow of the tides. Just as water exists in a cycle, as a water user, if you learn to make the most of the changing tides, you can take control of the battlefield.

Current's Pull: Allies don't take damage from your water powers if they're in the area (or if you choose to target them), and they can choose any of the degrees of success from the power and allow the power to move them the appropriate distance. For instance, if you power doesn't move a creature on a critical success, pushes them 10 feet on a success, pushes them 20 feet on a failure, and pushes them 40 feet on a critical failure, your ally can choose to stay where they are or to be pushed 10, 20, or 40 feet (though the rushing water is too rapid for precise control, so they can't choose any distances in between).

Shifting Tides: Whenever you roll initiative, Refresh your powers in an encounter, or phase in if you're a water eldamon, choose high or low tide. This is your initial tide. Whenever you use a water power, you gain the effect of your current tide, then switch to the other tide (high tide becomes low tide, or low tide becomes high tide). In this way, you alternate your powers between the tides, until you refresh and change to whichever tide you prefer. You normally do not have a tide outside an encounter.

Underwater Bludgeoner: Bludgeoning water powers manipulate the water itself, so they don't take penalties underwater, even if they involve melee or ranged attacks.

Associated Damage Type: Bludgeoning

Associated Traits: Water

Water Key Terms

You'll see one or both of the following terms in almost every water elemental power. Typically, a water power has a special effect depending on if you are at high or low tide when you use it.

High Tide: At high tide, your powers push heedlessly outward, ready to break the shore. Any time a water power says it "moves" an enemy, if you're in high tide, you push the enemy directly away from you unless stated otherwise. High tide powers tend to deal additional damage, but they often come with a defensive drawback of some kind.

Low Tide: At low tide, your powers ebb back protectively toward you. Any time a water power says it "moves" an enemy, if you're in low tide, you pull the enemy directly toward you unless stated otherwise. Low tide powers tend to pull enemies toward you, and their damage is lower than at high tide, but they often come with a defensive benefit of some kind.

Active Powers

1st Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.D8om4SLybAGlsRId]{Sea Spray}

9th Level

11th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.4nD9k8Fyie35N7XU]{Water Curtain}

13th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.i2yr9FEdTSGoYzyY]{Immortal Water Dragon}

15th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.8CwkctnoUIT39hJH]{Water Gaol}

17th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.hNulcHDr21dx3WWV]{Tsunami}

19th Level

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.7kuqijyrWkOSi9yd]{Leviathan}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.gXGcDna7NDYd6vca]{Charybdis}

Reactive Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.KrY7cjpruKR4t5x8]{Retributive Wave}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.f6A1QYMfE7stBfuR]{Liquefy Air}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.GG0wWrHZsxXXJbWv]{Interrupting Torrent}

Refresh Powers

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.TFTs5xSe6Ec3wCbc]{Bubble Swarm}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.GK4pT5OFmZPjHbqX]{Water Barrier}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.6SrqJSAcFuGyQPH3]{Hidden in the Mist}

Other Abilities

If your element is water, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion You gain a swim Speed equal to your land Speed (or vice versa if you're an aquatic creature that normally doesn't have a land Speed) and can breathe underwater (or breathe air if you're an aquatic creature). If you're in high tide, you gain a +10-foot status bonus to your swim Speed, and if you're in low tide, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC against reactions triggered by your movement while swimming.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control water around you in minor ways, allowing you to move and filter small amounts of water, condense moisture in the air in a humid area into water, evaporate small amounts of water, and perform other similar actions as determined by the GM.

Elemental Resistance Your body is protected from and by water. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against water effects and gain resistance equal to half your level against water damage. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, your circumstance bonus on saving throws against water effects increases to +2.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt water, allowing you to move substantial amounts of water (up to 40 Bulk) located up to 20 feet away and taking up no larger than a 10-foot by 10-foot by 10-foot space up to 20 feet. You can also sculpt the water's form into fanciful shapes, though if the water doesn't have a container, it will splash into a puddle soon after you stop sculpting it.

Elemental Senses You notice tremors in the water around you. You gain wavesense as an imprecise sense out to 60 feet.

Elemental Shield The shield also gives you resistance to acid and fire equal to half your level while it lasts. For water eldamon, the resistance to fire is cumulative with their base resistance.

Elemental Surge You can push (if you're in high tide) or pull (if you're in low tide) the chosen creature 10 feet unless they succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC. Since the Elemental Surge action isn't a power, using it doesn't shift your tide.

Enhanced Locomotion By calling forth tides of water around you, you can swim on land and in the air. You can use your swim Speed to Swim on land and into the air. When you do, you call a personal wave of water that carries you along as you Swim. If you're in a location that can't hold your weight, such as in midair, you fall at the end of your turn if you don't Swim at least once during your turn.

Wood.name: 木材 Wood
Wood.text:
木元素体现了自然生长，遍布整个植物界。因此，它专注于会生长的力量：通过在战场上播种植物来逐步累积，并在之后收获这些植物以获得更强的效果。木元素的使用者学会遵循自然的生长循环，并在播种与收获之间取得平衡，以实现最大效果。

关联伤害类型：穿刺

关联特性：植物，木（特征）

木关键术语

你几乎会在每个木元素力量中看到下列一个或两个术语。通常，一个木系力量会让你选择播种或收获。

播种：当你选择播种时，你会使临时的叶丛或其他植物在该力量列明的位置萌发；若未列明，则默认在该力量的区域内萌发。你将植物播种在地面上。带有这些植物的区域始终为困难地形，并且可能会因该力量而具有不同的效果；这些植物会持续存在，直到你收获它们、它们被摧毁，或你进行刷新（以先发生者为准）。区域效果的火或冰伤害会摧毁该区域内你播种的植物。你可以在本来就自然生长着植物的区域播种；但如果你在已经播种过植物的区域再次播种，则不会产生额外效果；如果重叠区域中的一处或两处播种效果会因该力量而产生额外效果，你可以选择在重叠区域保留其中一种效果，但不能同时保留两种。

收获：你只能在你已经播种过植物的区域，或在具有足够茂密的自然植被、能够造成困难地形的区域选择收获；否则，你必须用你的力量选择播种。你不能使用其他生物的法术或能力所播种的植物。若你收获由你的木系力量播种的植物，它们会消失；若你从自然植被中收获，植被仍会保留，但你在24小时内不能再次从中收获，因为植物的元素木能量需要补充。通常，当你为某个力量进行收获时，该力量会因收获而给予你一个特殊好处；但有些力量会注明：你用它们播种的植物在被收获时会有额外好处。在这种情况下，当你收获该植物时，你会同时获得两种好处。

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.CLWqXMB77sTnz9oG]{Reaping Refresh}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.7ch6tlLh447duFA8]{Enduring Verdure}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.1flhVgxmMDfFLV8t]{Refreshing Field}

其他能力

如果你的元素为木，你会从元素涌动动作、元素护盾动作，以及随元素而变化的元素化身专长中，获得以下能力与效果。

元素机动 植物会为你让路，使你能轻松穿行其间。你无视由植物与真菌（如灌木、藤蔓与林下灌丛）造成的任何困难地形或更高等级的困难地形。即使是被魔法操控的植物与真菌也不会阻碍你的前进。

元素操控 当你使用元素操控时，你可以以细微的方式控制你周围的非生物植物，使你能够帮助它们健康生长、让花苞或花朵绽放、使植物枯萎等等。由GM酌情决定，你也可以进行其他类似的小幅调整。

元素抗力 植物在对付你时会手下留情。你获得等于你等级一半的抗力，用于抵抗来自植物生物，以及具有植物或木（特征）特征的效果所造成的伤害。如果你拥有“强化抗力”专长，那么智力为–4或–5的植物生物通常不会攻击你，除非被另一名生物强迫如此。

元素塑形师 当你使用元素塑形师专长时，你对植物的塑形与位置控制将比元素操控更进一步。这使你能够用区域内的植物创造粗略的形状与特性；一次大致塑造一个10英尺×10英尺的方形区域，且该区域需位于你20英尺内，随着时间推移有可能形成更大型的雕塑；此外，你还可以移动那些提供困难地形或掩蔽的植物以清出道路或制造阻碍，其中也包括你用木系力量播种的植物。由GM酌情决定，你也可以对植物进行其他类似的调整。

元素感官 你获得绿视，使你可以透过活的植物（但不能透过木制墙壁、门等）视物，如同它们是半透明的一般，从而看见另一侧的情况。

元素护盾 如果在你的空间内有一株你可以收获的植物（若你是大型或更大型，则为你的任一空间），当一名敌人攻击你且其将恰好命中你的AC时，你可以以自由动作（）收获你空间内的所有植物，从而将你对AC的环境加值提高至2；若你是持握元素护盾的元素化身，则提高至3。提高后的环境加值会在你判定触发攻击结果时应用于你的AC，这通常会使该攻击失手。

元素涌动 你在5英尺散发或30英尺内一个5英尺爆发中进行播种。

强化机动 当你用你的力量创造植物时，你可以将自己变形为木元素能量并在它们之间转移。以一个具有移动特性的单动作，你可以短暂转化为木能量，然后在你用力量播种过植物的一个空间内，或其相邻空间中再现；无论哪种方式，该空间都必须在60英尺内。你仍然需要对该植物具有效果线，并且你必须能够以一种精确感官侦测到该植物，但你不需要穿过其间的方格，从而可以避开障碍与有害地形，并且这次移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作。

The element of wood embodies natural growth, as seen all across the plant kingdom. Thus, it focuses on powers that grow, building up by sowing plants across the battlefield in order to harvest the plants later for a greater effect. Wood users learn to follow the natural cycle of growth and balance their sowing and harvesting for maximum effect.

Associated Damage Type: Piercing

Associated Traits: Plant, Wood

Wood Key Terms

You’ll see one or both of the following terms in almost every wood elemental power. Typically, a wood power gives you the choice to sow or harvest.

Sow: When you choose to sow, you cause temporary foliage or other plants to sprout either in a location listed in the power, or in the power's area by default. You sow plants on the ground. Areas with these plants are always difficult terrain and might have different effects depending on the power, and the plants last either until you harvest them, until they are destroyed, or until you refresh, whichever comes first. Area of effect fire or ice damage destroys the plants you sowed in the area. You can sow plants in an area that already naturally has plants, but if you sow plants in an area that you already sowed plants, there's no additional effect; if one or both of the sowed plants had an additional effect depending on the power, you can choose one of the effects to keep in the overlapping area, but not both.

Harvest: You can only choose to harvest either in an area you've already sown plants or in an area that has thick enough natural vegetation to cause difficult terrain; otherwise, you must choose to sow with your power. You can't use plants sown by other creature's spells or abilities. If you harvest plants sown from your wood powers, they vanish, and if you harvest from natural vegetation, the vegetation remains, but you can't harvest from it again for 24 hours, as the plant's elemental wood energy replenishes. Normally, when you harvest for a power, that power grants you a special benefit for harvesting, but some powers indicate that the plants you sow with them have an additional benefit when harvested. In that case, you gain both benefits when harvesting that plant.

Other Abilities

If your element is wood, you gain the following abilities and effects from the Elemental Surge action, the Elemental Shield action, and the elemental avatar feats that vary by element.

Elemental Locomotion The plants get out of your way, allowing you to move through them with ease. You ignore any difficult or greater difficult terrain caused by plants and fungi, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth. Even plants and fungi manipulated by magic don't impede your progress.

Elemental Manipulation When you use Elemental Manipulation, you can control non-creature plants around you in minor ways, allowing you to help them grow healthily, cause buds or flowers to open, make the plant wilt, and so on. At your GM's discretion, you can make other similar small adjustments.

Elemental Resistance Plants pull their punches against you. You gain resistance equal to half your level to damage from plant creatures and effects with the plant or wood traits. If you have the Enhanced Resistance feat, plant creatures with an Intelligence of –4 or –5 normally won't attack you unless compelled to do so by another creature.

Elemental Sculptor When you use the Elemental Sculptor feat, you can sculpt and control the position of plants to a greater extent than Elemental Manipulation. This allows you to create rough shapes and features out of plants in the area, roughly one 10-foot by 10-foot square at a time within 20 feet, potentially allowing for a larger sculpture over time, and also allows you to move around plants providing difficult terrain or cover to clear a path or create obstructions, including plants you sow with your wood powers. At the GM's discretion, you can make other similar adjustments to plants.

Elemental Senses You gain greensight, which allows you to see through living plants (though not wooden walls, doors, and the like) as if they were semi-transparent, allowing you to view what's on the other side.

Elemental Shield If there's a plant you can harvest in your space (or one of your spaces if you are Large or Larger), you can harvest all plants in your space as a free action when a foe attacks you and would hit your AC exactly, to increase the circumstance bonus to AC to 2, or 3 if you are an elemental avatar holding the elemental shield. The increased circumstance bonus applies to your AC when you're determining the outcome of the triggering attack, which normally makes the attack miss.

Elemental Surge You sow in either a 5-foot emanation or a 5-foot burst within 30 feet.

Enhanced Locomotion When you create plants using your powers, you can transform yourself into wood elemental energy to transport between them. As a single action, which has the move trait, you can briefly transition into wood energy and then reappear in a space where you sowed a plant with your power, or an adjacent space; either way, the space must be within 60 feet. You still need line of effect to the plant and you must be able to detect the plant with a precise sense, but you don't need to cross the intervening squares, allowing you to avoid obstacles and hazardous terrain, and this movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Universal.name: 通用 Universal
Universal.text:
通用力量是存在于所有元素中的力量；因此，任何艾达兽或元素化身都可以选择它们。虽然在追求某个元素的协同效应方面，它们通常不如来自该元素的力量有效，但通用力量有时能提供恰到好处的工具，用于在特定目的下补全一套力量组合。通用力量没有关联的伤害类型或特征。相反，除非另有说明，它们总是造成其使用者元素的关联伤害类型的伤害，并获得其使用者元素的关联特征，且视为使用者元素的力量。

例如，由于@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Lp5PLsGqdfRcekMM]{Tairopoof}是一只气（特征）艾达兽，它的通用力量会是气（特征）力量，并获得气（特征）特征且造成挥砍伤害。因为生命力量造成活力伤害，能伤害的生物很少，因此大多数通用的伤害性力量（除了像元素火箭那样自定义其伤害类型的力量以外）往往不是它们的好选择，除非它们特别打算猎杀不死生物。

元素弱点

两种通用的反应力量与刷新力量取决于哪些元素对你的元素是弱点。以下列出每个元素所克制的特征清单，包含本书的13种元素以及另外七种元素。因此例如，如果tairopoof使用反制元素，它就可以用反制元素反制带有身体、大地、植物或木（特征）特征的效果。

空气：身体、大地、植物、木（特征）

身体：黑暗、冰、暗影

黑暗：光、精神、灵体、时代、活力

死亡：酸、力场、毒素、活力

大地：电、火、冰、传送

电：空气、金属、水

火：冰、金属、植物、木（特征）

力场：灵体 冰：空气、音波、植物、木（特征）

生命：无

光：黑暗、死亡、力场、暗影、传送

金属：空气、冰、音波、传送

心智：身体、电、光、传送

音乐：黑暗、大地、光、精神、金属、暗影

毒素：身体、植物、音波、木（特征）

空间：空气、电、音波、灵体、时代

灵体：死亡、精神

时代：身体、精神、音波、传送

水：火、大地

木（特征）：大地、时代、水

主动力量

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.1cCQqSj2pq44lApT]{元素射击}

3级

5级

7级

9级

11级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.dSjENEn1jeFhZHV0]{元素控制}

13级

15级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.xWGK3WPpPtb6XRu8]{元素狂潮}

17级

反应力量

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.qtezlXMdqDY4rvPL]{反制元素}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.fKZMkWyaESwsxfSm]{元素至高}

刷新力量

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.Z7c2kjGYOivpaG3L]{吸收元素}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.powers.Item.HPt5pf8rZQR37voI]{灌注地面}

通用是一种元素吗？

在一个学者们几乎对任何事都难以达成一致的世界里，有一条关于艾达兽的事实毫无争议：通用不是一种元素。学者们花了许多年才首先发现通用力量的存在。起初，当他们研究正在使用如今被视为通用力量的艾达兽时，他们认为这些不过是每个元素各自一系列相对相似的元素力量，例如拥抱力量或帷幕力量。然而，随着时间推移，研究者能够判定：与帷幕与拥抱力量不同，这些通用力量除了基础元素与伤害类型之外没有任何变体。因此，他们将这些力量归类为通用；尽管当艾达兽使用它们时，它们会获得该艾达兽的元素。

Universal powers are powers that exist for all elements; thus, any eldamon or elemental avatar can choose them. While they often aren't as effective in pursuing an element's synergies as powers from the element, universal powers sometimes offer just the right tool to round out a power set for a specific purpose. Universal powers don't have an associated damage type or traits. Instead, they always deal damage of the associated damage type of their user's element unless stated otherwise, and they gain the associated traits of their user's element and are powers of the user's element.

For instance, since @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Lp5PLsGqdfRcekMM]{Tairopoof} is an air eldamon, their universal powers would be air powers, and they would gain the air trait and deal slashing damage. Because life powers deal vitality damage, there are few creatures they can harm, and thus most universal damaging powers (other than those like Elemental Rocket that define their own damage type) don't tend to be good choices for them unless they are specifically planning on hunting undead.

Elemental Weaknesses

Two of the universal reactive and refresh powers depend on the elements that are weak to your element. The following are the list of traits that are weak to each element, including the 13 elements from this book and the seven other elements. So for instance, if tairopoof used counter element, they could counter effects with the body, earth, plant, or wood trait with Counter Element.

Air: Body, Earth, Plant, Wood

Body: Darkness, Ice, Shadow

Darkness: Light, Mental, Spirit, Time, Vitality

Death: Acid, Force, Poison, Vitality

Earth: Electricity, Fire, Ice, Teleportation

Electricity: Air, Metal, Water

Fire: Ice, Metal, Plant, Wood

Force: Spirit Ice: Air, Sonic, Plant, Wood

Life: None

Light: Darkness, Death, Force, Shadow, Teleportation

Metal: Air, Ice, Sonic, Teleportation

Mind: Body, Electricity, Light, Teleportation

Music: Darkness, Earth, Light, Mental, Metal, Shadow

Poison: Body, Plant, Sonic, Wood

Space: Air, Electricity, Sonic, Spirit, Time

Spirit: Death, Mental

Time: Body, Mental, Sonic, Teleportation

Water: Fire, Earth

Wood: Earth, Time, Water

3rd Level

5th Level

Is Universal an Element?

In a world where scholars can barely agree on anything, there's one eldamon fact that isn't a controversy: universal isn't an element. It took scholars many years to discover the existence of universal powers in the first place. At first, when they studied eldamon who were using what are now considered to be universal powers, they believed that these were simply a series of relatively similar elemental powers from each element, like the embrace powers or the curtain powers. However, over time, researchers were able to determine that, unlike curtain and embrace powers, these universal powers had no variations other than the base element and damage type. Thus, they came to classify the powers as universal, even though when an eldamon uses them, they gain that eldamon's element.

Chapter 4: Eldamon Entries.name: 第4章：艾尔达蒙条目 Chapter 4: Eldamon Entries

Eldamon Mechanics.name: 艾达蒙机制 Eldamon Mechanics
Eldamon Mechanics.text:
As living metaphysical embodiments of the elements, eldamon exist out of phase with mortal existence, meaning that they ordinarily interact mainly among themselves, exploring, relaxing, engaging in mock battles, and otherwise participating in whatever activities they prefer.

Hey You, Eldamon!

Although different than "traditional" creatures, eldamon still have the same statistics as other creatures. While eldamon typically use them only among themselves, eldamon trainers can share their phase with eldamon, making an eldamon's statistics crucial for the trainer's adventuring career. This means that there is no need to generate these statistics for every eldamon a character or group befriends if the character isn't an eldamon trainer and has no intention in engaging in mock battles with other eldamon.

An eldamon always has the eldamon trait, and they sometimes have a trait associated with their element as well, when such a trait exists. Ordinarily, out of phase eldamon follow their friends around, acting at their own whims. Whether or not an eldamon's friend is an eldamon trainer, they can expect their eldamon confidant to accompany them and engage in conversation, but not necessarily to assist in matters of adventuring import. Ordinarily, eldamon do what they want, when they want. One of the first things that mortals find odd about eldamon is the way eldamon see the world, time, history, and memories. Due to their broader lens of viewing the universe, eldamon are typically incapable of succeeding at Recall Knowledge checks when called for in an adventure, and they are more or less useless for scouting ahead, even though their phased-out status means they could otherwise do so safely. That doesn't mean eldamon can't remember anything—for instance chillots love collecting and inventing ghost stories—but it does mean that when you need a pertinent fact right away, an eldamon is not a good way to find that information. In some circumstances, it might be possible to tease out factual information from an eldamon's perspective, as determined by the GM, but this normally takes a long time and is best represented by the use of the Gather Information activity to gather information from the eldamon in question. An eldamon phased fully into reality by an eldamon trainer works fully in tandem with their eldamon trainer, and as a result is typically controlled by the eldamon trainer's player, but the limitation involving Recall Knowledge still applies even then.

Eldamon and Items

While they share some of the item bonuses with their mortal friend, eldamon can't wear or invest items, and they can't hold or use most items themselves. They don't have hands capable of taking intricate manipulate actions, though eldamon that become trained in Thievery can use Thievery actions. However, while they're phased in, they're capable of consuming potions and other potable or edible consumables if another creature helps feed them.

Attribute Modifiers

Eldamon all have Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma modifiers, but those modifiers vary from eldamon to eldamon. Each individual eldamon's entry indicates that eldamon's attribute modifiers. The eldamon trainer class features advanced training, eldamon evolution, and apex training can all increase an eldamon's attribute modifiers. Lastly, all eldamon increase their highest attribute modifier by +1 at level 17, regardless of whether they are friends with an eldamon trainer. For ease of use, eldamon entries include the attribute modifier progression for all three class features and the level 17 increase.

Languages

Eldamon know different languages depending on the results of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.fzdlhXowQw4lk7dk.JournalEntryPage.RngqBuznz59bSVJd]{Table 5: Eldamon Age and Background} (or based on a default determined for your campaign, if you choose to use a single default rather than rolling). Depending on the table result or campaign choices, an eldamon either doesn't speak any languages, speaks only the listed eldamon language, speaks the listed language and another eldamon language, speaks the listed language and the most common language in the region (typically Common), or speaks the listed language and an ancient language. Regardless of the result, eldamon have a strong instinctive understanding with their mortal friends, allowing the mortal friend's player to control phased-in eldamon in most situations. Unless you've decided to run a campaign where eldamon can't ever speak, very young eldamon who don't speak any languages typically learn their listed eldamon language or possibly another language their mortal friend speaks after adventuring with their mortal friend for several adventures.

Level

Eldamon of various levels exist in the world, but they typically don't form effective bonds of friendship with creatures of lower level. Even if a high-level eldamon became friends with a lower-level eldamon trainer, it's impossible to transfer phase to an eldamon of higher level than the eldamon trainer. Eldamon trainers continually train their eldamon and push them to be their best selves, which causes their eldamon to always level up alongside the eldamon trainer. Others with eldamon friends don't necessarily need to train their eldamon so aggressively, and so whether their eldamon level up with them could be determined on a case by case basis. If they participate in eldamon battles with increasingly difficult opponents, then it makes sense to scale them accordingly. However, if they rarely do so, consider avoiding eldamon levelups (or avoiding statistics entirely) to reduce bookkeeping.

Some eldamon have a minimum level other than 1st level. If so, this is listed in their eldamon entry.

Proficiencies

Eldamon gain various proficiencies depending on their level, as summarized in the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.fzdlhXowQw4lk7dk.JournalEntryPage.t77pGya4FGwI7ndG]{Eldamon Advancement Table} . Additionally, an eldamon with a mortal friend (whether or not they're an eldamon trainer) can add the item bonus to attack rolls from their friend's handwraps of mighty blows to their attack rolls with elemental powers and Strikes, though striking runes benefit the eldamon only on Strikes, and property runes have no effect. Their friend can choose to invest a weapon in order to share the weapon's runes instead, even though weapons normally aren't invested. Additionally, the friend shares their item bonus to Perception and skill checks from invested items with the eldamon, and can invest any item with such a bonus to share it even if it's ordinarily not an invested item.

With their initial proficiencies at 1st level, eldamon are experts in one saving throw (listed in the eldamon's entry as their "eldamon save") and trained in Perception and the other two saving throws. They're also trained in unarmed attacks, unarmored defense, power attack rolls, power DCs, and three skills (listed in the eldamon's entry as their "eldamon skills"). An eldamon proficient in Intimidation gains the benefits of the Intimidating Glare skill feat automatically.

At 5th level, eldamon become experts in power attack rolls and their eldamon skills.

At 7th level, eldamon become experts in power DCs.

At 9th level, eldamon become experts in Perception.

At 11th level, eldamon become masters in their eldamon save and eldamon skills and experts in their other saves and unarmed attacks.

At 13th level, eldamon become masters in power attack rolls and experts in unarmored defense, and they gain weapon specialization (granting 2 additional damage on Strikes with unarmed attacks).

At 15th level, eldamon become masters in power DCs.

At 19th level, eldamon become legendary in power DCs.

Armor Class

Eldamon have innate defenses from their elements that protect them from harm, akin to armor for mortals. This grants them a +2 item bonus to AC and a +3 Maximum Dexterity. Additionally, an eldamon with a mortal friend (whether or not they're an eldamon trainer) can share their friend's armor potency rune and resilient rune, granting them an increased item bonus to AC and an item bonus to saving throws. As for any other statistics, for anyone except an eldamon trainer, these bonuses are only relevant when engaging in mock battles with other eldamon.

Hit Points

Eldamon have Hit Points for their type (listed in each eldamon entry and generally consistent across eldamon of the same element), plus a number of Hit Points equal to 4 plus their Constitution modifier for each level they have. Eldamon aren't the same as mortal creatures, and they don't die, even when it seems like they would be killed.

An eldamon that reaches 0 Hit Points doesn't become unconscious or dying; instead they just phase out if they were phased in and become unresponsive to the physical world around them. If they were reduced to 0 Hit Points by an effect other than a death effect, they recover all their Hit Points after being phased out after the encounter for at least 1 minute. Even if they were reduced to 0 Hit Points by a death effect, an eldamon still doesn't die, but it does take longer for them to collect their energy. In that case, they remain unresponsive and out of phase for 1 hour. If an effect would ordinarily instantly kill or disintegrate an eldamon without dealing Hit Point damage, it instead reduces them to 0 Hit Points and they become unresponsive and out of phase for 1 hour.

Special Abilities

Eldamon entries have three special abilities, an elemental ability, a base ability, and an evolution ability. Eldamon start with their elemental and base abilities, but they only gain the evolution ability in their evolved form. Furthermore, eldamon transfer their elemental ability to elemental avatars who house them.

Powers

Eldamon know several elemental powers, magical abilities that allow them to command the elements (see @UUID[.mTfTV6uYjk89eZ1T#hey-you,-eldamon!]{Hey You, Eldamon!} for more details on elemental powers). Eldamon use powers to battle each other (or, with the help of an eldamon trainer, their foes). Once an eldamon uses a power, they normally can't use that power again until they use a refresh power (though that limit doesn't apply to refresh powers themselves). Powers have separate proficiencies for attacks and DCs, which aren't the same as spells, class DCs, or weapon or unarmed proficiencies. Eldamon with mortal friends can add the item bonus to attack rolls from handwraps of mighty blows to their attack rolls with elemental powers, though striking runes and property runes have no effect. Eldamon trainers can choose to invest in a weapon, even though it's a held item and normally isn't invested, to grant their eldamon friends the same benefit based on the weapon's potency rune. An eldamon's power DC and power attack modifier are based on their key attribute, Wisdom.

A 1st level eldamon knows one 1st level reactive power, one 1st level refresh power, and two 1st level active powers. They normally know the suggested starting powers listed in their eldamon entry, though some eldamon have other powers. All elemental powers an eldamon learns must be powers from their element, or universal powers. At 3rd level, 5th level, 7th level, 9th level, 11th level, 13th level, 15th level, and 17th level, an eldamon can learn one additional elemental power, which must be of their level or lower. If they do, they replace one of their current powers of the same kind (active, reactive, or refresh); typically eldamon use the power progression listed in their entry, but eldamon trainers can train their eldamon to learn different configurations of powers. At 19th level, an eldamon instead learns an ultimate power.

At 5th level, then again at 15th level, an eldamon learns one additional active power and doesn't need to replace one of their current powers, for a total of three active powers at 5th level and four active powers at 15th level.

Reading an Eldamon Entry

Eldamon have entries in the following format, which includes the information needed for the pet form, battle form, and evolved form in a single entry.

Pet Form Name, Battle Form Name, and Evolved Form Name

ELDAMON TRAITS

Element This is the eldamon's element.

Minimum Level This is the minimum level for the eldamon. If this entry isn't included, the minimum level is 1. Eldamon trainers can't phase in an eldamon of higher level than the trainer's level.

Size Most eldamon are Tiny in their pet form, Medium in their battle form, and Large in their evolved form, barring eldamon trainer feats to change their size. This entry is included if an eldamon has one or more forms with a different size

Attribute Modifiers These are the eldamon's starting attribute modifiers.

Eldamon Language This is the language most eldamon of this element speak, if they speak at least one language.

Eldamon Hit Points This is the eldamon's base Hit Points. They also gain a number of Hit Points equal to 4 Hit Points plus their Constitution modifier for each level they have.

Eldamon Skills These are the eldamon's favorite skills. They start as trained in these skills and improves them as they level up.

Eldamon Saving Throw This is the eldamon's strong saving throw. They starts as an expert in this saving throw and improve it faster than the others as they level up.

Resistances The eldamon has resistances to the listed damage types and traits equal to their level. The resistance is based on their element, so it will rarely vary between eldamon of the same element.

Weaknesses The eldamon has weaknesses to the listed damage types and traits equal to their level. The weakness is based on their element, so it will rarely vary between eldamon of the same element.

Senses These are the eldamon's special senses, if any. If this entry doesn't exist, the eldamon has no special senses.

Speed This is the eldamon's land Speed, as well as any other Speeds it has. Phased in eldamon used as mounts can't use any other Speeds unless their trainer has melded into them with melded phase, and the normal rules for riding a sapient non-minion creature apply. Flying eldamon usually have to land at the end of their movement when phased in (see the sidebar on page 160 for more information).

Melee 1 This is one of the eldamon's unarmed attacks listed with its name, traits, and damage.

Evolution Condition This is the second condition, other than training with an eldamon trainer with the eldamon evolution class feature, that is typically required for an eldamon to evolve. Sometimes eldamon evolve on their own or under other conditions. The listed condition is meant to encourage interactions and roleplay between eldamon and their mortal friends and to arise naturally through play if the player seeks to help the eldamon, not to be a significant impediment in the ability to evolve an eldamon. If the condition is too difficult to achieve in a given campaign, use an alternate condition instead.

Elemental Ability This is the eldamon's elemental ability. Not only does it gain this ability for itself, elemental avatars with this eldamon inhabiting them gain this ability as well.

Form Ability This is the eldamon's form ability. The eldamon gains this ability, which might apply only in battle and evolved forms, and elemental avatars don't gain this ability.

Evolution Ability This is the eldamon's evolution ability. The eldamon gains this ability only in its evolved form, and elemental avatars don't gain this ability.

Power Progression This is the list of powers the eldamon typically possesses at all odd levels. If a level is missing, that means the eldamon typically keeps the same powers from the previous odd level. When finding an eldamon in the wild, usually you can take the powers directly from this progression, though some unusual eldamon possess non-standard powers. However, when training an eldamon, an eldamon trainer or other friend might help the eldamon choose different powers when leveling up; this can be a personal or group decision depending on if the player is enthusiastic about making lots of choices, as it's simpler to use the power progression.

Attribute Modifier Progression For convenience, this lists the eldamon's attribute modifiers after gaining each of the various eldamon trainer class features that increase them. For characters with a different class than eldamon trainer, don't use this progression and instead stick with the original modifiers until level 17, at which point you increase the top attribute modifier by 1.

Tairopoof, Air Bat Eldamon.name: Tairopoof，空气蝙蝠艾尔达蒙 Tairopoof, Air Bat Eldamon
Tairopoof, Air Bat Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Lp5PLsGqdfRcekMM]{Tairopoof}

泰罗泡芙，通常被称为“空气蝙蝠艾达兽”，是空气艾达兽之中最常见的一类，在一个大风天里，你常常能看到它们在风中起舞。泰罗泡芙通常有点焦虑、害羞，并且对自己的外表感到不自在；它们珍视那些关心并支持它们的朋友，这些朋友能帮助它们成长并克服挣扎。当泰罗泡芙挣脱这些精神镣铐时，它们便能在天空中自由翱翔。

飞行的艾达兽

由于与其艾达兽训练师朋友之间的系绳，拥有飞行速度的相位显现艾达兽必须以降落到地面来结束其回合；如果它们不选择用正常移动来到地面，它们就会坠落，不过它们仍可如同普通会飞的生物那样正常进行阻止坠落。即使是通常具有幽影本质的灵体艾达兽，其回合结束时也会沿着地面漂浮。如果艾达兽训练师通过融合相位与艾达兽合体，该系绳便不会限制它们，它们也不需要以降落到地面来结束其回合。

泰罗泡芙、夜风翼与空翼龙蝠

AIR

ELDAMON

元素 空气

属性调整值 力量 +0，敏捷 +3，体质 +2，智力 +1，感知 +4，魅力 -1

艾达兽语言 苏苏兰语

艾达兽生命值 4

艾达兽技能 特技，隐匿，生存

艾达兽豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气，躯体，大地，植物，木材

弱点 寒冷，电击，金属，传送

速度 10英尺，飞行速度25英尺

近战 1 爪击（灵活，娴熟；仅在进化后触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4挥砍（仅在进化后为1d6挥砍）

近战 1 颌骨（娴熟，仅在进化后触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4穿刺（仅在进化后为1d6穿刺）

进化状态 帮助泰罗泡芙克服它对自身身体以及吓到他人的焦虑。

元素能力 风之速度 当你运用你的空气力量来移动时，空气能量会让你更迅捷。以空气力量移动时，你的各项速度获得+10英尺状态加值。如果你在力量DC上为专家，该状态加值提升为+20英尺；若为大师则为+30英尺；若为传奇则为+40英尺。

形态能力 空气之翼 你的翅膀完全由空气构成，使你在飞行中拥有显著高于多数其他生物的机动性。你在进行飞行机动与阻止坠落的特技检定时获得+2环境加值。

进化能力 空气解放 空气的解放之力让你能以不受束缚的机动性移动。向上飞行对你而言不属于困难地形，并且即使你没有通过融合相位与艾达兽训练师合体，你也不必以降落到地面来结束回合。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Lp5PLsGqdfRcekMM]{Tairopoof}

Tairopoofs, commonly known as "air bat eldamon," are the most common among air eldamon, and they can often be seen dancing among the winds on a blustery day. Usually a bit anxious, shy, and self-conscious about their appearance, tairopoofs appreciate caring and supportive friends who can help them grow and work through their struggles. When a tairopoof escapes these mental shackles, they soar freely across the sky.

Flying Eldamon

Due to their tether with their eldamon trainer friend, a phased in eldamon with a fly Speed must end its turn by descending to the ground; if they don't choose to move to the ground using their regular movement, they fall, though they can Arrest the Fall as normal for a flying creature. Even spirit eldamon, which are normally spectral in nature, end their turn floating along the ground. If the eldamon trainer is combined with the eldamon using Melded Phase, the tether doesn't restrict them, and they don't need to end their turn by descending to the ground.

Tairoproof, Nyctairis, and Airoptera

AIR

ELDAMON

Element Air

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Sussuran

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, body, earth, plant, wood

Weaknesses cold, electricity, metal, teleportation

Speed 10 feet, fly 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Melee 1 jaws (finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping tairopoof overcome their anxiety toward their body and scaring others.

Elemental Ability Wind Speed Air energy speeds you up when using your air powers to move. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speeds while moving with an air power. This increases to a +20-foot status bonus if you're an expert in power DC, a +30- foot status bonus if you're a master in power DC, and a +40-foot status bonus if you're legendary in power DC.

Form Ability Air Wings Your wings are formed entirely out of air, providing you significantly greater maneuverability in flight than most other creatures. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight and Arrest a Fall.

Evolution Ability Air Unleashed The unleashed power of air allows you to move with unrestricted mobility. Flying upward isn't difficult terrain to you, and you don't have to end the turn by descending to the ground, even if you aren't combined with an eldamon trainer using Melded Phase.

Larvapor, Air Moth Eldamon.name: 幼虫蒸汽，空气蛾灵兽 Larvapor, Air Moth Eldamon
Larvapor, Air Moth Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.qr5M7QKd5e2fL5YT]{Larvapor}

幼绒蛹并不常见，不是因为它们数量稀少，而是因为它们很难被找到。它们是恋家的家伙，满足于待在自己的茧里发白日梦。偶尔，一阵强劲的空气可能会把它们的家吹落；此时，茧会暂时膨胀成一团绒云，随风漂移，直到附着到新的地方。尽管它们与世隔绝——或许正因为如此——幼绒蛹很合群，能和来访者聊上好几个小时，不过它们对柔软蓬松物体的痴迷往往会让对话变得反复。

冰冷的残酷真相

许多艾达盟训练师低估了帮助幼绒蛹进化的难度。幼绒蛹想找到最柔软、最蓬松的物体，但现实很少能符合它们的想象。有些幼绒蛹梦想着云朵，可云摸起来几乎没什么感觉；还有些梦想着雪，可雪只是又冷又湿。有些只能用惨痛的方式学到教训——据说它们曾把灰泥墙误认为巨大的枕头而一头撞上去。曾有一只幼绒蛹请求它的训练师去偷一位老人的胡子，结果却因胡子又粗又扎而大失所望。尽管如此，幼绒蛹必须先体验失望，才能接受真正完美的触感。

幼绒蛹、浮绒蛾与吹绒蛾

非普通

速度 10英尺，飞行25英尺

近战 1 翼（灵巧、娴熟；仅在进化后触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4 挥砍（仅在进化后为1d6 挥砍）

进化状态 帮助幼绒蛹发现某种极其柔软且蓬松的东西。

元素能力 包覆之风 你呼唤空气的精粹来扩大你空气力量的区域。你可以选择让具有线形（区域）的空气力量将其长度最多增加10英尺（例如，将20英尺线形变为30英尺线形），并让具有锥形、爆发与弥漫（区域）的空气力量将其长度或半径增加5英尺（例如，将25英尺锥形变为30英尺锥形）。若你的力量DC为大师，这些提升为：线形长度增加20英尺；锥形、爆发与弥漫（区域）的长度或半径增加10英尺。

形态能力 空气触角 你的触角让你能够从远处嗅到事物。你获得嗅觉，作为一种不精确感官，范围至60英尺。与嗅觉的通常规则一致，此范围会根据气味来源是在上风处还是下风处而调整。

进化能力 丝绒蓬团 你用一团轻盈丝绒包裹自身，为你提供类似掩蔽的防护，以对抗远程攻击与造成伤害的区域效果。该蓬团使你在对抗远程攻击的AC上获得+1环境加值，并使你对造成伤害的效果进行的反射豁免获得+1环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.qr5M7QKd5e2fL5YT]{Larvapor}

Larvapors are uncommon, not because they are few in number but because they are difficult to find. They're homebodies who are content to hang in their cocoons and daydream. On occasion, a strong gust of air might dislodge their home, at which point the cocoon temporarily expands into a cloud of fluff that drifts until it attaches to somewhere new. Despite their isolation—or perhaps because of it—larvopors are social and can chat for hours with visitors, though their obsession with soft and fluffy objects results in repetitive conversations.

Cold Hard Truths

Many eldamon trainers underestimate the difficulty of helping a larvapor evolve. Larvapors want to find the softest, fluffiest objects, but reality rarely matches their imagination. Some dream of clouds, which don't feel like much at all, or snow, which is just cold and wet. Some have had to learn the hard way and have been known to crash into stucco walls because they mistook them for giant pillows. A larvapor once asked its trainer to steal an old man's beard, only to be disappointed by how rough and itchy it was. Nevertheless, larvapors must first experience disappointment before they can accept a truly perfect fit.

Larvapor, Levidop, and Blowbyx

Evolution Condition Helping larvapor discover something incredibly soft and fluffy.

Elemental Ability Enveloping Air You call upon the essence of air to increase the area of your air powers. You can choose for your air powers with a line area to increase their length by up to 10 feet (for instance, a 20-foot line to a 30-foot line), and your air powers with cone, burst, and emanation areas to increase their length or radius by 5 feet (for instance, a 25-foot cone to a 30-foot cone). If you're a master in power DC, these improve to 20 feet of length for lines and 10 feet of length or radius for cones, bursts, and emanations.

Form Ability Air Antennae Your antennae provide you the ability to smell things from a distance. You gain scent as an imprecise sense out to 60 feet. As normal for scent, this is adjusted based on if the source of the smell is upwind or downwind.

Evolution Ability Silken Puff You surround yourself in a puff of airy silk, providing you something akin to cover against ranged attacks and damaging area effects. The puff grants you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against ranged attacks and to Reflex saves against damaging effects.

Bubow, Kite Owl Eldamon.name: 布博，风筝猫头鹰埃达蒙 Bubow, Kite Owl Eldamon
Bubow, Kite Owl Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.jF3x4JfKYGRMfqF0]{Bubow}

布博经常被发现追逐彩虹——雨后风暴的大彩虹，以及瀑布或薄雾形成的小彩虹。它们对色彩的表面痴迷掩盖了对情绪的深刻共情，而它们所钟爱的色调正代表着这些情感。

手到擒来的一只鸟……

……是一只愤怒的鸟。与它们的名字相反，布博并不是用来像风筝一样放飞的。抓住它们虹彩般的尾巴并拽着它们奔跑，绝对会被啄上一口。事实上，布博对它们所有的缎带都相当敏感，训练师在未经允许的情况下不应接触它们。当一个生物与布博的缎带发生接触时，布博与该生物会体验到彼此的情绪。以这种方式分享感受，是只保留给布博最信任对象的亲密行为。

布博、奥图斯基与斯特莱风筝

非普通

空气

近战 1 喙击（finesse；仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 piercing（仅在进化时为 1d6 piercing）

进化状态 帮助布博发现一幅真正美丽的色彩画面，或观赏一道壮丽的彩虹。

元素能力 风之机动 当你移动时，空气从你身旁疾掠而过，只要你保持运动，你的敌人就更难伤到你。当你正在移动时，你处于隐蔽状态，并获得 AC +2 环境加值。这仅适用于你自身移动的过程中，而不适用于因他人的动作而移动的情况，例如乘坐载具或坐骑时。

形态能力 风筝尾 你彩虹色的风筝尾巴能够迷住敌人，迫使他们将注意力集中在你身上。你可以使用风筝尾巴进行表演（Perform），对 30 feet 内的一个生物的意志 DC 进行一次表演（Performance）检定。成功时，该生物对你着迷 1 轮；大成功或大失败时，持续 2 轮。

进化能力 防护之翼 与其他空气Eldamon相比，你巨大的翅膀尤为坚实。以一个单动作，你可以将翅膀挡在身前。直到你下个回合开始前，你获得 AC 与 Reflex 豁免 +1 环境加值；在相同持续时间内，你从风之机动获得的 AC 环境加值提高至 +4。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.jF3x4JfKYGRMfqF0]{Bubow}

Bubows are often found chasing rainbows—big ones after rainstorms as well as small ones from waterfalls or mist. Their superficial obsession with colors masks a deep empathy for emotions, which are what the hues they love represent.

A Bird in Hand…

...is an angry bird. Contrary to their name, bubows aren't meant to be flown like kites. Grabbing their iridescent tails and running with them is a surefire way to get pecked. In fact, bubows are quite sensitive about all their ribbons and trainers shouldn't touch them without permission. When a creature comes into contact with a bubow's ribbon, the bubow and the creature experience each other's emotions. Sharing feelings in this way is an intimacy reserved only for those whom bubows trust most.

Bubow, Otusky, and Strikite

Eldamon Language Sussuran

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, body, earth, plant, wood

Weaknesses cold, electricity, metal, teleportation

Speed 10 feet, fly 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Melee 1 beak (finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping bubow discover a truly beautiful tableau of colors or view a magnificent rainbow.

Elemental Ability Wind's Mobility Air rushes past you as you move, making it harder for your foes to harm you as long as you're in motion. While you're moving, you're concealed and gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC. This only applies when you're in the midst of your own movement, not when you're moving due to the actions of another, such as when riding a vehicle or a mount.

Form Ability Kite Tail Your rainbow-colored kite tail can fascinate foes, forcing them to focus their attention on you. You can use your kite tail to Perform, rolling a Performance check against the Will DC of a single creature within 30 feet. On a success, that creature is fascinated with you for 1 round, or for 2 rounds on a critical success.

Evolution Ability Protective Wings Your huge wings are especially solid compared to other air eldamon. As a single action, you can interpose your wings. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves until the beginning of your next turn, and you increase the circumstance bonus to AC from wind's mobility to +4 for the same duration.

Anairx, Paper Dragonfly Eldamon.name: 安奈尔克斯，纸蜻蜓埃尔达蒙 Anairx, Paper Dragonfly Eldamon
Anairx, Paper Dragonfly Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.EeIPb4BPpSUXHxxl]{Anairx}

Anairx 是书虫，但不是那种具有破坏性的——它们以图书管理员认可的方式“吞噬”书本与卷轴：阅读！就像紧紧藏在它们纸质身体中的空气能量一样，anairx 更可能沉浸在故事里，而不是自在飞翔。为了一个好故事——无论是书写的、口述的，甚至是亲身经历的——它们都愿意不惜一切。只要被说服踏上冒险，Anairx 就能成为训练师的优秀伙伴，甚至还会记录下他们一同的旅行！

如同一本打开的书

当 Anairx 专注于信息或对某个主题感受强烈时，可能会在无意识间把自己的想法以书面文字的形式显现在身体上。出现的文字通常很快消失，并随着它们思绪飞驰而被新的文字取代；但当 anairx 的真实想法在它们毫无察觉时变得清晰可读，这个特性可能会引发尴尬。另一方面，对于需要在解谜或记忆密码时获得协助的训练师来说，这些“笔记”也非常好用。

Anairx、Aeshnote 与 Aniscroll

稀有

空气

艾达兽

元素 空气

属性调整值 力量 +1，敏捷 +3，体质 +2，智力 +0，感知 +4，魅力 -1

艾达兽语言 苏苏兰语

艾达兽生命值 4

艾达兽技能 运动，特技，隐匿

艾达兽豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气，躯体，大地，植物，木质

弱点 寒冷，电击，金属，传送

速度 10 尺，飞行 25 尺

近战 1 足（灵巧，娴熟；仅在进化后触及 20 尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化后为 1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助 anairx 找到一个真正非凡、值得阅读的故事——一个在根本层面与它产生共鸣的故事。

元素能力 空气之触及 你以空气之翼将力量带到更远处。你具有射程（以一定尺数计）的空气力量，其射程额外延长 50%。这不会影响区域的体型，例如线或锥形的长度，但它确实允许你将具有射程的区域效果放置在离你更远的位置。

形态能力 纸张折叠 你可以折叠自身，以轻松穿过狭窄区域。你可以像体型小两级那样穿过狭窄空间（若你为中型或更小，则视为超小型生物；若你为大型，则视为小型生物；若你为巨型，则视为中型生物；若你为超巨型，则视为大型生物）。

进化能力 羊皮纸舒卷 你可以像羊皮纸一样卷起并展开身体，使你能轻松抓住多个物体或生物，并延长你的触及。通过展开并延伸自身，你的足之触及增加至 20 尺（已反映在其数据中）。此外，你的六片翅翼与主体每一处都可以各自握持一名你擒抱的中型或更小生物，但若你没有至少两片翅翼空闲，你便无法飞行。只要你至少有一片翅翼或你的身体处于空闲状态，你就可以用它们来抓住边缘。这不会让你同时擒抱超过一个生物，只是让你能抓住比正常更多的生物。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.EeIPb4BPpSUXHxxl]{Anairx}

Anairx are bookworms but not the destructive kind—they devour books and scrolls in a librarian-approved manner: by reading! Like the air energies tucked tight within their papery bodies, anairx are more likely to be bound up in a tale than flying free. They'll go any length for a good story, be it written, spoken, or even experienced. Anairx make excellent companions to trainers once convinced to embark on adventure and might even chronicle their travels together!

Like an Open Book

Anairx who are concentrating on information or feeling strongly about a subject might unconsciously manifest their thoughts as written text on their body. The words that appear typically vanish quickly, replaced by new text as their minds race, but this trait can lead to embarrassment when an anairx's honest opinion becomes legible without their awareness. On the other hand, such notes come in handy for trainers who need assistance when solving puzzles or remembering codes.

Anairx, Aeshnote, and Aniscroll

RARE

AIR

ELDAMON

Element Air

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Sussuran

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Acrobatics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, body, earth, plant, wood

Weaknesses cold, electricity, metal, teleportation

Speed 10 feet, fly 25 feet

Melee 1 foot (agile, finesse; reach 20 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping anairx find a truly remarkable story to read, a tale that resonates with them on a fundamental level.

Elemental Ability Air's Reach You carry your powers across greater distances with wings of air. Your air powers that have a range within a certain number of feet have their range extended by an additional 50%. This has no effect on the size of an area, such as the length of a line or cone, but it does allow you to place an area effect that has a range at a further distance from you.

Form Ability Paper Folding You can fold yourself in order to easily fit through narrow areas. You can fit through narrow spaces as if you were two sizes smaller (a Tiny creature if you're Medium or smaller, a Small creature if you're Large, a Medium creature if you're Huge, and a Large creature if you're Gargantuan).

Evolution Ability Parchment Furling You can furl and unfurl your body like parchment, allowing you to grab onto multiple objects or creatures with ease and extending your reach. By unfurling itself and extending, your foot's reach increases to 20 feet (already reflected in its statistics). Additionally, your six wings and your main body can each hold a Medium or smaller creature you Grapple, though if you don't have at least two wings free, you can't Fly. As long as you have at least one wing or your body free, you can use them to Grab an Edge. This doesn't allow you to Grapple more than a single creature at once, only to hold onto more creatures than normal.

Shadoppy, Shadow Opossum Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Ymt9FEga5R8U9CCl]{影噗}

影噗极其喜爱骨头，以至于它们会具现出自己的骨头来覆盖其阴影缭绕且大多无形的身体。当它们找到其他生物的骨头时，会把骨头藏在身体旋动的阴影之中，直到能把它们转移到住处附近的一处@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}藏匿点。它们只保留自然死亡的生物骨头，因此常聚集在墓地以及其他动物在生病或极度年老时前往的地点附近。

一块难啃的骨头

影噗相信暴死生物的骨头受到了诅咒。它们能通过嗅闻遗骸感知生物大致的死因。收集死于意外者的骨头，会让收集者更容易遭遇自己的意外。被背叛者的骨头会让收集者变得多疑。然而最受诅咒的骨头，是属于那些被吓死之人的；它们的收集者不知为何总会落得被老鼠啃咬致死的下场。

影噗、影负鼠与影狄尔菲斯

黑暗

艾达蒙

暗影

近战 1 爪击（灵活、灵巧，仅在进化后触及10尺）； 伤害 1d4 挥砍（仅在进化后为1d6 挥砍）

进化状态 通过完成其收藏或对骨头获得深刻理解，帮助影噗实现其对骨头的痴迷。

元素能力 笼罩的力量 当你被黑暗笼罩时，你的黑暗力量造成额外伤害。当你具有笼罩的状态时，你的黑暗力量造成的寒冷伤害获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家则提高至+3，若为大师则为+4，若为传奇则为+5。

形态能力 骨质披风 你被保护性的骨头覆盖，阻止最糟糕的情况发生。你的保护性骨质披风使你对大成功或大失败的攻击造成的伤害获得等同于你等级一半（最低1）的抗力。此抗力不能将一次大成功或大失败命中的伤害降低到低于一次普通命中的伤害。

进化能力 暗影飞行 你身体的下半部拖曳成阴影，使你能够翱翔。你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度，而你由扭动暗影构成的身体使你在进行用于脱逃的特技动作检定时获得+1环境加值。
