@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Ymt9FEga5R8U9CCl]{Shadoppy}

Shadoppies love bones so much that they manifest their own to cover their shadowy and largely incorporeal bodies. When they find the bones of other creatures, they hide them within the swirling shadows of their bodies until they can transfer them to a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} stash close to where they live. They only keep bones of creatures who died natural deaths, so they often congregate around graveyards and other sites where animals go when they are ill or reach extreme old age.

A Bone to Pick

Shadoppies believe that the bones of creatures who died violent deaths are cursed. They can sense a creature's general manner of death by sniffing its remains. Collecting the bones of those who died in accidents makes the collector more likely to suffer accidents of their own. The bones of people who were betrayed can cause the collector to become paranoid. The most cursed bones, though, are those belonging to people who died of fright; their collectors somehow always end up nibbled to death by rats.

Shadoppy, Shadopossum, and Shadelphis

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping shadoppy actualize their fascination with bones by completing their collection or reaching a deep understanding of bones.

Elemental Ability Shrouded Power When you're shrouded in darkness, your darkness powers deal additional damage. While you have the shrouded condition, you gain a +1 status bonus to cold damage with darkness powers; this increases to +3 if you're an expert in power DCs, +4 if you're a master in power DCs, and +5 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability Bone Mantle Your covered in protective bones that prevent the worst from happening. Your protective bone mantle grants you resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to critical hits. This resistance can't reduce the damage from a critical hit lower than the damage from a normal hit.

Evolution Ability Shadow Flight The bottom of your body trails away into shadows, allowing you to soar. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed, and your body of twisting shadow gives you a +1 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks made to Escape.

Duskoyotl, Dusk Coyote Eldamon.name: 暮郊土狼，暮色土狼灵魔 Duskoyotl, Dusk Coyote Eldamon
Duskoyotl, Dusk Coyote Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.j1tcS3JsYDN3Mxre]{暮郊狼兽}

许多旅行者在夜里挤在营火旁时，都曾被黑暗中注视着他们的发光眼睛吓得魂飞魄散；但那些眼睛往往属于暮郊狼兽——它们只是单纯喜欢观看火焰投下的舞动影子。暮郊狼兽相信没有光的黑暗毫无意义，因此它们更可能在火堆旁取暖，而不是躲在阴翳中。

对月长嗥

暮郊狼兽最爱火，但任何能在明与暗之间创造混合、却又不会让任何一方被压倒的事物，都在它们心中占有特殊地位。月亮以其不同的相位令它们着迷。它们尤其喜欢均分的半月，并会聚在其下长嗥嬉戏。相对地，满月与新月被视为不祥，暮郊狼兽可能会选择在那段时间睡过去。

暮郊狼兽、暮郊狼与暗郊狼

进化状态 帮助暮郊狼兽理解其对火的危险痴迷之深度与边界。

元素能力 笼罩的优雅 当你被黑暗笼罩时，你可以移动得更快，因为阴影会把你推向你想去的方向。当你具有笼罩的状态时，你的各项速度获得+10尺的环境加值，且当你进行潜行时，你可以以你的全速度移动。

形态能力 影之舞 你在阴影边缘迅捷而优雅地舞动。当你在昏暗光照或黑暗的区域开始移动时，你的各项速度获得+10尺的状态加值；并且当你处于昏暗光照的阴影中时，你无视困难地形。

进化能力 影鬃 你的影鬃在昏暗光照中环绕你旋转，保护着你。当你处于昏暗光照中时，你的AC获得+1环境加值；若你在昏暗光照中使用带有移动的动作进行移动时遭到攻击，该环境加值提升为+3环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.j1tcS3JsYDN3Mxre]{Duskoyotl}

Many travelers huddled close to a campfire at night have been terrified by the sight of glowing eyes watching them from the darkness, but those eyes often belong to duskoyotls who simply love to watch the dancing shadows cast by flames. Duskoyotls believe darkness is meaningless without light, so they're far more likely to be basking by fires than hiding in gloom.

Howl at the Moon

Duskoyotls love fire most, but anything that creates a blend between light and dark without overwhelming either holds a special place in their hearts. The moon fascinates them because of its different phases. They particularly enjoy a half moon that is equally divided and gather to howl and play under one. On the other hand, full and new moons are considered inauspicious, and duskoyotls might choose to sleep through them.

Duskoyotl, Duskoyote, and Darkoyote

Evolution Condition Helping duskoyotl understand both the depths and the boundaries of their dangerous obsession with fire.

Elemental Ability Shrouded Grace When you're shrouded in darkness, you can move faster, as the shadows push you where you want to go. While you have the shrouded condition, you gain a +10-foot circumstance bonus to your Speeds, and you can move your full Speed when you Sneak.

Form Ability Shadow Dance You dance swiftly and gracefully on the edge of shadows. You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speeds when you start your movement in an area of dim light or darkness, and while in the shadows of dim light, you ignore difficult terrain.

Evolution Ability Mane of Shadow Your mane of shadow swirls around you protectively in dim light. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC when in dim light, which increases to a +3 circumstance bonus if you're attacked while you're using a move action to move in dim light.

Lepismini, Gloom Silverfish Eldamon.name: 幽暗衣鱼精怪，暮影衣鱼精怪 Lepismini, Gloom Silverfish Eldamon
Lepismini, Gloom Silverfish Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.r2pWoo6d0h5ov73y]{Lepismini}

Lepismini害怕广阔的开阔空间，这也可以理解，因为它们看起来就像那种一旦被发现就经常会被踩扁的生物。不过，Lepismini并不是害虫，反而是极好的朋友。它们脖子周围那圈紫色的硬毛褶边很柔软，而且还能放低，这样人们抚摸它们时就不会被刺伤。

过度依恋

想把一只Lepismini从藏身处撬出来绝非易事。Lepismini在受惊时会把身体上的尖刺用钩钩住周围环境，使任何人都无法把它们从狭窄的藏身处里拉出来。想帮助自家Lepismini克服对开阔空间恐惧的训练师，应当随时提供一个它们可以撤退进去的小空间，例如袋子或口袋。有些甚至喜欢藏在帽子下面！

Lepismini、Lepismurk与Zygentomurkia

非普通

黑暗

ELDAMON

暗影

元素 黑暗

属性调整值 力量+2、敏捷+1、体质+3、智力+0、感知+4、魅力-1

Eldamon语言 暗影语

Eldamon生命值 4

Eldamon技能 特技、运动、隐匿

Eldamon豁免 反射

感官 强化黑暗视觉

抗性 黑暗、心灵、暗影、灵体

弱点 肉体、光、音波

速度 25尺（在昏暗光照或黑暗中为35尺）

近战 1 尾巴（仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d6穿刺（仅在进化时为1d8穿刺）

进化状态 帮助Lepismini真正理解并接受它们对封闭空间的热爱，直到它们愿意接纳周围更广阔的世界。

元素能力 隐藏的暗影 当你被黑暗笼罩的时，你能更轻松地进行躲藏与潜行，钻进每一处小缝隙与角落。当你处于笼罩状态时，你因笼罩状态而获得的、用于躲藏与潜行的隐匿检定的环境加值提高：笼罩1时为+2、笼罩2时为+3、笼罩3时为+4。

形态能力 尖刺甲壳 你的甲壳布满尖刺。一名生物用近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击命中你时，会受到等同于你等级一半（最低1）的穿刺伤害，并需要针对你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。

进化能力 黑暗披风 你的褶边转化为一件翻涌暗影构成的披风，当你不移动时（例如在狭窄处静止不动时）披风会沉降并环绕在你身边。你可以在没有掩蔽或隐蔽的情况下进行躲藏（但不能潜行）；并且如果你1轮内不进行动作（或在一场战斗遭遇中约6秒不行动），你会在移动或做出显著动作之前，被黑暗披风所隐蔽。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.r2pWoo6d0h5ov73y]{Lepismini}

Lepisminis are scared of wide open spaces, which is understandable given they resemble a creature that often gets squashed when spotted. Lepisminis aren't pests, however, and make excellent friends. The purple ruff of bristles around their necks is soft and can lower so they don't injure people petting them.

Overly Attached

Dislodging a lepismini from a hiding spot is no easy task. Lepisminis hook the spikes on their bodies into their surroundings when frightened, preventing anyone from pulling them out of their tight hiding spot. Trainers who want to help their lepisminis overcome their fear of open spaces should provide a small space to which they can retreat at any time, such as a bag or pocket. Some even like hiding underneath hats!

Lepismini, Lepismurk, and Zygentomurkia

Element Darkness

Weaknesses body, light, sonic

Speed 25 feet (35 feet in dim light or darkness)

Melee 1 tail (reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d6 piercing (1d8 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping lepismini truly understand and come to terms with their love of enclosed spaces enough that they can be willing to accept the wider world around them.

Elemental Ability Hidden Shadow When you're shrouded in darkness, you can Hide and Sneak more easily, crawling into every little nook and cranny. Your circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Hide and Sneak from the shrouded condition increases to +2 when you're shrouded 1, +3 when you're shrouded 2, and +4 when you're shrouded 3.

Form Ability Spiked Carapace Your carapace is covered in spikes. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes piercing damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a basic Reflex save against your power DC.

Evolution Ability Mantle of Darkness Your ruff transformed into a mantle of swirling shadows that settle around you when you aren't moving, such as when holding still in a narrow place. You can Hide (though not Sneak) without cover or concealment, and if you don't act for 1 round (or about 6 seconds out of a combat encounter), you become concealed by the mantle of darkness until you move or make a significant motion.

Kagekko, Shade Gecko Eldamon.name: 影之壁虎“卡杰科”，阴影壁虎艾达蒙 Kagekko, Shade Gecko Eldamon
Kagekko, Shade Gecko Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.UxEdwRvGfbHADgQJ]{Kagekko}

“大脑袋，大烦恼。”训练师们常用这句话来形容影壁守宫。此类艾达兽更喜欢躲藏在层层防护之后，只有在他们信任训练师也同样谨慎且称职时，才会外出与之同行。

吃，还是不吃

影壁守宫的大部分时间都花在躲藏上，通常只会面临与其处于同一相位的艾达兽和其他存在的威胁，因此他们对自己可能在遭遇中遇到的大多数威胁之真实本质并没有很强的把握。他们无数的应急预案往往可归结为两类：从问题前逃跑，或把它吃掉。长舌与强壮的颌骨让后者在惊人数量的情境中成为可行之选，但影壁守宫最常见的败因，是没有为“抓握住一个过于笨重而无法吞咽的实体之后该怎么办”准备最后的应急预案。

Kagekko、Geckrepuscle 与 Geckhonsu

稀有

黑暗

艾达兽

暗影

艾达兽语言 Shadowtongue

艾达兽豁免 意志

弱点 身体、光、音波

速度 25 尺

近战 1 颌骨（agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化后为 1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助影壁守宫不仅学会如何制定真正全面的应急预案，也要让它明白：有时到了该放下某些事情、不必再为准备备用方案而忧心的时刻。

元素能力 应变笼罩 你随时准备应对一切，并以笼罩保护自己免受伤害。当你掷骰先攻时，你获得笼罩的 1，持续到你在战斗中的第一个回合结束为止。若你在战斗的第 1 轮相位进入战斗，也同样适用。

形态能力 守宫之舌 你的舌头格外长，触及为 10 尺。你可以用舌头在远处进行有限的操作（manipulate）动作，这些动作不需要手指或显著的手部敏捷（例如开门），或用来对一个生物进行擒抱（Grapple）。

进化能力 六重刺腿 你获得第三对腿，且其上布满尖刺。你的陆地速度提升至 30 尺，并且当你穿过一名敌人的空间时（通常是因为你比对方大 3 个体型，或你翻滚穿越其空间），对方受到 1d8 穿刺伤害。无论你在该空间中移动多少次，一个生物每轮仅会因此穿刺伤害受伤一次。你的舌头触及提升至 20 尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.UxEdwRvGfbHADgQJ]{Kagekko}

"Big heads, big worries," is what trainers say about kagekkos. These eldamon prefer to stay hidden behind layers of protections and only venture out to join trainers whom they trust to be just as careful and competent as themselves.

To Eat or Not to Eat

Kagekkos spend most of their time hiding and only at risk from eldamon and other beings that share their phase, so they don't have a strong grasp on the actual nature of most threats they might encounter. Their innumerable contingency plans are often reducible to two categories: run from the problem or eat it. A long tongue and strong jaws make the latter option feasible in a surprising number of situations, but the most common downfall of kagekkos is failing to have a final contingency plan for what to do with a grappled entity that's too unwieldy to swallow.

Kagekko, Geckrepuscle, and Geckhonsu

RARE

DARKNESS

ELDAMON

SHADOW

Element Darkness

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Shadowtongue

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses greater darkvision

Resistance darkness, mental, shadow, spirit

Weaknesses body, light, sonic

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping kagekko not only learn how to make truly comprehensive contingencies, but also realize that sometimes the time comes to let something drop and not worry about having a backup plan.

Elemental Ability Contingent Shroud You're ready for anything with a shroud to protect you from harm. When you roll initiative, you become shrouded 1 until the end of your first turn in combat. This also applies if you phase into combat on the first round of combat.

Form Ability Gecko Tongue Your tongue is especially long, with a reach of 10 feet. You can use your tongue to make limited manipulate actions from a distance that don't require fingers or significant manual dexterity (such as opening a door) or to Grapple a creature.

Evolution Ability Sixfold Spiked Legs You gain a third pair of legs that are covered with spikes. Your land Speed increases to 30 feet, and when you move through a foe's space (usually either because you are three sizes larger or you Tumbled Through their space), they take 1d8 piercing damage. A creature only takes this piercing damage once per round, no matter how many times you move through this space. Your tongue's reach increases to 20 feet.

Manight, Murk Hand Eldamon.name: 玛奈特，幽暗之手艾达蒙 Manight, Murk Hand Eldamon
Manight, Murk Hand Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.iGLXUoMl8CJeFZRR]{Manight}

需要帮忙吗？Manight 来帮你！Manight 不仅会热情十足地投入各项任务，而且还是完美主义者，会把同一项活动一遍又一遍地重复，直到不再犯错为止。然而，这种习惯几乎接近痴迷，许多训练师很难让 manight 把注意力放在期望的任务上，而不是放在最先吸引它注意的东西上。

击掌！

或者四掌，但朋友之间少根手指又算什么？Manight 喜欢因完成得漂亮而得到称赞，但在它们眼中并非所有工作都同等重要。大多数 manight 都有一份“最想精通的五件事”清单，通常与它们早年某段经历有关——那段经历给它们留下了深刻印象。参加过马戏团可能会让其中一只想培养成为马戏团领班的技能；而听到优美的音乐则可能激励另一只练习多种乐器，或学习指挥一支管弦乐队。

Manight、Manut 与 Manyx

稀有

黑暗

ELDAMON

暗影

元素 黑暗

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon语言 Shadowtongue

Eldamon生命值 4

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon豁免 意志

感官 高等黑暗视觉

抗力 黑暗、精神、暗影、灵体

弱点 肉体、光、音波

速度 25英尺

近战 1 颌骨（agile, finesse, 仅在进化后触及 10英尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化后为 1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助 manight 一次又一次地继续尝试，直到它们终于把事情做得完美，并达到坚持不懈的圆满。

元素能力 无形之手 当你因自身黑暗力量而处于隐藏或未被察觉时，你的黑暗力量更为强大。当你由于自身黑暗力量造成的笼罩的状态，或由于自身黑暗力量制造的昏暗光照或黑暗区域，而对某个生物处于隐藏或未被察觉时，你对该生物以黑暗力量造成的寒冷伤害获得+2状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家则提升至+4，若为大师则为+5，若为传奇则为+6。若你因其他原因而处于隐藏或未被察觉（例如隐形法术），则该加值不适用。

形态能力 暗影喷发 当你使用黑暗力量时，你的手掌之躯顶部会喷涌出由黑暗能量构成的、冰冷而无光的火焰。每当你使用一次黑暗力量，在接下来的1轮内，任何以近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击命中你的生物，都会受到等同于你等级一半的寒冷伤害（最低1），并需针对你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。

进化能力 好用之眼 你那灌注黑暗魔法的双眼能揭示其他隐藏的生物，帮助你伏击它们。你持续获得 see the unseen 法术的效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.iGLXUoMl8CJeFZRR]{Manight}

Need a hand? Manight is here to help! Not only do manights tackle tasks with gusto, but they're perfectionists who will repeat an activity over and over until they make no mistakes. This habit borders on obsession, however, and many trainers have a hard time getting manights to focus on the desired task rather than whatever caught their attention first.

High Five!

Or four, but what's a finger between friends? Manights love praise for a job well done, yet not all jobs are equal in their eyes. Most manights have a top five list of things they want to perfect, typically related to an experience early in their life that left a strong impression on them. Attending a circus might make one want to develop the skills to become a ringmaster, while hearing beautiful music might inspire one to practice multiple instruments or learn to conduct an orchestra.

Manight, Manut, and Manyx

RARE

DARKNESS

ELDAMON

SHADOW

Element Darkness

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Shadowtongue

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses greater darkvision

Resistance darkness, mental, shadow, spirit

Weaknesses body, light, sonic

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping manight keep trying, over and over again, until they finally do things perfectly and reach the consummation of their perseverance.

Elemental Ability Invisible Hand When you're hidden or undetected due to your darkness powers, your darkness powers are more powerful. While you are hidden or undetected to a creature either due to the shrouded condition from your darkness powers or due to an area of dim light or darkness from your darkness powers, you gain a +2 status bonus to cold damage with darkness powers against that creature; this increases to +4 if you're an expert in power DCs, +5 if you're a master in power DCs, and +6 if you're legendary in power DCs. This bonus doesn't apply if you're hidden or undetected for another reason (such as an invisibility spell).

Form Ability Shadow Eruption The top of your hand body erupts with cold lightless flames of darkness energy when you use darkness powers. Whenever you use a darkness power, for 1 round, a creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes cold damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a basic Reflex save against your power DC.

Evolution Ability Handy Eyes Your dark magic-imbued eyes reveal other hidden creatures, helping you ambush them. You constantly gain the effects of a see the unseen spell.

Morpup, Death Dog Eldamon.name: 莫普普，死亡犬艾尔达蒙 Morpup, Death Dog Eldamon
Morpup, Death Dog Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0uRze5WegLAEudYa]{Morpup}

有些人害怕莫尔幼犬，因为它们的出现往往意味着有人即将死亡，但另一个选择是报丧女妖，而一个尖叫的幽魂远比一只长着蝴蝶翅膀、漂浮在空中的可爱小狗可怕得多。无论如何，莫尔幼犬实际上会在某个将死之人即将重生或以不同形态继续前行时到来，例如加入他们所崇拜的神祇的领域。死亡也许仍是令人悲伤的时刻，但莫尔幼犬带来希望的信息：灵魂仍将延续。它们甚至可能在旅途中陪伴灵魂一段路程以保护对方。

一生的伙伴

莫尔幼犬喜欢交朋友并陪伴他人。它们所传递的变化与延续的信息并不只适用于死者。往往是悲恸的幸存者才需要帮助继续前行，因此莫尔幼犬可能会跟随他们，而不是跟随离去的灵体。事实上，这种情况是训练师最终得到莫尔幼犬的最常见方式，不过，为了引诱一只莫尔幼犬而安排某人死亡，是强烈不建议的。

莫尔幼犬、莫尔猎犬与莫尔加姆

死亡

元素 死亡

艾达兽豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 poison, void

速度 25 feet

进化状态 帮助莫尔幼犬从危险情境、长途旅程或类似状况中安全返回。

元素能力 重生 当你将要被降至 0 生命值时，你会重生并再次站起。你不会被降至 0 生命值，而是保持在 1 生命值，并获得等同于你等级的临时生命值。一旦你从重生中获益，你在接下来的 1d4 小时内无法再次从中获益。

形态能力 围巾滑翔 你的围巾使你能够在空中滑翔。以一个具有 move 特性的单动作，你向地面移动 5 feet，并在空中移动至多 25 feet。如同飞行的艾达兽一般，若你未通过 Melded Phase 与你的艾达兽训练师合体，你会在你的回合结束时落到地面上，尽管你可以 Arrest the Fall。

进化能力 命运红线 你可以使用围巾上散开的线缕在相当远的距离勾住敌人，将他们的命运与你相系。你可以在至多 20 feet 的距离进行 Grapple。被你围巾抓住的敌人，在对抗你的死亡力量的强韧豁免上承受 -1 环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0uRze5WegLAEudYa]{Morpup}

Some people fear morpups because their presence often means someone is about to die, but the alternative is a banshee, and a screaming ghost is far worse than a cute puppy floating with butterfly wings. In any case, morpups actually arrive when someone who dies is going to be reborn or move on in a different form, such as joining the domain of a deity they worship. The death might remain a sad occasion, but the morpup brings a message of hope that the soul lives on. They might even accompany the soul for part of the journey to protect them.

Companions for Life

Morpups love having friends and keeping people company. Their message of change and continuation doesn't apply only to the dead. Often, it's the grieving survivors who need help moving on, so morpups might follow them rather than the departed spirit. This situation is in fact the most common way trainers end up with a morpup, though it is strongly ill-advised to arrange someone's death for the purpose of luring one.

Morpup, Morhound, and Morgarm

Evolution Condition Helping morpup return safely from a dangerous situation, long journey, or the like.

Elemental Ability Rebirth When you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you are reborn and rise again. Instead of being reduced to 0 Hit Points, you remain at 1 Hit Point and gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level. Once you've benefited from rebirth, you can't benefit from it again for 1d4 hours.

Form Ability Scarf Glide Your scarf allows you to glide through the air. As a single action, which has the move trait, you move 5 feet toward the ground and up to 25 feet through the air. Like flying eldamon, you land on the ground at the end of your turn if you aren't combined with your eldamon trainer through Melded Phase, though you can Arrest the Fall.

Evolution Ability Red String of Fate You can use the unraveled strings of your scarf to latch onto foes at quite a distance, tying their fate to you. You can Grapple foes at a distance of up to 20 feet. Foes grabbed by your scarf take a -1 circumstance penalty to Fortitude saves against your death powers.

Grima, Death Cat Eldamon.name: 格里玛，死亡猫埃尔达蒙 Grima, Death Cat Eldamon
Grima, Death Cat Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0zyrSyQuzz6CRYY7]{格里玛}

关于猫会偷走人们吐息的传闻，源自格里玛；它们会夺走一个已在濒死之人的最后吐息。那口吐息会在格里玛的魔法项链中延续，纪念逝者曾经存在。格里玛不会杀人，也不会阻止他们的灵魂前往来世。这种行为更像是取走一个手印，或保存某人的嗅觉气味。

感谢这段记忆

从格里玛的眼睛、耳朵与尾巴散发出的发光能量，源自它们项链中储存的死亡吐息。那些吐息本质上是生物生命力的回声。格里玛夺走的吐息会保留其主人部分记忆，格里玛能通过专注于自己的项链来读取这些记忆。同样地，当格里玛攻击某个生物时，目标也许会瞥见那些为格里玛攻击提供动力之人的记忆片段。

格里玛、格里莫金与格里马拉金

进化状态 帮助格里玛收集到足够多、来自具有足够力量等级或心理重要性的生物的最后吐息。

元素能力 夺息者 当你的死亡力量杀死一名敌人时，你会被其濒死吐息所激励。直到你下个回合结束，你在察觉检定、豁免以及技能检定上获得 +1 状态加值。若你在享受该加值期间对该敌人使用 Reap Lives，或你用 Reap Lives 杀死一个生物，则该状态加值提高至 +2。

形态能力 饮下吐息 当你在附近时，你会饮下濒死敌人的最后吐息。若一名敌人在你 5 feet 内死亡，或你移动至一名在上一轮死亡的敌人 5 feet 内，你可以用 自由动作（）偷走其最后吐息。若你这么做，你获得等同于你等级的 临时生命值，持续 1 轮。

进化能力 千息 你从最后吐息中吸收的无数生命精粹自你体内涌出，伤害攻击你的敌人。一名以徒手近战打击或非触及近战打击命中你的生物，会受到等同于你等级一半（最低 1）的 void 伤害，并需要对抗你的力量 DC 进行一次 强韧 基础豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0zyrSyQuzz6CRYY7]{Grima}

Rumors that cats steal people's breaths originate from grimas, who take the final breath of someone who is already dying. That breath lives on in a grima's magical necklace, memorializing the deceased's existence. Grimas don't kill people, nor do they prevent their souls from moving on to the afterlife. The practice is more like taking a handprint or preserving someone's scent.

Thanks for the Memory

The glowing energy that comes off a grima's eyes, ears, and tail comes from the breaths of the dead stored in their necklace. They are essentially echoes of the creatures' life forces. The breaths taken by grimas retain some of the memories of their owners, which grimas can access by focusing on their necklace. Similarly, when a grima attacks a creature, the target might get a glimpse of the memories of the people whose breaths are fueling the grima's attack.

Grima, Grimalkin, and Grimalakin

UNCOMMON

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 void (1d6 void when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping grima collect enough last breaths of creatures with sufficient levels of power or psychological importance.

Elemental Ability Breathtaker When your death power kills a foe, you're energized by their dying breath. You gain a +1 status bonus on Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn. If you use Reap Lives on that foe while benefiting for this bonus, or if you kill a creature with Reap Lives, the status bonus increases to +2.

Form Ability Drink Breath You drink the last breath of a dying foe when you're nearby. If a foe dies within 5 feet of you, or if you move within 5 feet of a foe who died in the last round, you can steal their last breath as a free action. If you do, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 round.

Evolution Ability Thousand Breaths The countless life essences you've absorbed from final breaths emerge from your body, harming foes who attack you. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes void damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a basic Fortitude save against your power DC.

Hydgwyn, White Hart Eldamon.name: 海德格温，白牡鹿埃达蒙 Hydgwyn, White Hart Eldamon
Hydgwyn, White Hart Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.hLHQ3uJUS4mYilTL]{Hydgwyn}

当莫普幼崽和格里玛斯在“它们能杀死对手”的错误假设下劳作时，可爱的海德圭恩却确实会带来死亡；它们通常会不辞辛劳，为那些在危险旅途中倒下、且已濒死之人带去解脱。

群星映眼

海德圭恩能解读星辰，以看见哪里需要它们；而指引其使命的星纹会一直留存在它们的眼中，直到完成任务为止。这种能力使它们即便在星辰被遮蔽时也能继续旅行。尽管它们会为在执行任务或旅途中倒下的人带去安宁，但它们也可能陪伴那些以终结“不自然延长生命”的生物为目标的人同行。

Hydgwyn、Hydoom与Hydeth

非普通

死亡

艾达兽

元素 死亡

艾达兽豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 毒素，虚空

弱点 光，灵体

速度 25尺

近战 1 鹿角（灵巧；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4穿刺外加1点额外虚空（仅在进化时为1d6穿刺外加1点额外虚空）

进化状态 帮助海德圭恩完成一项伟大的任务或许多较小的任务。

元素能力 利用虚弱 你的死亡之力对虚弱的生物更为危险。你造成笨拙与力竭（状态）持续1轮的死亡之力，改为使这些状态持续到你下个回合结束。你以你的死亡之力对生物造成的笨拙、枯竭、力竭或恶心中数值最高者为基准，获得等同该数值的死亡之力伤害状态加值，上限为+2。若你在力量DC上为专家，你的死亡之力伤害状态加值上限为+4。若你为大师，只要生物具有上述四种状态中的至少一种（任意数值），状态加值提高1，总上限为+5；若你为传奇，只要生物具有上述四种状态中的至少一种（任意数值），状态加值总共提高2，总上限为+6。

形态能力 寻征兽 你可以成为引导他人抵达其任务的指引之星，或成为引他们误入歧途的鬼火。以一个单动作（具有专注与心灵特性），你可以对30尺内一个生物进行一次欺瞒检定，对抗其察觉DC或意志DC中较低者。成功时，你选择其一：使其在1轮内的下一次察觉检定或意志豁免获得+1环境加值；或使其困惑1，持续1轮。大成功或大失败时，你可以给予+2环境加值，或使该生物困惑2。

进化能力 幽谱火焰 你可以移动在你双角间如鬼火般舞动的幽谱火焰。幽谱火焰在60尺内提供昏暗照明。以自由动作（），每回合一次，你可以将火焰开启或关闭，或将火焰移动至多60尺。只要火焰位于你的空间内，你在使用你的寻征兽能力时进行的欺瞒检定获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.hLHQ3uJUS4mYilTL]{Hydgwyn}

While morpups and grimas labor under the false assumption that they kill, the cute hydgwyns actually do bring death, typically going to great lengths to grant relief to those who have fallen during perilous journeys and are already dying.

Stars In Their Eyes

Hydgwyns can read the stars to see where they are needed, and the patterns that dictate their quest remain in their eyes until they finish their mission. This ability allows them to continue traveling even when the stars are hidden. Though they bring peace to those who fall while undertaking quests or journeys, they might also accompany those whose goals are to bring an end to creatures who have unnaturally extended their lives.

Hydgwyn, Hydoom, and Hydeth

UNCOMMON

DEATH

ELDAMON

Element Death

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Requian

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance poison, void

Weaknesses light, spirit

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 antler (finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing plus 1 additional void (1d6 piercing plus 1 additional void when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping hydgwyn complete a great quest or many smaller quests.

Elemental Ability Exploit Frailty Your death powers are more dangerous against infirm creatures. Your death powers that cause the clumsy and enfeebled condition for 1 round cause those conditions to last until the end of your next turn instead. You gain a status bonus to damage with your death powers equal to the highest of a creature's clumsy, drained, enfeebled, or sickened value they received from your death powers, to a maximum of +2. If you're an expert in power DCs, the maximum status bonus to damage with your death powers is +4. If you're a master, the status bonus increases by 1 as long as a creature has at least one of the listed four conditions at any value, to a total maximum of +5, and if you're legendary, the status bonus increases by a total of 2 as long as a creature has at least one of the listed four conditions at any value, to a total maximum of +6.

Form Ability Questing Beast You can be a guiding star for others to reach their quest or a willo'- wisp leading them astray. As a single action, which has the concentrate and mental trait, you can attempt a Deception check against the lower of the Perception DC or Will DC of a creature within 30 feet. On a success, you choose whether to give them a +1 circumstance bonus on their next Perception check or Will save within 1 round or to make them stupefied 1 for 1 round. On a critical success, you can grant a +2 circumstance bonus or make the creature stupefied 2.

Evolution Ability Spectral Flame You can move the spectral flame that dances between your antlers like a will-o'-wisp. The spectral flame provides dim illumination within 60 feet. As a free action, once per turn, you can turn the flame off or on, or move the flame up to 60 feet. As long as the flame is in your space, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to use your questing beast ability.

Klorse, Pale Horse Eldamon.name: 克洛尔斯，苍白战马艾达蒙 Klorse, Pale Horse Eldamon
Klorse, Pale Horse Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.c3voX4KmKOvnnovj]{克洛斯}

克洛斯天生就为奔跑而生，疾驰穿越存在的诸多位面，体验现实本身如同风穿过它们云雾般的鬃毛般呼啸而过。尽管它们的骨质外表让它们与瘟疫与天启的传说联系在一起，但它们并不邪恶。事实上，它们渴望陪伴，最希望的莫过于有朋友与它们一同旅行。

愿意忽略克洛斯外表并分享其漫游渴望的人，会发现一位忠诚的伙伴——它将保护你，甚至让你免于死亡。与克洛斯结下羁绊的训练师总说，他们所知没有比这更好的方式去探索未知。

货真价实的“没骨气”

当克洛斯的旅行同伴安定下来时，克洛斯往往会努力定期探望他们的朋友。在某些领域，这导致了关于外形如骷髅的马匹造访人们家中的迷信。许多人相信，向这匹马供奉酒与点心，会让它在这一年里为你驱散厄运。当克洛斯有一段时间没有出现时，这些社群的人们会在一年中最长的夜晚装扮成克洛斯，挨家挨户巡行，以维系这一根源。

克洛斯、埃博娜与德塔达塔

元素能力 因为我无法为死亡停步 你在移动时可以以死亡能量裹覆自身；当这让你的敌人打消阻拦你的念头时，你会获得速度爆发。你获得死亡元素的机动能力。使用该能力进行一次疾行期间，若至少有一名敌人选择允许你穿过其空间，你可以在你的陆地速度通常允许的移动距离之外额外移动10尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.c3voX4KmKOvnnovj]{Klorse}

Klorses are born to run, galloping across planes of existence and experiencing reality itself rushing past like wind through their cloudy manes. There is nothing malevolent about them despite their bony appearance tying them to legends about plagues and apocalypses. In fact, they crave companionship and would like nothing more than to have friends to travel with them.

Those willing to look past a klorse's appearance and share their wanderlust discover a loyal partner who will defend them from death itself. Trainers who have a bond with a klorse always say they know of no better way to venture into the unknown.

No Bones About It

When a klorse's traveling companion settles down, the klorse is likely to make an effort to visit their friend periodically. In some realms, this has led to superstitions about skeletal-looking horses visiting people's homes. Many believe that offering the horse alcohol and treats will cause the horse to ward off bad luck for the year. When a klorse doesn't appear for a while, people in these communities dress up as one on the longest night of the year and make rounds to nearby homes to uphold the tradition.

Klorse, Ebona, and Dethadatta

Elemental Ability Because I Could Not Stop for Death You can swathe yourself with death energy as you move, and when this dissuades your foes from stopping you, you gain a burst of speed. You gain the death elemental locomotion ability. During a Stride using that ability, if at least one foe chooses to allow you to move through its space, you can move 10 additional feet beyond the movement your land Speed would normally allow.

Form Ability Riding a Pale Horse Your base land Speed is 40 feet instead of 25 feet. This benefit is already reflected in your statistics.

Evolution Ability Dry Bones Your skeletal form protects you from various forms of harm. You gain resistance 5 against cold, electricity, fire, piercing, and slashing.

Kitopaz, Crystal Earth Cat Eldamon.name: 奇托帕兹，水晶大地猫艾尔达蒙 Kitopaz, Crystal Earth Cat Eldamon
Kitopaz, Crystal Earth Cat Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.E6cNTiBjInOFG4QI]{基托帕兹}

有些文化崇拜猫，而基托帕兹相信自己已经完全配得上如此崇高的地位。它们起初胸前只有一枚黄玉水晶，但在一生中会长出许多色彩斑斓的水晶，最终成为真正壮丽的景象。

我们才不喵然（We Are Not Ameowsed）

对基托帕兹来说，即使在进行诸如玩玩具或追逐光束这类傻气活动时，保持体面也非常重要。若冒犯者道歉，它们会容忍一些笑声；但如果有人在它们吐出“毛球”时取笑它们，那就是不可饶恕的冒犯。所幸，基托帕兹版本的毛球由相位移出的闪亮石块与金属组成，外面裹着泥巴——大多数人都会以基托帕兹应得的敬畏来对待它。

基托帕兹、凯特弗努特与齐托菲特

大地

艾达兽

元素 大地

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达兽语言 佩特兰语

艾达兽生命值 8

艾达兽技能 威吓、潜行、生存

艾达兽豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 大地、电击、火、传送

弱点 空气、植物、音波、水、木

速度 25英尺

近战 1 爪击（灵活、娴熟；仅在进化时触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4 挥砍（仅在进化时为1d6 挥砍）

进化状态 帮助基托帕兹获得闪亮之物，并在一切闪亮之道的艺术上抵达巅峰启迪。

元素能力 大地之力 大地本身为你提供充溢的能量，保护你免受伤害。在一次遭遇期间，如果你在自己的回合开始时站在地面上，并与岩石或土质表面直接接触，你获得1点临时生命值，持续到你下一个回合开始。若你在威能DC上为专家，则提高至2点临时生命值；若为大师，则为3点临时生命值；若为传奇，则为4点临时生命值。

形态能力 王者涅墨斯 你闪亮的头饰一劳永逸地证明你确实尊贵而宏伟，同时保护你免受那些试图窃取你主权的效果影响。你在对抗情绪效果，以及施加困惑或被控制（状态）的效果的豁免检定上获得+1环境加值。若你对这类效果的豁免掷出成功，则改为大成功或大失败中的大成功。

进化能力 水晶守护 遍布你全身的诸多水晶使大地能量能轻易流经你，并储存在水晶中以在需要时释放。在你的回合结束时，你可以选择耗尽能量，使你的AC获得+2环境加值，持续到你下一个回合开始。若你如此做，在你至少刷新三次以补充缺失能量之前，你无法再次如此做。由于你在一次遭遇后会立刻刷新，你也能迅速补充你的水晶守护。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.E6cNTiBjInOFG4QI]{Kitopaz}

Some cultures worship cats, and kitopaz believe they have fully earned such an exalted status. They start with a single topaz crystal on their chest but grow many colorful crystals over their lifetime, becoming a truly magnificent sight.

We Are Not Ameowsed

It is very important for kitopaz to maintain their dignity even when engaging in silly activities like playing with toys or chasing light beams. They will tolerate some laughter if the offender apologizes, but making fun of them when they throw up a "hairball" is an unforgivable offense. Thankfully, the kitopaz version of a hairball consists of phased out shiny stones and metals covered in mud, which most people treat with the reverence kitopaz deserves.

Kitopaz, Kitefnut, and Qitophet

EARTH

ELDAMON

Element Earth

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Petran

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Intimidation, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance earth, electricity, fire, teleportation

Weaknesses air, plant, sonic, water, wood

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping kitopaz obtain shiny things and reach peak enlightenment in the art of all that is shiny.

Elemental Ability Strength of the Earth The earth itself provides you with overflowing energy that protects you from harm. During an encounter, if you start your turn on the ground, in direct contact with a rock or earthen surface, you gain 1 temporary Hit Point until the beginning of your next turn. This increases to 2 temporary Hit Points if you're an expert in power DC, 3 temporary Hit Points if you're a master in power DC, and 4 temporary Hit Points if you're legendary in power DC.

Form Ability Regal Nemes Your shiny headdress proves you once and for all as truly regal and magnificent, while protecting you from effects that would seek to steal your sovereignty. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects and effects that apply the confused or controlled condition. If you roll a success on a saving throw against such an effect, you get a critical success instead.

Evolution Ability Crystalline Guard The many crystals throughout your body allow earth energy to flow through you easily and store within the crystals to release when needed. At the end of your turn, you can choose to deplete your energy to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC until the beginning of your next turn. If you do, you can't do so again until you refresh at least three times to replenish the missing energy. Since you refresh instantly after an encounter, you can also replenish your crystalline guard swiftly.

Geopher, Soil Gopher Eldamon.name: 吉欧菲尔，土拨鼠埃尔达蒙 Geopher, Soil Gopher Eldamon
Geopher, Soil Gopher Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.bz7td0heRTIkRWme]{地穿鼠}

地穿鼠是热情的掘进者，能像游泳者穿过水一样穿过土壤。然而，它们不会留下正常的隧道，因为它们由大地构成，而且还能相位穿行。尽管一些学者曾推测地穿鼠可能会留下某种只有其他大地艾达兽才能感知的痕迹，但很快就发现地穿鼠自己也完全不知道它们去过哪里。

宝藏才是驱使地穿鼠的动力，不过它们对宝藏的定义可能与类人生物不同。它们喜欢任何对它们而言稀有或新奇的东西。一块形状古怪的石头，和某个远古文明埋藏的遗物同样珍贵。无论它们找到什么，地穿鼠都喜欢把战利品展示给其他人看。

地底捞鱼！

地穿鼠往往有点笨手笨脚，也缺乏以战略方式搜寻宝藏的规划能力。这就是人们派上用场的地方！考古学家与矿工会和地穿鼠交朋友，然后让这些小伙伴去“钓”出有价值的发现。当某只地穿鼠对某次搜寻不怎么兴奋时，它的朋友就会拿海贝和其他“来自海里的石头”来交换——这些被土所束缚的地穿鼠认为它们很稀有——以此换取它继续坚持挖掘。

地穿鼠、地穴鼠与地晶鼠

进化状态 帮助地穿鼠挖到一次真正非同寻常的发现。

元素能力 硬化土壤 你对硬化大地魔法有了更强的控制力，使你对伤害略微更具抗性。当某个大地力量给予你基于你等级的抗力或硬度时，你获得的抗力或硬度视同你的等级比正常高 1。

形态能力 撕裂之爪 你的爪击与力量更容易挖穿坚固的物体。你的爪击打击与大地力量无视等同于你等级一半的硬度（最低 1）；如常，此能力对抗力没有效果。

进化能力 铲掘突进 你可以用你的铲状尾巴迅速在战场上掘进。你获得 20 foot 掘地速度，使你可以挖穿松软的大地与其他稠度相近的表面。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.bz7td0heRTIkRWme]{Geopher}

Geophers are enthusiastic tunnelers who can move through soil like swimmers through water. They don't leave behind normal tunnels, however, because they are made of earth, and phased out to boot. While some scholars once speculated that geophers might leave some trail that only other earth eldamon can perceive, it soon became clear that geophers themselves have no idea where they've been.

Treasure is what motivates geophers, though their definition of treasure might not be the same as humanoids. They love anything that is rare or new to them. A rock with an odd shape is just as valuable as a buried relic from an ancient civilization. Whatever they find, though, geophers enjoy showing it to others.

Geo Fish!

Geophers can be pretty hapless and lack the planning ability to search for treasure in a strategic way. That's where people come in! Archaeologists and miners befriend geophers and send their little pals fishing for valuable finds. When geophers aren't excited about a particular search, their friends offer seashells and other "rocks from the sea," which the earthbound geophers consider rare, in exchange for persisting with a dig.

Geopher, Geomys, and Geomyte

UNCOMMON

EARTH

ELDAMON

Element Earth

Attribute Modifiers Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Petran

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance earth, electricity, fire, teleportation

Weaknesses air, plant, sonic, water, wood

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d6 slashing (1d8 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping geopher dig their way to a truly extraordinary find.

Elemental Ability Harden Soil You have greater control over hardening earth magic, allowing you to become slightly more resistant to damage. When an earth power grants you resistance or hardness based on your level, you gain resistance or hardness as if your level was 1 higher than normal.

Form Ability Rending Claws Your claws and powers more easily dig through solid objects. Your claw Strikes and earth powers ignore an amount of Hardness equal to half your level (minimum 1); as normal, this has no effect on resistance.

Evolution Ability Shovelling Dig You can use your shovel tail to quickly dig your way across the battlefield. You gain a 20 foot burrow Speed, allowing you to dig through soft earth and other surfaces of similar consistency.

Sanditt, Sand Lizard Eldamon.name: 桑迪特，沙蜥蜴艾达蒙 Sanditt, Sand Lizard Eldamon
Sanditt, Sand Lizard Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.58nVtCfslJVmRonM]{沙尼特}

沙尼特是独行者，这种习性源自它们在沙漠中的起源。它们会用尘土与沙子召唤出木偶来陪伴自己，并上演精心编排的戏剧。不过它们很害羞，更偏好通过自己编写的表演来交流。

两人作伴

与沙尼特交朋友的最佳方式，就是主动提出在演出中扮演一个角色。沙尼特在与他人“合作”完成一场演出时，会很快忘却羞怯。这样的搭档关系也是衡量一名训练师是否能与沙尼特相处融洽的好方法。这些艾达兽往往有与其性格相符的偏爱题材。没有什么比在严肃的片段里说个不合时宜的笑话，或在喜剧里来一段过于含蓄的表演，更能让沙尼特立刻落荒而逃。

抗性 大地、电击、火焰、传送

弱点 空气、植物、音波、水、木

速度 25英尺

近战 1 颌骨；伤害 1d6 挥砍（仅在进化时为 1d8 挥砍）

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧、娴熟、仅在进化时触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4 钝击（仅在进化时为 1d6 钝击）

进化状态 帮助沙尼特克服羞怯，并演出一场真正精彩的小品或木偶剧。

元素能力 突起掩蔽 你的大地力量从体内渗出，使你能够给予盟友额外的掩蔽。每当你通过你的空间为盟友提供针对一次穿过你空间发动的攻击的较小掩蔽时，你改为给予他们 AC +2 环境加值，而非通常的 AC +1 环境加值。

形态能力 流沙裹衣 当你被命中时，你用沙子裹住自己，使后续攻击难以看清你。若一个生物用一次打击命中你，冲击会扬起一层沙幕，使你直到该生物回合结束前都因沙幕而处于隐蔽状态。

进化能力 木偶尾巴 你的尾巴能引诱敌人使其防备疏忽并分散其注意力。以单动作，你可以尝试一次表演检定，对抗一个生物的察觉 DC；成功则使其直到你下个回合结束前防备疏忽。若你尝试一次尾巴打击，在结算该打击后，除非该打击为大成功或大失败中的大失败，否则目标直到你回合结束前防备疏忽。当某个敌人因你的尾巴而防备疏忽时，你的移动不会触发该敌人基于移动的反应（例如反应打击与类似反应）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.58nVtCfslJVmRonM]{Sanditt}

Sanditts are solitary, a habit from their origins in deserts. They keep themselves company by conjuring puppets out of dust and sand to perform elaborate plays. They're shy, though, and prefer communicating via their scripted performances.

Two's Company

The best way to befriend a sanditt is to offer to play a part in a show. Sanditts quickly forget their shyness when "working" with someone to put together a performance. Such a partnership is also a good way to gauge how well a trainer will get along with a sanditt. These eldamon tend to have a favorite genre that matches their personalities. Nothing sends a sanditt running for the hills faster than an inappropriate joke during a dramatic moment or an understated performance in a comedy.

Sanditt, Sanderma, and Sandrak

UNCOMMON

EARTH

ELDAMON

Element Earth

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Petran

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Performance, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance earth, electricity, fire, teleportation

Weaknesses air, plant, sonic, water, wood

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws; Damage 1d6 slashing (1d8 slashing when evolved only)

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping sanditt overcome their shyness and put on a truly wonderful skit or puppet show.

Elemental Ability Protrusive Cover Your earth power seeps out of you, allowing you to grant your allies additional cover. Whenever you give your allies lesser cover against an attack made through your space, you grant them a +2 circumstance bonus to AC instead of the usual +1 circumstance bonus to AC.

Form Ability Sand Shroud When you're hit, you shroud yourself with sand that conceals you from follow-up attacks. If a creature hits you with a Strike, the impact launches a shroud of sand, causing you to become concealed by the sand until the end of that creature's turn.

Evolution Ability Puppet Tail Your tail can lure foes off guard and distract them. As a single action, you can attempt a Performance check against a creature's Perception DC, causing them to become off-guard until the end of your next turn on a success. If you attempt a tail Strike, after resolving the Strike, the target becomes off-guard until the end of your turn unless the Strike was a critical failure. While a foe is off-guard due to your tail, your movements don't trigger reactions from that foe based on movement (such as Reactive Strikes and similar reactions).

Pangeolil, Rock Pangolin Eldamon.name: 潘吉欧利尔，岩穿山甲埃达蒙 Pangeolil, Rock Pangolin Eldamon
Pangeolil, Rock Pangolin Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.psCbN8X9oyGbibAp]{潘吉奥利尔}

潘吉奥利尔喜欢保守秘密。它们将自己视作守护者，常常满足于躲藏在偏远之地，守护自己所学到的知识。然而，这些举措也可能只是它们沉溺于天生羞怯的借口。

犯罪与惩罚

在罕见的情况下，当潘吉奥利尔泄露某个秘密时，即便它这么做有充分理由，它也会感到内疚，并可能逃离朋友、回到它最初的家。在那里它会继续与世隔绝，坚信自己已不再值得信任。任何合乎逻辑的劝说都无法将潘吉奥利尔从这种绝望中拉出来，但若将一个新的重要秘密托付给它，反而可能奏效。

潘吉奥利尔、佩特罗林与福利斯

稀有

大地

艾尔达蒙

元素 大地

属性调整值 力量 +1，敏捷 +2，体质 +3，智力 +0，感知 +4，魅力 - 1

艾尔达蒙语言 佩特兰语

艾尔达蒙生命值 8

艾尔达蒙技能 运动，特技，生存

艾尔达蒙豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 大地，电击，火，传送

弱点 空气，植物，音波，水，木

速度 25尺

近战 1 爪击；伤害 1d6 挥砍（仅在进化时为1d8 挥砍）

近战 1 尾巴（仅在进化时同时具有灵巧、娴熟；触及10尺与多用穿刺）；伤害 1d4 钝击（仅在进化时为1d6 钝击）

进化状态 帮助潘吉奥利尔学会并守住一个格外深刻或重要的秘密。

元素能力 大地的复仇 伤害你的生物会很快遭到报应。在一个生物对你造成伤害之后，当你的大地力量对该生物造成伤害时，你在24小时内获得该力量伤害的+1状态加值。若你的力量DC为专家则提升至+2，为大师则提升至+3，为传奇则提升至+4。若该大地力量的伤害是对某个生物针对你的攻击所作出的直接回应（例如 Rebounding Embrace 或 Vengeful Backlash），则该伤害的状态加值再提高2（若你的力量DC为传奇，最高可达+6）。

形态能力 蜷缩 以单动作，你可以蜷缩。若你这么做，你获得AC+2环境加值（若你已获得标准掩蔽，则将你的标准掩蔽提升为强效掩蔽），并陷入定身状态，无法进行徒手攻击，且无法使用力量（反应力量除外）。当你蜷缩时，以近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击命中你的生物会受到1点穿刺伤害；此外，你每超过1级的4个等级再额外增加1点穿刺伤害，19级时最高为5点伤害；该生物必须以你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。这些效果持续到你下个回合结束，不过你也可以以单动作提前结束该效果。

进化能力 无数尖刺 你的尖刺无处不在，即便你没有蜷缩也能构成威胁，而当你蜷缩时更会让敌人流血。任何生物尝试以近战徒手打击或非触及近战打击攻击你时（无论你是否蜷缩，也无论它是否命中你），都会受到1点穿刺伤害；此外，你每超过1级的4个等级再额外增加1点穿刺伤害，19级时最高为5点伤害；该生物必须以你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。此效果取代蜷缩所造成的伤害。然而，若你正处于蜷缩状态，则反射豁免失败的生物还会受到等量的持续流血伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.psCbN8X9oyGbibAp]{Pangeolil}

Pangeolils love keeping secrets. They see themselves as guardians and are often content hiding in remote places to defend the knowledge they've learned. Such measures, however, might also be an excuse for indulging their natural shyness.

Crime and Punishment

On the rare occasions when pangeolils divulge a secret, even when they do so for a good reason, they experience guilt and may flee from their friends and return to their original home. There they remain in isolation, convinced they are no longer worthy of trust. No amount of logical reasoning can pull a pangeolil out of such despair, but entrusting them with a new important secret might do the trick instead.

Pangeolil, Petrolin, and Pholith

RARE

EARTH

ELDAMON

Element Earth

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon Language Petran

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Acrobatics, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance earth, electricity, fire, teleportation

Weaknesses air, plant, sonic, water, wood

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw; Damage 1d6 slashing (1d8 slashing when evolved only)

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet and versatile piercing both when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping pangeolil learn and keep an especially deep or important secret.

Elemental Ability Earth's Vengeance Creatures who damage you find quick comeuppance. After a creature damages you, when your earth powers damage that creatures, you gain a +1 status bonus to the power's damage for 24 hours. This increases to +2 if you're an expert in power DC, +3 if you're a master in power DC, and +4 if you're legendary in power DC. If the earth power deals damage in direct response to a creature's attacks against you (such as Rebounding Embrace or Vengeful Backlash), the status bonus to damage increases by 2 (to a maximum of +6 if you're legendary in power DC).

Form Ability Curl Up As a single action, you can Curl Up. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC (or increase you standard cover to greater cover if you already have standard cover) and are immobilized, can't make unarmed attacks, and can't use powers except reaction powers. A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike while you're curled up takes 1 piercing damage, plus 1 additional piercing damage for every 4 levels you have beyond 1st, to a maximum of 5 damage at 19th level, with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Evolution Ability Countless Spikes Your spikes are everywhere, presenting a threat even when you aren't curled up and making your foes bleed when you are. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not you're Curled Up and whether or not it hits you) takes 1 piercing damage, plus 1 additional piercing damage for every 4 levels you have beyond 1st, to a maximum of 5 damage at 19th level, with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. This replaces the damage from Curl Up. However, if you're Curled Up, a creature that fails their Reflex save also takes an equal amount of persistent bleed damage.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.VuGdbzcgf1kq7PIj]{塔乌龟特}

塔乌龟特是艾达兽世界里的寻刺激者。当狂风呼啸、雷电轰鸣时，它们会冲上前去迎接元素。它们在最高的巨浪上冲浪，在风暴中于树冠间摇摆，并在被电力涌动轰击时腾空飞翔。塔乌龟特乐于陪伴训练师踏上冒险，但前提是训练师得保证：这趟旅程比它们当下的生活还要更刺激。

需要充能

兴奋的塔乌龟特可能会迸射电光，但反过来也同样成立。若塔乌龟特长时间疲惫或悲伤，它可能会变得极度枯竭，以至于失去全部电能。若它能迅速休息并重拾对生活的喜悦，就能自行恢复火花；但若它长期处于枯竭状态，就可能需要外部帮助来充能。此类干预通常是由一圈其他塔乌龟特在仪式舞蹈中向其注入电力；而若是孤身一只的塔乌龟特，则可以在雷暴中爬到高处等待一次闪电劈击。

塔乌龟特、切洛瓦特与托龟斯

艾达兽

电击

元素 电击

艾达兽语言 沃尔坦语

艾达兽生命值 6

艾达兽技能 运动，威吓，生存

艾达兽豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 空气，电击，金属

弱点 大地，心灵，传送

速度 25英尺

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧，娴熟；仅当进化时触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4电击（仅当进化时为1d6电击）

近战 1 角；伤害 1d6穿刺（仅当进化时为1d8穿刺）

进化状态 帮助塔乌龟特从其冒险中体验到纯粹的刺激。

元素能力 抗电外壳 你拥有一层对电击具抗力的外壳，让你能够安全地储存电荷。当你因自身的元素力量而带电时，你不会陷入震慑，并且你不会因那些会移除震慑状态的效果而降低你的带电状态。

形态能力 缩入壳中 作为一个单动作，你可以缩入你的壳中。若你这么做，你获得AC+2环境加值且陷入定身。这些效果持续至你下个回合结束，不过你可以用一个单动作提前结束该效果。

进化能力 甲壳强化 你的壳会让你免受危险打击的伤害。你获得等于你等级一半的精准伤害抗力，并且当一个生物对你造成大成功或大失败时，你可以尝试一次DC 17纯骰检定。成功时，该次大成功或大失败改为普通命中。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.VuGdbzcgf1kq7PIj]{Tawhirtle}

Tawhirtles are the thrillseekers of the eldamon world. When winds roar and lightning crashes, they rush to greet the elements. They surf the tallest waves, sway in treetop canopies during storms, and soar through the air when blasted by a surge of electricity. Tawhirtles are happy to accompany trainers on adventures, but only if they promise more excitement than the ones they're already on.

Need to Recharge

An excited tawhirtle might spark with electricity, but the opposite is also true. A tawhirtle who is exhausted or sad for a prolonged period of time might become so drained that they lose all their electrical powers. They can recover their spark on their own if they quickly rest and regain their joy for life, but if they remain depleted for a long period of time, they could need external help to recharge. Such an intervention usually involves a circle of other tawhirtles infusing them with electricity during a ritual dance, but a solitary tawhirtle can wait for a lightning strike atop a tall location during a thunderstorm.

Tawhirtle, Chelowatt, and Thortoise

ELDAMON

ELECTRICITY

Element Electricity

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Voltan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, electricity, metal

Weaknesses earth, mental, teleportation

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 electricity (1d6 electricity when evolved only)

Melee 1 horn; Damage 1d6 piercing (1d8 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping tawhirtle experience pure thrill from their risks.

Elemental Ability Resistant Shell You have an outer shell of energy that's electrically resistant, allowing you to safely store charge. When you are charged from your own elemental powers, you don't become shocked, and you don't reduce your charged condition from effects that would remove the shocked condition.

Form Ability Retreat Into Shell As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Shell. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are immobilized. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Evolution Ability Shell Fortification Your shell fortifies you from dangerous blows. You gain resistance equal to half your level to precision damage, and when a creature critically hits you, you can attempt a DC 17 flat check. On a success, the critical hit becomes a normal hit instead.

Iognu, Electric Wildbeast Eldamon.name: 伊奥格努，电能狂野兽形灵魔 Iognu, Electric Wildbeast Eldamon
Iognu, Electric Wildbeast Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.9HseCil8mTER6ELb]{Iognu}

与其说塔维特尔追逐风暴是为了冒险的刺激，不如说伊奥努这样做是为了归属感。电能驱动着它们存在的每一丝纤维，而它们如避雷针般的角让它们本能地知道该往哪个方向走，才能找到下一场风暴。对它们而言，最猛烈的风暴就像家一样。

完美风暴

在伊奥努心中，什么样的风暴才算壮丽？对一些伊奥努来说，是它们在一天之内吸收的闪电打击次数；而另一些则想体验真正罕见的事件——暴风雪中的雷鸣、飓风带来的奇异云团、天空变换色彩，或由魔法召来的风暴。这样的风暴会调动伊奥努的全部感官，并可能令它们不堪重负，将它们带入一种全新的心境。在那段时间里，它们会失去压制皮毛中奔涌电能的能力，因此除非其他艾达萌想尝尝“全熟”的滋味，否则应当保持安全距离。

进化状态 帮助伊奥努品尝一场壮丽的风暴。

元素能力 横冲直撞 你的电荷在敌人之间横冲直撞，使其即使在承受电击伤害后，也会偶尔仍然附着其上。当一名因你的元素力量而处于震慑状态的敌人从你的元素力量中受到电击伤害时，该敌人必须尝试一次DC 5纯骰检定。成功时，如常失去震慑状态；失败时，其保留电荷并仍处于震慑状态。然而，这不会延长其震慑状态的持续时间。

形态能力 静电皮毛 当你充能并四处横冲直撞时，你的皮毛会聚集电能。若你在自己的回合中至少花费三个动作用于Stride，且该回合未使用任何力量，则你在回合结束时变为带电。

进化能力 避雷针 尾巴 当一个电击效果以你30 feet内的一个生物为目标，或包含一条位于你30 feet内的线条时，若该效果本可以以你为目标或将线条瞄准以命中你，你可以选择尝试一次反制检定，使用你的力量DC - 10作为你的反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级。若你成功，你不会终止该效果，而是强制其以你为目标，或调整其瞄准以将你纳入其中。若有多种方式能做到这一点，则只要它们以你为目标或将你纳入其中，发起者便作出所有其他决定。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.9HseCil8mTER6ELb]{Iognu}

Whereas tawhirtles chase storms for the thrill of adventure, iognus do it for the sense of belonging. Electricity powers every fiber of their being, and their lightning rod horns give them an instinctive sense of which direction to go to find the next storm. For them, the greatest storms feel like home.

The Perfect Storm

What makes a storm magnificent in an iognu's mind? For some, it's the number of lightning strikes they absorb in a single day, while others want to experience a truly unusual event—thunder amidst a blizzard, strange cloud formations from a hurricane, the sky changing colors, or a tempest conjured by magic. Such a storm engages all an iognu's senses and can overwhelm them, transporting them into a new state of mind. During that time, they lose control of the ability to suppress the electricity surging through their coat, so other eldamon should keep a safe distance unless they want to taste well done.

Iognu, Wildebuzz, and Shockonno

UNCOMMON

ELDAMON

ELECTRICITY

Element Electricity

Eldamon Language Voltan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance air, electricity, metal

Weaknesses earth, mental, teleportation

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 horn (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 electricity (1d6 electricity when evolved only)

Melee 1 foot; Damage 1d6 bludgeoning (1d8 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping iognu taste a magnificent storm.

Elemental Ability Rampaging Your electric charges rampage through your foes, allowing them to occasionally cling even after they suffer electricity damage. When a foe shocked from your elemental powers takes electricity damage from your elemental powers, the foe must attempt a DC 5 flat check. On a success, they lose the shocked condition as normal, whereas on a failure, they retain the charge and remain shocked. However, this doesn't extend the duration of their shocked condition.

Form Ability Static Fur Your fur gathers up electricity when you charge and rampage around. If you spend at least three of your actions on your turn to Stride and don't use a power on that turn, you become charged at the end of the turn.

Evolution Ability Lightning Rod Tail When an electricity effect targets a creature within 30 feet of you or includes a line within 30 feet of you, if it could have targeted you or aimed the line to hit you, you can choose to attempt a counteract check using your power DC - 10 as your counteract modifier and half your level (rounded up) as your counteract level. If you succeed, instead of ending the effect, you force it to target you, or to aim to include you. If there are several ways to do so, the originator makes all other decisions as long as they target or include you.

Porcute, Electric Porcupine Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.3sr5WMFtZMqg7ELZ]{刺骑鼬}

许多人都希望有一位闪亮盔甲的骑士能在他们陷入棘手处境时伸出援手，但很少有人会想到，这位骑士竟会是一只豪猪！不过，别以貌取人——刺骑鼬是高尚而专注的童话英雄，他们最认真对待的事莫过于自己的誓言。他们贪婪地汲取神话与传奇，并把故事照单全收；这让他们对世界的理解有所偏颇，但有时，一位英雄所需要的不过是对自身信念的坚定信仰。

比虚构更离奇

无论是神祇因刺骑鼬的真诚而露出微笑，还是他们的电击爆破震撼了周遭众人的心智，现实总会以某种方式向他们的叙事弯曲。任何轻视刺骑鼬的信念、承诺或使命之人都将大祸临头，因为他们可能会被卷入超出自身掌控的事件之中。环境似乎总会以符合刺骑鼬预期的方式展开；因此，即使刺骑鼬的准则将他们引向古怪而艰难的道路，对他们的伙伴而言最好的选择也是加倍投入，并一路见证故事走向其奇幻的终章。

进化状态 帮助刺骑鼬信守诺言，并在严酷逆境下坚守他们的准则。

元素能力 电棘震击 当一名敌人攻击掷骰大失败时，他们会击中你身上一根掠过全身的电弧之针，使其陷入震慑。每当一名敌人以近战徒手攻击对你进行攻击掷骰并大失败，或一名相邻敌人进行任何近战攻击掷骰对你大失败时，他们受到 2 点 electricity 伤害。若你在 power DC 上为专家，此伤害提升至 4；若为大师则为 6；若为传奇则为 8。随后他们陷入震慑 1 轮。

形态能力 防御尖刺 以近战徒手打击或非触及的近战打击命中你的生物，会受到等同于你等级一半的穿刺伤害（最低 1），并须以你的 power DC 进行一次基础反射豁免。

进化能力 守护铠甲 你穿着带电的重甲。你从护甲获得的 AC 物品加值提升至 +6，你的最大敏捷调整值降至 +0，且你的速度降至 20 feet。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.3sr5WMFtZMqg7ELZ]{Porcute}

Many wish for a knight in shining armor to help them out of a sticky situation, but few expect the knight to be a porcupine! Don't judge a book by its cover though—porcutes are honorable and dedicated storybook heroes, taking nothing more seriously than their oaths. They are voracious consumers of myths and legends who take the tales at face value, which gives them a skewed sense of the world, but sometimes all a hero needs is steadfast faith in their beliefs.

Stranger Than Fiction

Whether it's a deity smiling down on the earnestness of porcutes or the result of their electrical blasts jolting the minds of those around them, reality has a way of bending to their narratives. Woe unto anyone who dismisses a porcute's beliefs, promises, or quests lest they be swept along in events beyond their control. Circumstances seem to unfold in ways that conform to a porcute's expectations, so even when a porcute's code takes them down strange and difficult paths, the best option for their companions is to double down and see the story through to its fantastical end.

Porcute, Elecupine, and Erethizap

Evolution Condition Helping porcute keep their word and hold fast to their code against harsh odds.

Elemental Ability Jolt Spines When a foe fumbles an attack, they strike a needle of electricity arcing across your body, shocking them. Whenever a foe critically fails an attack roll against you with a melee unarmed attack, or an adjacent foe critically fails any melee attack roll against you, they take 2 electricity damage. This damage increase to 4 if you're an expert in power DCs, 6 if you're a master in power DCs, and 8 if you're legendary in power DCs. They then become shocked for 1 round.

Form Ability Defensive Quills A creature that hits you with a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike takes piercing damage equal to half your level (minimum 1), with a basic Reflex save against your power DC.

Evolution Ability Protective Armor You wear electrified heavy armor. Your item bonus to AC from armor increases to +6, your maximum Dexterity modifier decreases to +0, and your Speed decreases to 20 feet.

Centesla, Electric Centipede Eldamon.name: 森特斯拉，电蜈蚣艾达蒙 Centesla, Electric Centipede Eldamon
Centesla, Electric Centipede Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.H9nagutddWPgnKSt]{Centesla}

百足拉身形虽小，但灵体强大。他们的雄心驱使其尽可能彻底地完成自己承担的任务。这种完美收尾倾向让他们成为出色的盟友，但若他们被某项具有破坏性或以自我为中心的使命所吸引，也可能变成不屈不挠的敌人。有些百足拉也会选择成为收藏家，囤积的宝藏足以与巨龙和松鼠龙相媲美，不过他们的宝藏往往极其冷僻。

不可能的愚行

想要与百足拉结交的人必须记住：他们是蜈蚣，不是毛毛虫。他们不会变形成蝴蝶。那些相信自己还有另一个生命阶段，或认为自己必须完成不可能任务的百足拉，往往会迎来悲剧结局：他们用那小小身体里的每一分力量劳作，却注定永远无法成功。随着希望流失，他们可能变得封闭寡言，但其中也蕴藏着他们的救赎。若他们必须在无望的任务与维持自己的友谊圈之间做出选择，他们也许会改换任务来让朋友开心。

Centesla, Capacipod, and Dielectripede

电击

艾达蒙豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 air, electricity, metal

进化状态 帮助百足拉满足其完美收尾倾向。

元素能力 分节电容 你将电荷分段储存，使你的容量更高。你可以变为带电 4，而非带电 3。每 10 分钟一次，当你处于带电 2，且将从一个电击能力获得单个电荷时，你改为变为带电 4，而不是带电 3；若你在使用该能力前并非已处于带电 2，则此效果无效。

形态能力 好多腿 由于你腿的数量极端之多，很难被击倒为 prone。你对抗会将你击倒为 prone 的效果时，在强韧与反射豁免及 DC 上获得 +4 环境加值。

进化能力 恒定电矢 只要你处于带电，你的电容器就会射出多余的闪电矢。任何在其回合结束时与你相邻的敌人会受到等同于你带电值两倍的电击伤害；此伤害不会令其失去震慑状态。至 15 级时，此伤害提升为你带电值的三倍。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.H9nagutddWPgnKSt]{Centesla}

Centeslas are small in stature but large in spirit. Their ambition drives them to complete tasks they take on as thoroughly as possible. This completionism makes them excellent allies but can also turn them into implacable foes if they are drawn to a mission that is destructive or self-centered. Some also choose to become collectors with hoards that rival dragons and squirrelashes, though their treasures tend to be extremely esoteric.

Impossible Follies

Those who wish to befriend a centesla must remember that they are centipedes, not caterpillars. They do not transform into butterflies. Centeslas who believe they have another life stage or must complete an impossible task meet a tragic fate, toiling away with every ounce of strength in their tiny bodies yet doomed never to succeed. They might become withdrawn as they lose hope, but therein lies their salvation. If they must choose between a hopeless task and keeping their friendship circle intact, they might switch tasks to make their friends happy.

Centesla, Capacipod, and Dielectripede

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Weaknesses earth, mental, teleportation

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 electricity (1d6 electricity when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping centesla satisfy their completionism.

Elemental Ability Segmented Capacitor You've segmented off your electric charge, granting you higher capacity. You can become charged up to charged 4, instead of charged 3. Once per 10 minutes, when you are charged 2 and would gain a single charge from an electricity power, you become charged 4 instead of charged 3; this has no effect if you weren't already charged 2 before using the power.

Form Ability So Many Legs Due to your extreme number of legs, it's difficult to knock you prone. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves and DCs against effects that would knock you prone.

Evolution Ability Constant Bolts As long as you're charged, your capacitors shoot off superfluous lightning bolts. Any foe that ends its turn adjacent to you takes an amount of electricity damage equal to twice your charged value; this damage doesn't make it lose the shocked condition. At 15th level, this damage increases to three times your charged value.

Squirrelash, Fire Squirrel Eldamon.name: 松鼠鞭挞，火松鼠埃达蒙 Squirrelash, Fire Squirrel Eldamon
Squirrelash, Fire Squirrel Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.p2onx3ieV8cPqdeI]{松栗焰鼠}

松栗焰鼠是彻头彻尾的收藏家；它们通常会为自己的收藏选择一个单一而明确的主题，而不是像百特斯拉那样囤积一堆深奥古怪的零碎物件——后者的“收集癖”更专注于物质财产。一只想要收藏特定种类物体的松栗焰鼠，也可能会与同样专注于那类物体的艾达兽成为朋友或对手；这使得松栗焰鼠与其他类型的艾达兽互动的频率，几乎高于任何其他艾达兽。

再加上有些松栗焰鼠想收藏的东西比实体物体更不具形体，于是与一只分享他们执念的松栗焰鼠相遇的艾达兽就更多了。不止一位艾达兽训练师在职业生涯初期，就与一只希望“收藏朋友”的松栗焰鼠成为挚友。这样的伙伴关系证明非常有价值，因为双方都对结识并与尽可能多的新艾达兽交朋友抱有兴趣。

我看到你了！

多数火元素艾达兽都会持续燃烧，其散发的光照如同火把：20英尺半径内为明亮光照，之后再延伸20英尺为昏暗光照。

松栗焰鼠、炭栗焰鼠与熔栗焰鼠

ELDAMON

FIRE

元素 火

属性调整值 力量-1，敏捷+3，体质+2，智力+0，感知+4，魅力+1

弱点 寒冷，大地，水

速度 25英尺

进化状态 帮助松栗焰鼠完善它们的收藏。

元素能力 蔓延火焰 你的火焰力量会淘气地蔓延到其正常区域之外。你使用一个具有效果区域的火焰力量时，选择正常区域相邻的1个方格，将其纳入该区域。

形态能力 特技攀爬者 你用特技进行攀爬，而不是用运动。

进化能力 烟雾尾巴 当你在同一位置至少连续2轮保持不移动时，你尾巴冒出的烟雾会使你变为隐蔽，直到你再次移动为止。与通常会暴露你位置的隐蔽相同，你不能用它来躲藏。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.p2onx3ieV8cPqdeI]{Squirrelash}

The consummate collectors, squirrelashes typically choose a single specific theme for their collection, rather than possess a hoard of esoteric odds and ends like a centesla whose completionism focuses on material possessions. A squirrelash who wants to collect specific sorts of objects might also become either a friend or rival to an eldamon focused on the same sort of object, which leads squirrelashes to interact with other types of eldamon more than almost any other eldamon does.

Add to that the fact that some squirrelashes want to collect something less tangible that physical objects, and there's even more eldamon who run into a squirrelash who shares their obsession. More than one eldamon trainer has befriended a squirrelash who wishes to collect friends early in their career. Such a partnership proves valuable, as the two share an interest in meeting and befriending as many new eldamon as possible.

I See You!

Most fire eldamon are constantly alight, which sheds light like a torch: bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light to the next 20 feet.

Squirrelash, Squirrelember, and Squirrelava

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 fire (1d6 fire when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping squirrelash perfect their collection.

Elemental Ability Spreading Flame Your fire powers spread mischievously beyond their normal area. When you use a fire power that has an area of effect, choose one square adjacent to the normal area to include in the area.

Form Ability Acrobatic Climber You use Acrobatics to Climb instead of Athletics.

Evolution Ability Smoke Tail When you remain in the same position without moving for at least 2 consecutive rounds, smoke from your tail causes you to become concealed until you move again. As normal for concealment that gives away your position, you can't use it to Hide.

Bakindle, Fire Elephant Eldamon.name: 巴金德尔，火象艾尔达蒙 Bakindle, Fire Elephant Eldamon
Bakindle, Fire Elephant Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.dY4vfWuwvBB0fvTl]{Bakindle}

巴金德尔总是在寻找新的体验，以便创造美好的回忆并将其储存在项链中。这使他们充满好奇，而他们有时会远离任何火元素能量的源头，走得相当远。在旅途中有个朋友陪着会很有帮助，对方既能照看他们，也能一同分享一路上的曲折与转折。

永不忘却

尽管艾达兽的记忆运作方式与凡人生物不同，但巴金德尔认为有些事就像大象一样绝不能忘记。这些通常是影响极其深远的记忆，巴金德尔无法冒险让它们褪色，哪怕跨越万古岁月亦然。拥有此类记忆的巴金德尔会将其放在项链上的特殊位置；若项链与记忆被盗，他们将不惜一切代价夺回。

Bakindle, Loxidate, and Volcammoth

近战 1 脚；伤害 1d6 钝击（仅在进化时1d8 钝击）

进化状态 帮助巴金德尔创造新的回忆与记忆术。

元素能力 火力 你的火之力量燃烧得比他人更为明亮。你从火之力量造成的火焰伤害获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家，该加值提升为+2；若为大师则为+3；若为传奇则为+4。与通常规则一致，这仅适用于来自该元素力量本身的火焰伤害，而不适用于持续火焰伤害。

形态能力 不屈巨象 你对抗试图推撞或绊摔你的行动时，你的强韧或反射DC获得+2环境加值。该加值同样适用于对抗试图将你击倒的法术或效果的豁免。此外，若任何效果将迫使你移动10尺或更多，你仅移动一半距离。

进化能力 惩戒喷发 当一个生物以近战打击对你造成重击时，你背上的火山喷发，对该生物造成等同于你等级一半的火焰伤害，并以你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.dY4vfWuwvBB0fvTl]{Bakindle}

Bakindles are always looking for new experiences in order to make wonderful memories and store them in their necklace. This leads them to be curious, and they sometimes wander off quite far from the source of any fire elemental energies. It helps to have a friend along with them on their journey to look out for them and share the twists and turns.

Never Forget

While eldamon have memories that work differently from mortal creatures, there are some things that a bakindle believes an elephant must never forget. These are typically memories of such great impact that the bakindle can't take the chance that they'll fade, even across the eons. A bakindle who has such memories keeps them in a special place on their necklace and will stop at nothing to retrieve the necklace and the memories if stolen.

Bakindle, Loxidate, and Volcammoth

UNCOMMON

ELDAMON

FIRE

Element Fire

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance fire, metal, plant, wood

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 trunk (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 fire (1d6 fire when evolved only)

Melee 1 foot; Damage 1d6 bludgeoning (1d8 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping bakindle make new memories and mnemonics.

Elemental Ability Firepower Your fire powers burn brighter than others. You gain a +1 status bonus to fire damage with fire powers; this increases to +2 if you're an expert in power DCs, +3 if you're a master in power DCs, and +4 if you're legendary in power DCs. As normal, this applies only to fire damage from the elemental power itself, not to persistent fire damage.

Form Ability Unyielding Elephant You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to Shove or Trip you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you prone. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance.

Evolution Ability Retributive Eruption When a creature critically hits you with a melee Strike, the volcano on your back erupts, dealing fire damage to that creature equal to half your level, with a basic Reflex save using your power DC.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Q6Ncpkf6JkpnPgEA]{鳞配}

鳞配会懒洋洋地待在温暖的地方，通常是阳光充足之处，不过有时也会待在地热能充沛或因其他原因而温暖的地点。在寒冷（气候）或季节里，鳞配会依靠聪明的策略来保持温暖：当周围环境有更多热量时，它们用自身的火焰慢慢加热周围环境，然后把这些热量隔绝保存起来，以便在周遭变得更冷时再次用来为自己取暖。

棋逢对手

鳞配喜欢点燃东西，虽然在相位移出时它们不容易对周围环境这么做，但这只会让它们在被一位训练师朋友把它们相位移入、并好声好气地请求时，更加迫不及待地点火。它们更偏好像可控的篝火那样的火源来让自己保持温暖，而不是会伤害周围环境的失控野火。

鳞配、火蜥燃与棕榈蜥焰

非普通

艾尔达兽

火

抗性 火，金属，植物，木材

弱点 寒冷（气候），大地，水

速度 25尺

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧，娴熟；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 火（仅在进化时为1d6 火）

近战 1 颌骨（仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d6 钝击（仅在进化时为1d8 钝击）

进化状态 帮助鳞配找到一个极佳的日光浴地点。

元素能力 不灭之焰 他人尤其难以熄灭你的火焰，即使有效的协助也比平常帮助更少。你元素力量造成的持续火焰伤害之纯骰检定DC从DC 15提高到DC 16；在特别有效的协助后，则从DC 10提高到DC 12。

形态能力 鬣蜥活力 你对抗麻痹与睡眠的豁免获得+2环境加值。若你对任一状态掷出成功，则改为大成功或大失败中的大成功；且若你将被麻痹或陷入睡眠至少2轮，将该持续时间减少1轮。

进化能力 深度灼烧 你尾巴中的不灭之焰强化你的燃烧攻击。你以你的力量造成的持续火焰伤害获得+2状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Q6Ncpkf6JkpnPgEA]{Squamatch}

Squamatches lounge around in warm places, usually where there's lots of sun, though sometimes in places with lots of geothermal energy or that are warm for some other reason. In cold climates or seasons, squamatches rely on clever strategies to remain warm, using their own flames to slowly heat up their surroundings up when there's more heat around and then insulating that heat so they can use it to heat themselves up again later when things get even colder around them.

Met Their Match

Squamatches love to light things on fire, and while they can't easily do so to their surroundings when phased out, that only means they're even more eager to set fires when an eldamon trainer friend phases them in and asks them nicely. They prefer something more like a controlled campfire to keep them warm rather than an out-of-control wildfire that will harm the environment around them.

Squamatch, Igunite, and Iguanapalm

UNCOMMON

ELDAMON

FIRE

Element Fire

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance fire, metal, plant, wood

Weaknesses cold, earth, water

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 fire (1d6 fire when evolved only)

Melee 1 jaws (reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d6 bludgeoning (1d8 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping squamatch find an excellent location for sunbathing.

Elemental Ability Undying Flame It's particularly hard for others to put out your flames, and even an effective form of assistance helps less than usual. The flat check DCs for the persistent fire damage from your elemental powers increase from DC 15 to DC 16, or from DC 10 to DC 12 after especially effective assistance.

Form Ability Iguana's Verve You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your saving throws against paralysis and sleep. If you roll a success against either condition, you get a critical success instead, and if you would be paralyzed or put to sleep for at least 2 rounds, reduce that duration by 1 round.

Evolution Ability Deep Burns The undying flame in your tail empowers your burning attacks. You gain a +2 status bonus to persistent fire damage you deal with your powers.

Ophini, Fiery Wheel Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.JHgwkQCcGrNRmIsk]{奥菲尼}

奥菲尼想要看遍周围世界里一切可看的事物，这让它们前往不寻常的地点，也让希望找到并结交这种稀有而难以捉摸的艾达兽的凡人很难预测或在遭遇中遇见它们。

然而，奥菲尼永无止境的漫游之旅，与同样怀有强烈漫游渴望的凡人朋友可谓天作之合。对奥菲尼而言，真正的快乐不在旅程本身，而在于沿途有机会看到的景色。要是有办法不必进行漫长的冒险式旅行就能看遍那些景色，大多数奥菲尼都会毫不犹豫地抓住这个机会。但现实情况是，奥菲尼必须不断移动，才能找到新的地方。

为了说服奥菲尼同行，艾达兽爱好者有时会讲述他们曾见过的美丽之地，并提出带奥菲尼去看那些景色。这种技巧相当有效，不过如果奥菲尼已经去过并看过了，那就可能适得其反！

不要害怕！

有些生物觉得奥菲尼的多只眼睛有些令人不安、让人心里发毛。因此，当奥菲尼想在不吓到对话伙伴的情况下进行交谈时，它们常常会用一句安抚的话开场，比如“不要害怕！”这通常有助于让场面平静下来，但有时也会让事情变得更糟：原本并不害怕的生物听到奥菲尼喊出这句话，反而会感到不安。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.JHgwkQCcGrNRmIsk]{Ophini}

Ophinis want to see everything there is to see in the world around them, which takes them to unusual locales and makes them hard to predict or encounter for mortals hoping to find and befriend the rare and elusive eldamon.

However, an ophini's neverending peregrinations are a perfect match for a mortal friend with an equal sense of wanderlust. For ophinis, the true joy isn't in the journey itself but instead in the sights they have a chance to see along the way. If there was some way to see all those sights without having to travel on a lengthy adventure, most ophinis wouldn't hesitate to take that opportunity. But the reality of the situation is that ophinis need to stay on the move in order to find new places.

To convince an ophini to come along, eldamon enthusiasts sometimes try to tell stories about beautiful places they've seen before and offer to show those sights to the ophini. This technique can be quite effective, though it can backfire if the ophini has already been there and seen that!

Be Not Afraid!

Some creatures find ophinis' many eyes to be somewhat unnerving and unsettling. Thus, when an ophini wishes to engage in a conversation without scaring their conversational partner, they often open with a comforting line such as "Be not afraid!" Often this helps calm things down, but sometimes it can make matters worse, as a creature who otherwise wouldn't have been frightened hears the ophini call out and becomes unnerved.

Potfox, Force Fox Eldamon.name: Potfox，力场狐灵盟兽 Potfox, Force Fox Eldamon
Potfox, Force Fox Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.9wtgzqqbu7VaP8q9]{壶狐}

壶狐最爱的事情莫过于一场老派的露天烤肉或盛宴，尽管当它们相位移出时，很难与凡人朋友一同参与。但这从不妨碍壶狐——它们会乐呵呵地对别人喊出建议，不管对方想不想听。人多手杂会坏了汤，但壶狐觉得人越多越热闹；毕竟，一只壶狐有许多颗头，每颗头都有自己的一套烹饪建议。

感召水壶

壶狐对自己是能变形为大锅的“壶”，而不是水壶这点非常讲究。没人确切知道它们为什么如此强硬地强调自己不是水壶，但这或许与某句老说法有关。

壶狐、坩冷卓与坩卡温

进化状态 帮助壶狐成为拥有许多配方的酿造大师。

元素能力 搅动一锅 当你使用力场力量重新定位一名敌人时，你可以把他们再多移动一点点。每当你的力场力量允许你重新定位一名敌人10英尺或更多时，你可以额外重新定位他们5英尺。若你的力场力量允许你重新定位一名敌人30英尺或更多，则你改为额外重新定位他们10英尺。

形态能力 有壶在身，意志旅行 你的形态的一部分是一只活的壶，你可以用它来保护自己。以单动作，你可以撤入你的壶中。若你如此做，你获得AC+2环境加值并且陷入定身。这些效果持续到你下个回合结束，不过你可以以单动作提前结束该效果。

进化能力 狐力 你舞动的狐力鬼火会短暂揭示隐藏生物，其方式类似妖火。当你以力场力量进行一次力量攻击检定命中一个生物且其受到力场伤害，或一个生物对抗你的力场力量的豁免失败且其受到力场伤害时，若该生物原本为隐形，则改为隐蔽；若其原本可见，则它不能处于隐蔽。此效果持续至你下个回合结束。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.9wtgzqqbu7VaP8q9]{Potfox}

Potfoxes love nothing more than an old-fashioned cookout or banquet, although they have some trouble participating alongside mortal friends when they're phased out. That never stops potfoxes though, as they'll happily shout out advice to others, whether they want it or not. Too many cooks spoil the broth, but potfox thinks the more the merrier; after all, a given potfox has plenty of heads, each with their own cooking advice.

Calling the Kettle

Potfoxes are very particular about being pots that transform into cauldrons, not kettles. No one is quite sure why they're so strident that they aren't kettles, but it might have something to do with the old expression.

Potfox, Kankoldron, and Kankawen

Speed 25 feet

Evolution Condition Helping potfox become a brewmaster with many recipes.

Elemental Ability Stir the Pot When you reposition a foe using your force powers, you can move them just a little bit more. Whenever your force power allows you to reposition a foe 10 feet or more, you can reposition them 5 more feet. If your force power allows you to reposition a foe 30 feet or more, you can reposition them 10 more feet instead.

Form Ability Have Pot, Will Travel Part of your form is a living pot, which you can use for protection. As a single action, you can Retreat Into your Pot. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and are immobilized. These effects last until the end of your next turn, though you can end the effect early with a single action.

Evolution Ability Foxforce Your dancing wisps of fox force briefly reveal hidden creatures similarly to faerie fire. When you hit a creature with a power attack roll with a force power and it takes force damage, or a creature fails its saving throw against your force power and it takes force damage, if the creature was invisible, it becomes concealed instead, and if it was visible, it can't be concealed. This effect lasts until the end of your next turn.

Tsurikabe, Force Wall Eldamon.name: 筑墙，力场墙埃达蒙 Tsurikabe, Force Wall Eldamon
Tsurikabe, Force Wall Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.v9x8D8Enrh7pZzXJ]{Tsurikabe}

吊壁是十足的挑衅者，专门引诱别人对它们的恶作剧与把戏作出反应。应对它的最佳方式就是无视吊壁，而不是上钩并陪它们玩。

挨打长教训

由于它们处于相位脱离状态，推吊壁不会产生任何效果，这点不同于真正的实体墙。根据传奇，在吊壁的左下角狠狠敲一下，即使它处于相位脱离状态，也能把它赶走。实际上，这可能完全没有效果，但吊壁们确实会因看到凡人尝试这样做而感到好笑。

吊壁、振壁与幕壁

非普通

元素 力场

属性调整值 力量 +2，敏捷 +1，体质 +3，智力 -1，感知 +4，魅力 +0

艾达盟语言 以太兰语

艾达盟技能 运动、欺瞒、隐匿

艾达盟豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 力场、灵体

弱点 死亡、光

速度 25尺

近战 1 身体（仅在进化时触及10尺，仅在进化时推撞）；伤害 1d6 钝击（仅在进化时为1d8 钝击）

进化状态 帮助吊壁实施一场史诗级的诱饵计谋或一连串精彩的计谋。

元素能力 迷惑力场 你用力场能力引诱并折磨敌人，使其短暂迷乱并削弱其下一次攻击。当你以力场能力进行一次强力攻击掷骰命中敌人，或敌人对抗你力场能力的豁免失败时，你会干扰它的下一次攻击。在你下一回合结束前，它下一次造成伤害时，其伤害掷骰承受-2环境减值。若你在能力DC上为专家，该环境减值提升为-4；若为大师则为-6；若为传奇则为-8。

形态能力 隔断通行 你的身体本质上是一面墙，因此很难穿过你的空间。尽管超小型生物仍可进入你的空间，但它们无法自动穿过，仍需要翻滚穿越或使用类似能力。对你进行翻滚穿越或使用类似能力的DC为你的能力DC，或通常DC再加+2环境加值，两者取较高者。

进化能力 封禁巨槌 你的巨槌会击退生物并禁止它们返回。当你用身体徒手攻击进行推撞时，你可以改用巨槌。若如此做，你的用于推撞的运动检定获得+2环境加值。若你成功，则在目标的下一回合中，若它在其移动动作期间试图朝你移动，则它必须进行一次对抗你能力DC的强韧豁免；若失败，则它在该移动动作期间无法朝你移动。若成功，则它可以朝你移动，且无需再尝试任何进一步的豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.v9x8D8Enrh7pZzXJ]{Tsurikabe}

Tsurikabe are consummate provocateurs, baiting others into responding to their pranks and tricks. The best way to handle it is just to ignore the tsurikabe, rather than rising to the bait and entertaining them.

Hard Knocks

Because they're phased out, pushing on a tsurikabe doesn't have any effect, unlike a physical wall. According to legend, giving a solid knock on the bottom-left of a tsurikabe can send it packing, even though it's phased out. In reality, this might not have any effect, but tsurikabes are certainly amused to see mortals try it.

Tsurikabe, Furikabe, and Murikabe

FORCE

ELDAMON

Element Force

Attribute Modifiers Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Aetheran

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Athletics, Deception, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Weaknesses death, light

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 body (reach 10 feet when evolved only, shove when evolved only); Damage 1d6 bludgeoning (1d8 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping tsurikabe pull off an epic baiting scheme or a series of great schemes.

Elemental Ability Confounding Force You bait and bedevil foes with your force powers, momentarily confounding them and weakening their next attack. When you hit a foe with a power attack roll on a force power or a foe fails their saving throw against your force power, you interfere with their next attack. The next time they deal damage before the end of your next turn, they take a -2 circumstance penalty on their damage roll. This increases to a -4 circumstance penalty if you're an expert in power DCs, -6 if you're a master in power DCs, and -8 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability Wall Off Your body is essentially a wall, so it's difficult to move through your space. While Tiny creatures can still enter your space, they can't automatically cross through it, and they still need to Tumble Through or use a similar ability. The DC to Tumble Through or use a similar ability against you is either your power DC or the usual DC with a +2 circumstance bonus, whichever is higher.

Evolution Ability Banhammer Your hammer rebuffs creatures and bans them from returning. When you Shove with your body unarmed attack, you can use your hammer instead. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Athletics check to Shove. If you succeed, on the target's next turn, if it attempts to move toward you during its move action, it must succeed at a Fortitude save against your power DC; on a failure, it can't move toward you during that move action. On a success, it can move toward you and doesn't need to attempt any further saving throws.

Cephalittle, Force Cephalopod Eldamon.name: 小头仔，力场头足类艾达蒙 Cephalittle, Force Cephalopod Eldamon
Cephalittle, Force Cephalopod Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.naS73IbuJn0CiqIX]{小头足}

小头足努力计算角度、弧线与向量，常出没于拥有有趣几何图案的地点。尽管它们看起来像深海头足类，但小头足天生是陆栖生物。

数学的力量

小头足痴迷于几何与其他数学在解决各种日常问题上的力量。有时，它们会把几何当作解决某件事的首选方案，即使其实用更不迂回的方法会更容易；但就算有人指出这一点，它们也只会继续用数学钻下去。这样更有趣！

艾达兽豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 力场、灵体

弱点 死亡、光

速度 25 尺

近战 1 触手（灵活、娴熟、仅在进化时触及 10 尺）；伤害 1d4 钝击（仅在进化时为 1d6 钝击）

进化状态 帮助小头足解决一个几何学上的开创性问题，或以其他方式达成一次重大的几何突破。

元素能力 力场法器 你对几何的理解让你能把力场施加到更广的法器点范围上。你具有射程的力场能力的射程增加 20 尺。这只影响你能影响目标的射程；不会增加你能把它们重新定位的距离。你爆发、锥形与散发的力场能力的区域长度或半径增加 5 尺。若你在能力 DC 上为专家，则区域的长度或半径改为增加 10 尺。

形态能力 法器触手 你的触手数量繁多，由力场能量驱动，并在你沿地面移动时保持几何稳定。你对抗试图推撞或绊摔你的行为时，你的强韧或反射 DC 获得 +2 环境加值。此加值也适用于对抗试图移动你或让你倒地的法术或效果的豁免。当你靠近墙面、天花板或其他具有易于抓握边缘的边界时，若某个效果将会迫使你移动，你可以用触手尝试抓握边缘，以在成功时将强迫移动减少 20 尺，或在大成功或大失败时将强迫移动减少 30 尺，而不是减少坠落距离。

进化能力 以太第三眼 你拥有一只以太第三眼——将浓缩的力场能量与以太精粹混合为元素形态——这只第三眼让你能通过力场以几何方式感知事物。你对以隐蔽或隐藏生物为目标所需的纯骰检定自动成功。
