@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.naS73IbuJn0CiqIX]{Cephalittle}

Cephalittle work hard to calculate angles, arcs, and vectors, and they're found in places with interesting geometric patterns. While they resemble deep-sea cephalopods, cephalittle are land dwellers by nature.

The Power of Math

Cephalittle is obsessed with the power of geometry and other math to solve all sorts of everyday problems. Sometimes they use geometry as their first choice as a solution to something that might be easier to handle with a less circuitous method, but even when pointed out, they'll just keep at it using math. It's more fun that way!

Chephalittle, Cephalocus, and Cephalord

UNCOMMON

FORCE

ELDAMON

Element Force

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Aetheran

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance force, spirit

Weaknesses death, light

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 arm (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping cephalittle solve a groundbreaking problem in geometry or otherwise reach a great geometric breakthrough.

Elemental Ability Locus of Force Your understanding of geometry allows you to apply your force across a wider locus of points. The range of your force powers that have a range increases by 20 feet. This only affects the range at which you can affect targets; it doesn't increase the distance you can reposition them. The area of your burst, cone, and emanation force powers increases by 5 feet in length or radius. If you're an expert in power DCs, the area increases by 10 feet in length or radius instead.

Form Ability Locus Arms Your arms are myriad, powered by force energy, and geometrically stable as you move across the ground. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to Shove or Trip you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to move you or knock you prone. When an effect would force you to move while you are near a wall, ceiling, or other edge with easy handholds, you can attempt to Grab an Edge with your arms to reduce the forced movement by 20 feet on a success or 30 feet on a critical success, instead of reducing falling distance.

Evolution Ability Aetheric Third Eye You have a third eye of aether, concentrated force energy mixed with etheric essence into elemental form, and that third eye allows you to perceive things geometrically through forces. You automatically succeed on flat checks to target concealed or hidden creatures.

Psyrano, Telekinetic T-Rex Eldamon.name: 普赛拉诺，念动力霸王龙艾尔达蒙 Psyrano, Telekinetic T-Rex Eldamon
Psyrano, Telekinetic T-Rex Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.jZvDwDaZjzIwUy8T]{Psyrano}

如果你去问一只普赛拉诺，它们会说自己是极其聪明且优雅的心智艾达兽，拥有无可挑剔的对话品味。实际上，它们只是力场艾达兽的冒牌货，用冗长艰深的辞藻来掩盖真相。

眼不见，心不烦

普赛拉诺模仿心智艾达兽的能力足够逼真，以至于学者们花了一段时间才终于意识到普赛拉诺其实是力场艾达兽。直到将它们力量的效果与其他力场艾达兽以及心智艾达兽的效果进行对比后，才得出了这一结论。由于普赛拉诺本就稀少，而且还积极试图迷惑他人使其误判，因此数据很难收集，这也无助于研究。通过无视普赛拉诺的说法与其欺瞒性的鳞片色泽，转而观察它们的行动，真相最终浮出水面。

普赛拉诺、以太足与雷克斯佩尔

稀有

力场

艾达兽

元素 力场

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

艾达兽生命值 6

艾达兽豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

弱点 死亡，光

速度 25尺

近战 1 力场之手（灵巧，敏捷，进化时仅触及 10尺）；伤害 1d4 力场（进化时仅 1d6 力场）

进化状态 帮助普赛拉诺攀升到更高层次的晦涩对谈。

元素能力 念动力风暴 无论你是想把自己的力场力量伪装成另一种力量，还是只是喜欢让物体到处飞，你都能通过物体来传递力场力量——即使别人会使用以太、那种由纺成丝线的纯粹力场所构成的介质。每当你的力场力量将造成力场伤害时，你可以选择改为通过小型物体造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害（由你选择）。如果该力量本就会投掷一个物体并造成上述某一种伤害类型，则你改为在伤害掷骰上获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC方面为专家，则该状态加值提升为+2；若为大师则为+3；若为传奇则为+4。

形态能力 力场之手 你那短小的手臂单靠自身做不了多少事，但你可以在想要时随时让以太构成的力场之手显现出来，而它们相当有力。当你使用运动进行擒抱、推开或绊摔时，你可以用巨大的力场之手来协助你。若你如此做，你使用你的智力调整值取代力量调整值，并在你的运动检定上获得+1环境加值。当你使用一项不会造成力场伤害的力场力量时，你可以尝试进行一次欺瞒检定，对抗观察者的察觉、自然或神秘学DC中较高者，以欺骗对方让其认为你使用的是心智力量而非力场力量。

进化能力 以太尖刺 你浑身覆盖由以太构成的尖刺，会以力场伤害你的敌人。一名生物若尝试对你进行一次近战徒手打击或一次非触及的近战打击（无论是否命中你），其受到4点力场伤害，并需针对你的力量DC进行一次基础反射豁免。19级时，此伤害提升为5点力场伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.jZvDwDaZjzIwUy8T]{Psyrano}

If you ask a psyrano, they're an extremely intelligent and classy mind eldamon with impeccable conversational sensibilities. In reality, they're force eldamon posers who use sesquipedalian speech to obfuscate the truth.

Out of Sight, Out of Mind

Psyrano's ability to impersonate a mind eldamon is convincing enough that it took scholars some time to eventually realize psyranos were force eldamon. It only came after comparing the effects of their powers to those of other force eldamon as well as mind eldamon that the determination was made. It didn't help that data is hard to collect because psyranos are rare to begin with and are actively attempting to confuse people into misidentifying them. By ignoring psyranos' statements and deceptive scale coloration and instead watching their actions, the truth eventually came to light.

Psyrano, Aetheropod, and Rexpel

RARE

FORCE

ELDAMON

Element Force

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Aetheran

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance force, spirit

Weaknesses death, light

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 force hand (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 force (1d6 force when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping psyrano ascend to new heights of abstruse conversation.

Elemental Ability Telekinetic Storm Whether you're trying to disguise your force powers as a different kind of power or just enjoy moving objects around, you deliver force powers via objects even when others would use aether, pure threads of spun force. Any time your force power would deal force damage, you can choose to have it deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage instead (your choice) via the use of small objects. If the power would already throw an object and deal one of those damage types, you instead gain a +1 status bonus to the damage roll; this status bonus increases to +2 if you're an expert in power DCs, +3 if you're a master in power DCs, and +4 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability Force Hands Your tiny arms can't do much on their own, but you keep force hands of aether manifested whenever you desire, and those pack quite a punch. When you use Athletics to Grapple, Shove, or Trip, you can use your giant force hands to assist you. If you do, you use your Intelligence modifier instead of your Strength modifier, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Athletics check. When you use a force power that doesn't deal force damage, you can attempt a Deception check against the higher of an observer's Perception, Nature, or Occultism DC to trick them into thinking you are using a mind power instead of a force power.

Evolution Ability Aetheric Spikes You are covered in spikes made of aether that damage your foes with force. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes 4 force damage, with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to 5 force damage.

Chillot, Ice Otter Eldamon.name: 奇洛特，冰水獭埃达蒙 Chillot, Ice Otter Eldamon
Chillot, Ice Otter Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.TZRFduYXITMGlmPM]{寒獭}

寒獭喜欢精彩的鬼故事，而且它们并不怎么在意故事是怎么来的——不管是在学习一个古老的经典，还是把自己的改编加进故事里来误导听众、提升紧张感。只有一点可以肯定：听寒獭讲故事时你可不能掉以轻心，否则就等着突然被吓一跳吧！寒獭吓唬朋友并不是为了让他们不舒服，而是把这当作一种通过共同经历来建立羁绊的方式。

脊背发凉

寒獭既能凭借强大的寒冰力量，也能通过鬼故事让他人的脊背发凉。在寒獭看来，两者同等重要，而且一起使用时还能相辅相成。那些从未听过寒獭鬼故事的人确信：寒獭的冰之力量带来的寒意肯定远胜于单纯的故事。但与寒獭一同冒险的人未必同意。

寒獭、暴雪獭与冰川獭

寒冷

艾达兽

元素 冰

属性调整值 力量 -1，敏捷 +3，体质 +2，智力 +0，感知 +4，魅力 +1

艾达兽语言 Cryan

艾达兽生命值 6

艾达兽技能 杂技、威吓、隐匿

艾达兽豁免 反射

感官 幽灵嗅探、弱光视野

抗力 寒冷、植物、音波、时代、木质

弱点 肉体、大地、火、金属

速度 25英尺

近战 1 尾巴（灵巧、娴熟；仅在进化后触及10英尺）；伤害 1d4 寒冷（仅在进化后为1d6 寒冷）

进化状态 帮助寒獭学会真正令人脊背发麻的鬼故事。

元素能力 冰之脉络 在你体内奔涌的寒意会抑制大多数持续性伤害，使其更难维持。你对除精神、活力与虚无伤害（它们会直接攻击你的心智或生命力）之外的持续性伤害进行的纯骰检定DC从DC 15降至DC 12；若有格外有效的协助，则从DC 10降至DC 7。

形态能力 幽灵嗅探 你拥有嗅觉作为一种不精确感官，范围30英尺（如常规嗅觉，在顺风或逆风时距离减半或加倍），但该嗅觉只能闻到幽灵、灵体、祟灵以及其他无形生物。若该生物为无形且完全处于某个固体物体内部，幽灵嗅探不会察觉到它，除非你在同一格或相邻一格内主动嗅闻该物体，这需要单动作。

进化能力 无畏 有人说你冷血，也有人说你无所畏惧。不管怎样，别人觉得可怕的事，你通常只觉得刺激。每当你获得惊惧（状态）时，你将惊惧值减少1。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.TZRFduYXITMGlmPM]{Chillot}

Chillots love a good ghost story, and they don't much care how they come about it, whether they're learning an old classic or putting their own spin on a tale to throw the listeners off and increase the tension. One thing's for sure: you can't be complacent when listening to a chillot's stories, or you're in for a sudden fright! Chillots don't scare their friends out of a desire to make them uncomfortable, but rather as a way to bond over a shared experience.

Chill Down Your Spine

Chillots can send a chill down others' spines both through their mighty ice powers and through their ghost stories. Neither is more important than the other in a chillot's mind, and they have a synergy when used together. Those who've never heard a chillot's ghost stories are certain that a chillot's ice powers surely must cause greater chills than mere stories. Those who adventure alongside a chillot don't necessarily agree.

Chillot, Blizzotter, and Glaciotter

COLD

ELDAMON

Element Ice

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Cryan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses ghost sniffer, low-light vision

Resistance cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

Weaknesses body, earth, fire, metal

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 cold (1d6 cold when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping chillot learn truly spine-tingling ghost stories.

Elemental Ability Veins of Ice The cold pumping through your body chills out most forms of persistent damage, making it harder for them to last. Your flat check DC against persistent damage other than mental, vitality, and void damage (which attack your mind or life force directly) decreases from DC 15 to DC 12, or from DC 10 to DC 7 with especially effective assistance.

Form Ability Ghost Sniffer You have scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet (halved and doubled as normal for scent when smelling upwind or downwind), except the scent can only smell ghosts, spirits, haunts, and other incorporeal creatures. If the creature is incorporeal and fully within a solid object, ghost sniffer doesn't notice them unless you actively sniffs the object while within the same or an adjacent square, which requires a single action.

Evolution Ability Dauntless Some call you cold-blooded, others call you fearless. Either way, things others find scary you normally just find exciting. Whenever you gain the frightened condition, you reduce the frightened value by 1.

Pengil, Ice Penguin Eldamon.name: 彭吉尔，冰企鹅艾达蒙 Pengil, Ice Penguin Eldamon
Pengil, Ice Penguin Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0SLydZwoW5xs1h2e]{Pengil}

彭吉尔会兴高采烈地在冰面上滑行，通常用自己的肚子，但有时也会坐在冰制雪橇上。不管哪种方式，它们都享受速度与运动带来的刺激。

如果它们的冒险让它们离开了最适合滑行的地面、前往几乎无法滑行的地方，那么在长途旅程中，它们有时会比其他艾达蒙遇到更多麻烦。

但另一方面，冒险也给了它们机会，去发现那些从未见过的奇妙滑行地点。

玫瑰花苞

当冬季结束、花朵的花苞开始出现时，彭吉尔会记起并保存前一个冬天里它们最棒的雪橇与滑行场地。当彭吉尔的北地雪橇在逐渐升高的热度中融化时，它们有时会把雪橇安放在附近的某处“长眠”，不论那是大树之下，还是花田之中。

彭吉尔、阿普特诺与斯芬尼冰刺

罕见

寒冷

艾达蒙

元素 冰

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

艾达蒙语言 Cryan

艾达蒙生命值 6

艾达蒙技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

艾达蒙豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

弱点 body, earth, fire, metal

速度 25 feet

近战 1 爪击（agile, finesse；仅在进化后触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 cold（仅在进化后为 1d6 cold）

进化状态 帮助彭吉尔享受一次史诗般的滑行体验。

元素能力 冰行者 你无视由冰与雪造成的困难地形与强困难地形，并且在穿越冰面时不会冒着坠落的风险。你将冻结状态对你的速度造成的减值减少 10 feet。

形态能力 滑行 当你用肚皮滑行时，你可以沿直线移动得更快。每当你步行，你都可以选择用肚皮滑行。若你如此做，你必须沿直线移动，但你获得 +15-foot 环境加值至你的速度。

进化能力 雪之斗篷 背上的一层雪之斗篷会在你滑行时保护你，并强化你滑行的能力。当你使用你的滑行能力时，你获得 +25-foot 环境加值至你的速度，而非 +15-foot 环境加值。你在移动时会被雪之斗篷隐蔽，并且当你使用滑行能力移动时，你获得 +2 环境加值至 AC。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0SLydZwoW5xs1h2e]{Pengil}

Pengils sled along the icy ground in delight, usually via their own belly, but sometimes on a sled made of ice. Etiher way, they enjoy the thrill of the speed and the motion.

They sometimes have more trouble than other eldamon on long journeys if their adventures take them away from the best sledding grounds and to places where they can barely sled at all.

On the other hand, though, an adventure gives them a chance to find wondrous sledding locations that they've never seen before.

Rosebud

When the winter ends and the buds of flowers begin to appear, pengils remember and preserve their finest sleds and sledding grounds from the previous winter. When a pengil's boreal sled melts in the growing heat, they sometimes lay it to rest beneath whatever's nearby, whether that's a large tree or a field of flowers.

Pengil, Aptenow, and Sphenicicle

UNCOMMON

COLD

ELDAMON

Element Ice

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Cryan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

Weaknesses body, earth, fire, metal

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 cold (1d6 cold when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping pengil enjoy an epic sledding experience.

Elemental Ability Icewalker You ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from ice and snow and don't risk falling when crossing ice. You reduce the penalty to your Speeds from the frozen condition by 10 feet.

Form Ability Slide When you slide on your belly, you can move faster in a straight line. Whenever you Stride, you can choose to slide on your belly. If you do, you must move in a straight line, but you gain a +15-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed.

Evolution Ability Cloak of Snow A cloak of snow along your back protects you while sliding and enhances your ability to slide. You gain a +25-foot circumstance bonus to your Speed when you use your slide ability, instead of a +15-foot circumstance bonus. You are concealed by the cloak of snow while moving, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC while moving using your slide ability.

Coolibou, Snow Reindeer Eldamon.name: 库利博，雪驯鹿埃尔达蒙 Coolibou, Snow Reindeer Eldamon
Coolibou, Snow Reindeer Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.AIGS1GvR6OHZdYRq]{库利驯鹿}

库利驯鹿知道“给予胜于接受”，因此他们总能为每一位朋友——无论是艾达兽还是凡人——找到最完美的礼物。给他们的松鼠蜥伙伴，就送收藏中的一件物品；给他们的黄玉猫同伴，就送某样足够闪亮而体面的东西；给他们的甲壳螂盟友，就送一枚特别的好运护符；诸如此类。

他们偏好给予，并不代表库利驯鹿不喜欢收礼，尤其是那些能体现赠礼者个人关联的礼物。

红鼻子库利驯鹿

有些稀有的库利驯鹿长着红鼻子，会以元素能量发光。它们是闪光发亮艾达兽的一种亚类，大约每 10 只闪光库利驯鹿中就有 1 只属于此类。目前尚不清楚让它们以这种方式发光的原因是暴露于其他元素能量还是别的因素，但不管怎样，它们的光芒在穿行雪地环境时会很有帮助。

科利驯鹿、霜角鹿与北风鹿

非普通

寒冷

艾达兽

元素 冰

艾达兽技能 Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

艾达兽豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

弱点 body, earth, fire, metal

速度 25 feet

近战 1 antler (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); 伤害 1d4 cold（仅在进化时为 1d6 cold）

进化状态 帮助库利驯鹿给予与收到美妙的礼物。

元素能力 深度积累 当你的冰之力量在一个生物身上积累冻结状态时，冻结状态的最大值提高 2（起始为 7，在 20 级时最大到 12）。

形态能力 雪绒毛 你蓬松如雪的皮毛会在对方的寒意积累得越多时，越能为你抵御生物的攻击。当某个生物因你的冰之力量而冻结达到 3 或更高时，你对该生物的攻击获得 AC +1 环境加值；当其冻结达到 6 或更高时提高为 +2；冻结达到 9 或更高时为 +3；冻结达到 12 或更高时为 +4。

进化能力 传送门鹿角 你能在双角之间使用元素冰传送门来瞄准你的冰之力量。为你任意一项冰之力量选择你鹿角 10- foot 触及范围内的任意空间作为起点。这不仅在多数情况下等同于将其射程有效提高 10 feet，也能让你更有利地摆放区域效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.AIGS1GvR6OHZdYRq]{Coolibou}

Coolibou know that it's better to give than it is to receive, and so they always find the perfect gifts to provide to each and every one of their friends, eldamon and mortal alike. For their squirrelash buddy, an item in their collection; for their kitopaz compatriot, something sufficiently shiny and dignified; for their ankhrub ally, a special good luck charm; and so on.

Just because they prefer to give, it doesn't mean coolibou don't find joy in receiving gifts, especially those that show a giver's personal connection.

Red-Nosed Coolibou

Some rare coolibou have red noses, which glow with elemental energy. They're a subcategory of shiny glowing eldamon, and they make up roughly 1 in 10 shiny coolibou. It's unclear whether what makes them glow in this way is exposure to other elemental energies or something else, but either way, their glow can be helpful when navigating through snowy environments.

Collibou, Rangifroze, and Cariboreas

UNCOMMON

COLD

Senses low-light vision

Resistance cold, plant, sonic, time, wood

Weaknesses body, earth, fire, metal

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 antler (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 cold (1d6 cold when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping coolibou give and receive wonderful gifts.

Elemental Ability Deep Accumulation When your ice powers accumulate the frozen condition on a creature, the maximum value for the frozen condition increases by 2 (starting at 7, to a maximum of 12 at 20th level).

Form Ability Snow Fur Your fluffy snowlike fur grants you protection against creatures' attacks the more their chill accumulates. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against a creature's attacks when they are frozen 3 or more from your ice powers, which increases to +2 when they are frozen 6 or more, +3 when they are frozen 9 or more, and +4 when they are frozen 12 or more.

Evolution Ability Portal Antlers You can use the elemental ice portal between your antlers to aim your ice powers. Choose any space within your antlers' 10- foot reach as the origin point for any of your ice powers. This not only allows you to effectively increase their range by 10 feet in most cases, but also allows you to position area effects more advantageously.

Skolld, Ice Wolf Eldamon.name: 斯科尔德，冰狼艾尔达蒙 Skolld, Ice Wolf Eldamon
Skolld, Ice Wolf Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.7A6ZYlfHrYhzEW1Z]{斯寇尔德}

斯寇尔德会忠诚地守卫并保护他们所选择的地点、生物或物品，倾尽所有。因此，他们对守护对象的选择是一项极其私密且重要的人生决定。虽然斯寇尔德确实有可能更换自己的守护对象，但除非别无选择，否则大多数斯寇尔德都过于固执而不会这么做，例如守护对象拒绝斯寇尔德的保护，或守护对象因时代或斯寇尔德无法阻止的其他力量而被毁坏。

把它冻起来

斯寇尔德对守护所选守护对象的奉献意味着他们常常必须在其他方面做出牺牲，尤其是在他们自己的社交生活中所安排的任何事件或计划上。为了保护守护对象免受突如其来的威胁或潜在危险，他们常常不得不推迟或取消约定，甚至在最后一刻也不例外。这有时会让他们看起来善变且不可靠，但事实恰恰相反；斯寇尔德只是有自己的优先顺序，而那个优先顺序就是他们的守护对象。

斯寇尔德、阿玛瑞姆与芬瑞斯

稀有

寒冷

艾达兽

元素 冰

艾达兽语言 克莱安语

艾达兽生命值 6

艾达兽技能 运动，威吓，潜行

艾达兽豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 寒冷，植物，音波，时代，木质

弱点 肉体，大地，火，金属

速度 25尺

近战 1 颌骨（灵巧，娴熟；仅在进化时触及 10尺）；伤害 1d4 寒冷（仅在进化时为 1d6 寒冷）

近战 1 爪击（仅在进化时触及 10尺）；伤害 1d6 挥砍（仅在进化时为 1d8 挥砍）

进化状态 帮助斯寇尔德守护对他们最重要的事物。

元素能力 依附寒霜 你召唤出的冰、霜与雪会残留并黏附在其目标上。用于降低冻结状态数值的一个交互动作，无法将冻结数值降低到 1 以下，除非该生物的冻结为 1；随后，该生物会在 1 分钟内暂时免疫依附寒霜。

形态能力 插身守护者 你会挡在你想保护之人的攻击路线上。当你希望如此时，穿过你空间的攻击中，你提供标准掩蔽而非较小掩蔽。

进化能力 冻结之魂 必要时，为了守护对你重要之物，你会紧抓意识不放。当你因伤害而被降至 0 生命值时，你改为保持在 1 生命值。之后，你在 1 小时内无法从冻结之魂中获益。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.7A6ZYlfHrYhzEW1Z]{Skolld}

A skolld loyally guards and protects their chosen location, creature, or item with everything they have. As such, their choice of ward is an extremely personal and important life decision. While it's possible for a skolld to change their ward, most skollds are too stubborn to do so unless there's no other choice, such as if the ward refuses the skolld's protection or becomes destroyed due to time or another force the skolld can't prevent.

Put That on Ice

Skollds' dedication to guarding their chosen ward means that they often have to sacrifice in other areas, particularly when it comes to any events or plans they make in their own social life. Often, they have to postpone or cancel an appointment, even at the last minute, in order to protect their ward from a sudden threat or a potential danger. This makes them sometimes come across as flaky and unreliable when the truth is exactly the opposite; skollds just have their priority, and that priority is their ward.

Skolld, Amarime, and Fenrice

COLD

Melee 1 claw (reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d6 slashing (1d8 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping skolld guard what matters to them most.

Elemental Ability Clinging Frost The ice, frost, and snow you call forth lingers and sticks to its targets. An Interact action to reduce the value of the frozen condition doesn't reduce the frozen value below 1 unless the creature is frozen 1; the creature then becomes temporarily immune to clinging frost for 1 minute.

Form Ability Interposing Guardian You get in the way of attacks against those you wish to protect. You provide standard cover instead of lesser cover against attacks through your space when you wish to do so.

Evolution Ability Frozen Soul You cling to consciousness when necessary to protect what matters to you. When you are dropped to 0 Hit Points by damage, you remain at 1 Hit Point instead. Afterward, you can't benefit from frozen soul for 1 hour.

Ankhrub, Life Scarab Eldamon.name: 安克鲁布，生命圣甲虫艾达蒙 Ankhrub, Life Scarab Eldamon
Ankhrub, Life Scarab Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.q0YeUQ3acPf5VnxI]{安克鲁布}

安克鲁布总是在寻找新的健康方案或迷信做法；无论失败多少次，它们都不会失去热情与乐观，相信下一个或许正是它们一直在找的东西。但这并不意味着它们很容易上当。它们只是选择看到事物光明的一面并尝试新事物；如果没有成功，就继续前进。你不出手的每一次机会都会失败。

安克感恩节

作为生命系艾达蒙，安克鲁布很少遇到自身健康受到威胁的情况。相反，它们会把自己那些稀奇古怪的好运护符与健康计划当作礼物，送给任何更容易遭受厄运与健康不佳摧残的凡人朋友。安克鲁布天生慷慨而富有同情心的本性，使它们会痴迷于他人的安康。

安克鲁布、安克鲁什与安克赫普里

ELDAMON

进化状态 帮助安克鲁布收集真正有效的好运与健康方案。

元素能力 守护圣甲虫 你体内的生命能量保护你免受毒素、死亡与疾病之力的侵害。你对抗毒素、死亡与疾病效果的豁免检定获得+1环境加值。若你在对抗死亡效果的豁免检定中掷出成功，则改为大成功。

形态能力 振翅跳跃 你的翅膀或许不足以让你飞行，但它们能帮助你跳得更远。你可以不需要助跑，以单动作进行高跳或长跳，且距离加倍（但这仍不能让你跳得超过你的速度）。

进化能力 所有的好运护符 当你将受到厄运效果影响时，你众多好运护符中的一个会避免厄运；这是一种好运效果，但它除了抵消该厄运效果外不会产生其他作用。之后，你在1轮内无法从此能力中获益。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.q0YeUQ3acPf5VnxI]{Ankhrub}

Ankrubs are always looking for a new health regimen or superstition, and no matter how many times they fail, they never lose their enthusiasm and optimism that the next one could be exactly what they were looking for. That doesn't mean that they're gullible, however. They simply choose to look on the bright side and try out new things, moving on if they don't meet with success. You fail every one of the shots you don't take.

Anksgiving

As life eldamon, ankhrubs rarely come across situations where their own personal health is at risk. Instead, they share their many bizarre good luck charms and health plans as gifts for any mortal friends more vulnerable to the ravages of misfortune and poor health. It's an ankhrub's inherently giving and compassionate nature that causes them to obsess over the well-being of others.

Ankhrub, Ankhrush, and Ankhepri

ELDAMON

VITALITY

Element Life

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Jyoti

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance light, vitality (since it isn't undead, it can't normally be harmed by vitality)

Weaknesses darkness, death, shadow

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 horn (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing plus 1 additional vitality (1d6 piercing plus 1 additional vitality when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping ankhrub collect good luck and health schemes that actually work.

Elemental Ability Scarab of Protection The life energies within you protect you from the forces of poison, death, and disease. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against poison, death, and disease effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a death effect, you get a critical success instead.

Form Ability Flutter Jump Your wings might not be enough to fly, but they help you jump farther. You can High Jump or Long Jump as a single action without a running start, and the distance is doubled (though this still doesn't allow you to jump farther than your Speed).

Evolution Ability All the Luck Charms When you would be affected by a misfortune effect, one of your many luck charms averts misfortune; this is a fortune effect, but it doesn't do anything but negate the misfortune effect. Afterward, you can't benefit from this ability for 1 round.

Skepi, Life Goat Eldamon.name: 斯凯皮，生命山羊埃达蒙 Skepi, Life Goat Eldamon
Skepi, Life Goat Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.QyVL0fvJLP5urxPU]{斯凯皮}

斯凯皮自我牺牲的本能经常会将它们引入巨大的危险之中。它们在他人需要帮助时对自身安危如此漠视，以至于若不是几乎没有什么东西能对一只艾达蒙造成永久性的伤害，恐怕大多数斯凯皮到现在早已从这片土地上消失无踪。

幸运的是，无论对斯凯皮还是关心它们的人而言，斯凯皮的鲁莽行为都无法让它们倒下太久。若某条尤其危险的行动路线可能会给其他人带来伤害（而这些人不像活艾达蒙那样，可能会承受更永久的后果），你也可以说服斯凯皮克制自己，不要执意追逐那条路线。

阿撒兹勒

根据传奇，最初的斯凯皮诞生于一片被诸多名字称呼的神话之地，其中之一便是阿撒兹勒。据说那片土地荒芜至极，当地的人们几乎无法生存，只能勉强糊口。当一头怪兽摧毁了仅存的一切时，一只维塔——自然生命力的化身——与附近的活艾达蒙融合，形成了一只巨大的山羊。它牺牲了自己，使那片土地变得前所未有地生机盎然、繁荣兴盛。斯凯皮便从那只巨山羊的形而上之躯中诞生。

斯凯皮、海德伦与克努门

非普通

艾达蒙

活力

元素 生命

属性调整值 Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达蒙语言 Jyoti

艾达蒙生命值 8

艾达蒙技能 Acrobatics, Intimidation, Survival

艾达蒙豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 光、活力（由于它不是不死生物，通常不会受到活力伤害）

弱点 黑暗、死亡、暗影

速度 25英尺

近战 1 角（灵巧，娴熟；仅在进化时触及 10英尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺外加 1 点额外活力（仅在进化时为 1d6 穿刺外加 1 点额外活力）

进化状态 帮助斯凯皮拯救他人并保护无助者。

元素能力 替罪羊 每当一名相邻盟友受到伤害且你仍有意识并拥有超过 1 点生命值时，你失去 1 点生命值（或伤害值，以较小者为准），并使其受到的伤害减少同等数值。若你在力量DC上为大师且拥有超过 2 点生命值，则你改为失去 2 点生命值而非 1 点。

形态能力 救生员之发 当你濒临死亡时，你那簇红发会排斥毁灭。当你的生命值少于最大生命值的一半时，你获得对所有伤害类型的抗力 1。若你在力量DC上为大师，则此抗力提升为对所有伤害类型的抗力 2。

进化能力 救赎花环 你的花环纪念那些你拯救过的人，并会在你为他人牺牲自己时赋予你力量。在你为了保护他人免受伤害而受到伤害，或为了保护他人免受伤害而失去生命值（例如来自你的替罪羊能力）之后，你获得对 AC 与豁免的 +1 状态加值，持续至你下个回合结束。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.QyVL0fvJLP5urxPU]{Skepi}

Skepi's self-sacrificial instincts can often lead them into great danger. They're so heedless of their own safety when others are in need that if it weren't for the fact that few things can permanently harm an eldamon, chances are that most skepis would have disappeared from the land by now.

Fortunately for both skepi and those who care about them, skepis' reckless actions can't keep them down for long. It's also possible to convince a skepi to hold back from pursuing a particular dangerous course of action if it might cause harm to others who, unlike the life eldamon, might suffer more permanent consequences from the risky plan.

Azazel

According to legend, the first skepis were born in a mythical land known by various names, one of which is Azazel. Supposedly, the land was so desolate that the people could barely survive and eke out a living. When a kaiju destroyed what little was left, a vita, or incarnation of the life force of nature, merged with nearby life eldamon to form a great goat, which sacrificed itself to make the land vibrant and thriving as it had never been. From the metaphysical body of the great goat were born skepis.

Skepi, Heidrun, and Khnumen

If you are a master in power DCs and have more than 2 Hit Points, you lose 2 Hit Points instead of 1.

Form Ability Lifeguard Hair Your tufts of red hair repel destruction when you are close to death. When you have fewer than half your maximum Hit Points, you gain resistance 1 to all damage types. If you are a master in power DCs, this increases to resistance 2 to all damage types.

Evolution Ability Garland of Salvation Your garland commemorates those you have saved, and it empowers you whenever you sacrifice yourself for others. After taking damage to protect another from harm or losing Hit Points to protect another from harm (such as from your scapegoat ability), you gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws until the end of your next turn.

Ursili, Life Bear Eldamon.name: 乌尔西里，生命熊埃尔达蒙 Ursili, Life Bear Eldamon
Ursili, Life Bear Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0kfSyTN9mPPBj4oD]{乌尔西利}

由于它们热爱酣睡与冬眠，乌尔西利会将大量时间融入环境、物体与生物之中；相较于其他艾达萌，乌尔西利更是如此。因此，它们更难被发现，看起来也比实际更不常见。只有当有人用喧闹或显著的举动弄醒一只沉睡的乌尔西利——例如与乌尔西利所融入的那只生物战斗——乌尔西利才会以响亮而充满活力的方式惊醒，立刻让自己为人所知。那些唤醒乌尔西利且避免惹怒它们的人，很可能会足以激起它们的兴趣，从而成为它们新的休憩之所。

咬牙硬撑

乌尔西利以能进行漫长且令人恢复活力的休息而闻名，但它们同样非常擅长在巨大的逆境下坚持不懈，因此获得了坚忍不拔的名声。尽管如此，那些对乌尔西利说“咬牙硬撑”的人，可能会为此招来一个愤怒的瞪视，或一个熊抱。

乌尔西利、乌尔萨尔瓦与卡利斯托斯

不常见

艾达萌

活力

元素 生命

属性调整值 Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

艾达萌技能 Athletics, Intimidation, Survival

艾达萌豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 光，活力（由于它不是不死生物，通常不会被活力所伤害）

弱点 黑暗，死亡，暗影

速度 25尺

近战 1 爪击（灵巧，娴熟；仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 挥砍外加 1 额外活力（仅在进化时为 1d6 挥砍外加 1 额外活力）

进化状态 帮助乌尔西利体验一次真正不可思议的休息。

元素能力 复苏觉醒 你以及你所治疗的对象，会带着重新投入战斗所需的能量从昏迷中醒来，如同熊从冬眠中苏醒。每当你从0生命值被治疗并从昏迷或濒死（状态）中醒来时，在你的下个回合，你会获得加速，但只能将该动作用于站立，或用于交互以拾起你在昏迷倒下时掉落的某个物品。每当你用生命力量将一个生物从0生命值治疗并且它从昏迷或濒死（状态）中醒来时，它获得同样的好处。

形态能力 活力休憩 当你稍作休息时，你会随着活力能量而涌动。在一次遭遇中，若你整整一轮没有行动（通常是因为昏迷或麻痹等状态，或因为你延迟了整整一轮直到你的原始先攻再次到来），你获得等同于2+你的等级的临时生命值，持续2轮。

进化能力 复苏生命 你可以以单动作向四周散播生命，该动作具有专注（特征）。这会使植物等活的生物生长并向你移动，在你下个回合开始前为你提供标准掩蔽。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.0kfSyTN9mPPBj4oD]{Ursili}

Because of their love of slumber and hibernation, ursilis spend much of their time melded into environments, objects, and creatures; this is true of ursilis even more so than other eldamon. As a result, they're harder to spot and seem less prevalent than they actually are. It's only when someone wakes up a sleeping ursili through a loud or notable act, such as battling the creature with which the ursili is melded, that the ursili rouses in a loud and vigorous manner, making themselves known right away. Those who awaken an ursili and avoid angering them are likely to spur their interest enough to become a new resting place.

Grin and Bear It

While ursilis are known for taking long and rejuvenating rests, they're also quite skilled at persevering under great odds, giving them a reputation for stoicism. Nonetheless, those who tell an ursili to "grin and bear it" might receive an angry glare or bear hug for their trouble.

Ursili, Ursalva, and Kallistos

Evolution Condition Helping ursili experience a truly incredible rest.

Elemental Ability Resurgent Awakening You and those you heal awake from unconsciousness with the energy you need to re-enter the fight, like a bear coming out of hibernation. Whenever you are healed from 0 Hit Points and wake up from the unconscious or dying condition, on your next turn, you are quickened but can only use the action to Stand or to Interact to pick up something you dropped when you fell unconscious. Whenever you heal a creature from 0 Hit Points with a life power and they wake up from the unconscious or dying condition, they gain the same benefit.

Form Ability Vital Rest When you take a break, you surge with vital energy. During an encounter, if you don't act for a full round (usually because of a condition such as stunned or paralyzed, or because you Delayed for an entire round until your original initiative came again), you gain temporary Hit Points equal to 2 plus your level, which last for 2 rounds.

Evolution Ability Resurgent Life You can spread life all around, as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. This causes living creatures such as plants to grow and move toward you, providing you standard cover until the beginning of your next turn.

Phidi, Life Snake Eldamon.name: 菲迪，生命蛇埃达蒙 Phidi, Life Snake Eldamon
Phidi, Life Snake Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.CTZvc3JW9qiGGJpB]{菲迪}

菲迪对医术的热爱使它们会跟在各类医生、草药师与医护人员身边。它们渴望通过改变生命的医学突破去治疗、保护并拯救他人，而为此它们往往需要该领域其他专家的协助。

另一方面，许多行医者认为菲迪对整个医疗职业而言就像吉祥物或神圣生物。超过一家医院或医疗机构将“蛇杖”的双蛇盘绕形态作为其标志、纹章或徽标的重要组成部分。

菲迪与医生们一同努力，朝向一个尽可能摆脱疾病痛苦与摧残的未来迈进。

胜于一个

拥有两个头与两具身体，令蛇杖形态在察觉提升之外还获得显著益处。首先，蛇杖形态总有另一个“自己”可交谈，因此不太容易感到孤独。由于第二条蛇是生命力的复制体，它与本体共享本能与内在天性，但有时也会拥有自己独特的视角。

菲迪、蛇杖形态与科卢布里奥

稀有

艾达蒙

活力

元素 生命

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

艾达蒙语言 Jyoti

艾达蒙生命值 8

艾达蒙技能 Acrobatics, Medicine（不需要手或治疗者工具）, Stealth

艾达蒙豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 光, 活力（由于它不是亡灵，通常不会被活力伤害所伤害）

弱点 黑暗, 死亡, 阴影

速度 25尺

近战 1 爪击（獠牙（敏捷，灵巧；仅在进化时触及 10尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺 + 额外 1 点活力（仅在进化时为 1d6 穿刺 + 额外 1 点活力）

进化状态 帮助菲迪发现一次真正的医学突破。

元素能力 蛇杖流转 当你帮助他人时，溢出的生命能量也会保护你自己。每当你使用一种能使一名或多名盟友受益、但不会使你自己受益的生命力量时，你获得 1 点临时生命值，持续到你下个回合开始。若你在力量DC上为专家，则增加至 2 点临时生命值；若为大师，则为 3 点临时生命值；若为传奇，则为 4 点临时生命值。

形态能力 双重感官 即便它并不可见，你的生命力复制体也会协助你的感官。你的察觉为专家，且在第9等级时，你的察觉成为大师。

进化能力 结晶生命 你将结晶化的生命能量储存在沿身体分布的金色宝石中。当你处于相位内时，或当你在一次遭遇中首次进入相位时，你会消耗部分储存的能量以获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续 1 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.CTZvc3JW9qiGGJpB]{Phidi}

Phidis' love of medicine leads them to follow around doctors, herbalists, and medics of all sorts. They desire to heal, protect, and save others through life-changing medical breakthroughs, and for that they often need the assistance of other experts in the field.

For their part, many who practice medicine consider phidis to be something like a mascot or sacred creature to the medical profession as a whole. More than one hospital or medical institution incorporates the twin serpentine form of caduceon as a major part of their symbol, crest, or logo.

Together, phidis and doctors strive toward a future as free as possible from the suffering and ravages of illness.

Better Than One

Having two heads and bodies provides caduceon significant benefits beyond the improvements to Perception. For one thing, a caduceon always has someone else to talk to, so they're less likely to become lonely. Because the second snake is a life force duplicate, they share the original's instincts and inner nature, but they sometimes have their own unique perspective.

Phidi, Caduceon, and Colubrio

RARE

ELDAMON

VITALITY

Element Life

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Jyoti

Eldamon Hit Points 8

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Medicine (doesn't need hands or healer's tools), Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision

Resistance light, vitality (since it isn't undead, it can't normally be harmed by vitality)

Weaknesses darkness, death, shadow

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (fangs (agile, finesse; reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing plus 1 additional vitality (1d6 piercing plus 1 additional vitality when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping phidi discover a true medical breakthrough.

Elemental Ability Caduceus Flow When you help others, the overflowing life energy protects you as well. Whenever you use a life power that benefits one or more allies, but does not benefit yourself, you gain 1 temporary Hit Point until the beginning of your next turn. This increases to 2 temporary Hit Points if you're an expert in power DC, 3 temporary Hit Points if you're a master in power DC, and 4 temporary Hit Points if you're legendary in power DC.

Form Ability Double Senses Even when it isn't visible, your life force duplicate assists your senses. You're an expert in Perception, and at 9th level, you become a master in Perception.

Evolution Ability Crystallize Life You store crystallized life energy in golden jewels along your body. and you're phased in or when you first phase in during an encounter, you deplete some of the stored energy to gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 round.

Lemiure, Prism Lemur Eldamon.name: 莱米尔，棱彩狐猴艾达蒙 Lemiure, Prism Lemur Eldamon
Lemiure, Prism Lemur Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.51JyQPrCin12WhvA]{Lemiure}

Lemiure总会花时间从其他视角看待事物。这并不意味着他们在做决定时特别慢，但他们不太可能自己就草率地下结论。Lemiure总是渴望让朋友们参与发表意见。

要有光！

光 eldamon 始终明亮发光，其照明如同一支火把：以自身为中心20尺半径的明亮光照，并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照。

Lemiure、Lemurux与Lughemur

进化 状态 帮助Lemiure向拥有不同观点与人生经历的众多人学习。

元素 能力 棱镜之力 当你的敌人被光显映时，你的光系力量造成额外伤害。当一个生物具有显映的状态时，你以光系力量对该生物造成的火伤害获得+1状态加值；若你在力量DC上为专家则提高至+3，若为大师则为+4，若为传奇则为+5。

形态 能力 棱镜察觉 你头上的棱镜帮助你精炼周遭的景象并将其折射入你的视野，使你更容易发现事物。你的察觉为专家，并且在9级时，你的察觉成为大师。

进化 能力 虹彩斗篷 你身后拖曳的彩虹色斗篷保护你免受伤害，尤其是来自那些被你光系力量晃目者的伤害。你获得对被你光系力量晃目的生物所造成之物理伤害的抗力5。此抗力在18级时提高至6。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.51JyQPrCin12WhvA]{Lemiure}

Lemiures always take the time to look at things from other points of view. That doesn't mean they're especially slow to decide, but they aren't likely to make snap judgments on their own. A lemiure is always eager to have their friends weigh in.

Let There Be Light!

Light eldamon are constantly alight, which sheds light like a torch: bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light to the next 20 feet.

Lemiure, Lemurux, and Lughemur

ELDAMON

LIGHT

Element Light

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Luxan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance death, force, light

Weaknesses darkness, mental, shadow, sonic

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 claw (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping lemiure learn from numerous people with different viewpoints and lived experiences.

Elemental Ability Prism Power When your foe is limned in light, your light powers deal additional damage. While a creature has the limned condition, you gain a +1 status bonus to fire damage with light powers against that creature; this increases to +3 if you're an expert in power DCs, +4 if you're a master in power DCs, and +5 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability Prism's Perception The prism on your head helps refine the sights around you and refract them into your view, making it easy for you to spot things. You're an expert in Perception, and at 9th level, you become a master in Perception.

Evolution Ability Prismatic Cloak The rainbow-colored cloak trailing behind you protects you from harm, especially from those dazzled by your light. You gain resistance 5 to physical damage dealt by creatures dazzled by your light powers. This resistance increases to 6 at level 18.

Luciola, Glow Worm Eldamon.name: Luciola，辉光虫·艾达蒙 Luciola, Glow Worm Eldamon
Luciola, Glow Worm Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.mCoEKJdgVHTcHoBD]{Luciola}

Luciola 总是看向生活光明的一面——无论是字面意义还是比喻意义。这能帮助他们即使在艰难的环境中也保持开朗与充满希望，但如果他们变得过于雄心勃勃，有时也需要朋友帮助他们脚踏实地。

魅力升级

Luciola 相信只要你相信自己，一切就总能变得更好。因此，他们会尝试帮助人们实现“魅力升级”，也就是让对方投入一场向好的蜕变，以提升自信与心理健康，从而提高自我价值，并且往往也会让他们在他人眼中更具吸引力。对那些被阴郁笼罩的人来说，魅力升级似乎是不可能的，但 luciola 总能找到办法为他们照亮前路。

Luciola、Lampyra 与 Lampyrios

罕见

ELDAMON

光亮（特征）

元素 光

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon 语言 Luxan

Eldamon 生命值 6

Eldamon 技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon 豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 死亡, force, 光亮（特征）

弱点 黑暗, mental, shadow, sonic

速度 25 feet

近战 1 颚（agile, finesse，仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化时为 1d6 穿刺外加 1d4 火）

进化状态 帮助 luciola 学会拥抱他们的乐观，同时用现实主义为其降温。

元素能力 磷光微辉 在你最初的闪光之后，你会留下短暂的磷光微辉。当你的光之力量或涌动所施加的显映的状态结束时，一道淡蓝色光辉会使目标额外显映的 1 轮。此显映的状态并非来自原本的力量，因此不会施加该力量的任何额外效果。

形态能力 发光的尾巴 储存在你尾巴中的发光能量让你能够将自己的力量与一次涌动结合。当你的尾巴发光时，你可以熄灭尾巴的光芒，从而在同一回合使用一次元素涌动与一次元素力量，无视通常阻止你在同一回合同时使用二者的限制。之后，需要 10 分钟，汇聚的光能才会恢复你尾巴中的光辉。

进化能力 内在之光 你体内的光会在你进行一次颚攻击时，或当另一名生物切入或刺入你体内时溢出并灼烧你的敌人。你的颚打击造成额外 1d4 火焰伤害（已反映在上方数据中）；这额外伤害具有光亮（特征）特征。此外，当一名相邻生物对你造成挥砍或穿刺伤害，或某个生物以近战徒手攻击对你造成挥砍或穿刺伤害时，他们会受到 1d4 火焰伤害；此火焰伤害具有光亮（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.mCoEKJdgVHTcHoBD]{Luciola}

Luciola always looks at the bright side of life, both literally and figuratively. This helps them stay cheerful and hopeful, even in difficult circumstances, but they sometimes need a friend to help ground them if they get too ambitious.

Glow Ups

Luciolas believe that everything can always be better as long as you believe in yourself. As such, they try to help people achieve "glow ups" where they engage in a transformation for the better, increasing their confidence and mental well-being in a way that raises their self-worth and often their attractiveness to others. For someone shrouded in gloom, a glow up might seem impossible, but luciolas find a way to help light their path.

Luciola, Lampyra, and Lampyrios

Element Light

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Speed 25 feet

Evolution Condition Helping luciola learn to embrace their optimism and also temper it with realism.

Elemental Ability Phosphorescent Glow After your initial flash of light, you leave a momentary phosphorescent glow. When the limned condition from your light power or surge ends, a pale blue glow limns the target for 1 additional round. This limned condition doesn't come from the original power, so it doesn't apply any additional effects from that power.

Form Ability Glowing Tail The glowing light energy stored in your tail allows you to combine your powers with a surge. While your tail is glowing, you can put your tail's glow out in order to use an elemental surge and an elemental power in the same turn, ignoring the usual restrictions that prevent you from using both in the same turn. Afterward, it takes 10 minutes before the gathering light energy restores the glow within your tail.

Evolution Ability Inner Light The light within you spills out to sear your foes when you make a mandibles attack or when another creature cuts or pierces into you. Your mandibles Strikes deal 1d4 additional fire damage (reflected in the statistics above); this additional damage has the light trait. Additionally, when an adjacent creature deals slashing or piercing damage to you or a creature deals slashing or piercing damage to you with a melee unarmed attack, they take 1d4 fire damage; this fire damage has the light trait.

Soleo, Sun Lion Eldamon.name: 索莱欧，太阳狮艾达蒙 Soleo, Sun Lion Eldamon
Soleo, Sun Lion Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.gYMkaydO55R6ZjWg]{Soleo}

Soleo极其勇敢，但这并不意味着他们愚蠢，或无法感到恐惧，或不会考虑失败的可能性。Soleo拥有足够的感知，能够理解勇敢与鲁莽之间那条微妙的界线；当谨慎确有必要时，他们会选择谨慎，而不是毫无章法、毫无理由地去追逐一项注定徒劳的事业。当然，有时那项徒劳的事业值得牺牲；在这种情况下，soleo不会有丝毫犹豫。

被神化的英雄

许多故事都在歌颂那些在严峻环境下与soleo并肩作战的英雄：他们无视胜算渺茫，仍坚持鼓起勇气达成目标。比如，有一片土地的传说讲述了一位强大的、已进化的soleonidas，他率领仅数百名战士，死守一处狭窄关隘，对抗一支规模几乎是他们1,000倍的大军。

Soleo、Soleone与Soleonidas

非普通

光

元素 光

Eldamon豁免 强韧

速度 20尺

近战 1 颌骨（仅在进化时触及10尺）；伤害 1d6 piercing（仅在进化时为1d8 piercing）

进化状态 帮助soleo理解勇气的真正含义，或完成一次真正勇敢的英雄壮举。

元素能力 炫目闪光 你的光芒比大多数更频繁地闪烁与跳动，使目眩（状态）更为严重。由你的目眩（状态）导致的隐蔽纯骰检定DC从5提高到6（或在Intensify Glare反应动作（）时从7提高到8。

形态能力 光之护甲 你穿戴由硬化光芒构成的护甲。你从护甲获得的AC物品加值提高至+4，你的最大敏捷调整值降低至+1，且你的速度降低至20尺（已反映于以上数据中）。

进化能力 无畏闪耀 你体内的光芒在护甲与身体上跃动闪烁。你从光之护甲获得的AC物品加值提高至+5。在你带有惊惧（状态）的回合结束时，你会强烈闪耀，使该状态减少2而非1；若你以此方式将惊惧（状态）减少2，且给予你惊惧（状态）的生物在30尺内，则它会被火花照得目眩（状态）1轮。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.gYMkaydO55R6ZjWg]{Soleo}

Soleo is incredibly brave, but that doesn't mean they're foolish, or incapable of feeling fear or considering the chance of failure. Soleos have the wisdom to understand the fine line between bravery and folly, and they accede to caution when it's warranted rather than pursue a lost cause without rhyme or reason. Of course, sometimes that lost cause is worth the sacrifice, in which case a soleo won't hesitate.

Lionizing Heroes

Many tales exist that lionize heroes who fought alongside a soleo in dire circumstances, maintaining the courage to achieve their goal despite the odds. For instance, one land tells of a powerful, evolved soleonidas who led a group of only a few hundred warriors to hold a narrow pass against a massive army almost 1,000 times their size.

Soleo, Soleone, and Soleonidas

Evolution Condition Helping soleo understand the true meaning of courage or perform a heroic act of true bravery.

Elemental Ability Dazzling Sparkles Your light sparkles and twinkles more extensively than most, causing the dazzled condition to be more severe. The DC for the concealment flat check from your dazzled condition increases from 5 to 6 (or from 7 to 8 for the Intensify Glare reaction.

Form Ability Armor of Light You wear armor formed of hardened light. Your item bonus to AC from armor increases to +4, your maximum Dexterity modifier decreases to +1, and your Speed decreases to 20 feet (reflected in the statistics above).

Evolution Ability Courageous Sparkle The light within you sparkles across your armor and body. Your item bonus to AC from your armor of light increases to +5. At the end of your turn when you have the frightened condition, you sparkle mightily, and the condition reduces by 2 instead of 1; if you reduce your frightened condition by 2 in this way and the creature that gave you the frightened condition is within 30 feet, it becomes dazzled for 1 round by the sparkles.

Sundile, Rainbow Crocodile Eldamon.name: 桑迪尔，彩虹鳄鱼灵兽 Sundile, Rainbow Crocodile Eldamon
Sundile, Rainbow Crocodile Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.SH8K6dzHIbaAfJ8u]{桑戴尔}

桑戴尔拥有真正艺术家的感受力——既体现在他们的创造力上，也体现在他们的古怪、挑剔与讲究上。那些理解桑戴尔思维方式的人，注定会与他们相处融洽。

把“戴尔”调低一点

与凡人同伴一起旅行的桑戴尔，常常会把新朋友视作自己艺术创作的缪斯或灵感。因此，他们之间的创造能量几乎会以可触的方式嗡鸣涌动，将桑戴尔的艺术热情推向越来越高的境地。通常这会带来好处，但有时为了契合当前的环境，就有必要把这股热情“调低”。例如，进行隐秘渗透时，可能并不是进行华丽艺术展示的最佳时机。

桑戴尔、阿卡戴尔与彩虹喙

稀有

艾达兽

光

元素 光

属性调整值 力量 +0，敏捷 +3，体质 +2，智力 +1，感知 +4，魅力 - 1

艾达兽语言 勒克桑语

艾达兽生命值 6

艾达兽技能 杂技、艺术学识、生存

艾达兽豁免 反射

感官 弱光视野

抗力 死亡、力场、光

弱点 黑暗、精神、暗影、音波

速度 25 尺

近战 1 颌骨（灵巧、娴熟，仅在进化后触及 10 尺）；伤害 1d4 穿刺（仅在进化后为 1d6 穿刺）

进化状态 帮助桑戴尔完成一件真正体现其愿景的艺术杰作。

元素能力 彩虹之光 当你用你的光之力量造成伤害时，你不再造成火焰伤害，而是掷 1d8。掷出 1 时光为红色，你的力量造成火焰伤害；掷出 2 时光为橙色，你的力量造成酸蚀伤害；掷出 3 时光为黄色，你的力量造成电击伤害；掷出 4 时光为绿色，你的力量造成毒素伤害；掷出 5 时光为蓝色，你的力量造成音波伤害；掷出 6 时光为靛色，你的力量造成精神伤害；掷出 7 时光为紫色，你的力量造成力场伤害。掷出 8 时，你从这 7 种颜色与伤害类型中选择一种。若你的力量造成持续伤害，你仍只掷一次来决定光的颜色，并在该力量的持续时间内造成该伤害类型。

形态能力 彩色嶙峋 你的嶙峋脊背会根据你的情绪呈现不同的颜色，使你获得对一种随机能量类型的抗力。当你相位进入时，或若你已处于相位进入状态则在遭遇开始时，掷 1d8，并参照彩虹之光元素能力中的颜色与伤害类型。你的嶙峋脊背呈现你掷出的颜色（若掷出 8 则呈现你所选的颜色），并获得等同于你等级的、对相应伤害类型的抗力。若掷出 7，则你对力场的该抗力会与作为光艾达兽所拥有的基础抗力叠加。

进化能力 彩虹旗帜 从你尾巴上飘扬的彩虹旗帜能够鼓舞你的盟友。30 尺内能看见旗帜的盟友，在对抗恐惧的豁免检定上获得 +1 状态加值；此外，你可以以单动作挥舞旗帜，以便使用艺术学识准备援助一名盟友的攻击掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.SH8K6dzHIbaAfJ8u]{Sundile}

Sundiles have the sensibilities of a true artist, both in terms of their creativity and in terms of their eccentricity and particularness. Those who understand the way a sundile thinks are destined to get along well with them.

Dile It Down

A sundile traveling with a mortal companion often finds their new friend to be a muse or inspiration for the sundile's art. As a result, the creative energy between them can buzz almost tangibly, bringing the sundile's artistic fervor to greater and greater heights. Often, this is beneficial, but there can come a time when it's necessary to dial it down in order to fit with the current circumstances. For instance, a stealthy infiltration might not be the best time for a colorful display of art.

Sundile, Arcadile, and Rainbowbek

RARE

ELDAMON

lIGHT

Element Light

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon Language Luxan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Art Lore, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance death, force, light

Weaknesses darkness, mental, shadow, sonic

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping sundile complete an artistic masterpiece that truly embodies their vision.

Elemental Ability Rainbow Light When you deal damage with your light powers, instead of dealing fire damage, roll 1d8. On a 1 the light is red and your power deals fire damage, on a 2 the light is orange and your power deals acid damage, on a 3 the light is yellow and your power deals electricity damage, on a 4 the light is green and your power deals poison damage, on a 5 the light is blue and your power deals sonic damage, on a 6 the light is indigo and your power deals mental damage, and on a 7 the light is violet and your power deals force damage. On an 8, you choose one of the 7 colors and damage types. If your power deals damage over time, you still only roll once to determine the color of the light and deal that damage type for the duration of the power.

Form Ability Chromatic Ridges Your ridges take on a coloration based on your mood, granting you resistance to a random energy type. When you phase in, or at the beginning of an encounter if you're already phased in, roll 1d8 and consult the colors and damage types from the rainbow light elemental ability. Your ridges take on the color you rolled (or the color you chose if you roll an 8), and you gain resistance equal to your level to the associated damage type. On a roll of 7, this resistance to force is cumulative with your base resistance from being a light eldamon.

Evolution Ability Rainbow Banner The rainbow banner that flies from your tail can inspire your allies. Allies within 30 feet who can see the banner gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against fear, and you can wave the banner as a single action in order to prepare to Aid an ally's attack roll using Art Lore.

Speculil, Silver Mirror Eldamon.name: 思佩库利尔，银镜艾达蒙 Speculil, Silver Mirror Eldamon
Speculil, Silver Mirror Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.jE2fqzrw7qCC5lu3]{Speculil}

Speculil经常在采取行动后进行自我反思，在一面形而上的镜子中分析自己的决定，并试着思考自己为何会做出那些选择。有时事后看来答案显而易见，但有时却会令人大为震惊。

墙上的镜子

某些格外古老的Speculil会获得一种能力：在其倒影中展现秘密真相，这些真相超越内在自我，延伸至其周遭的世界。找到这种Speculil的反派与狡黠的英雄往往会设法与其结交，善待这位镜之艾达蒙，并在墙上为其留出显眼的位置；如此一来，这位凡人朋友便能通过向这位光之艾达蒙提出各种问题，来满足自己别有用心的目的。

Speculil、Speculight与Specuspright

稀有

艾达蒙

光

元素 光

属性调整值 力量 -1，敏捷 +3，体质 +2，智力 +0，感知 +4，魅力 +1

艾达蒙语言 Luxan

艾达蒙生命值 6

艾达蒙技能 特技，欺瞒，隐秘

艾达蒙豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 死亡、力场、光

弱点 黑暗、心灵、暗影、音波

速度 25尺（仅在进化后拥有飞行速度40尺）

近战 1 镜面（灵巧，娴熟，仅在进化后触及10尺）；伤害 1d4 钝击（仅在进化后为1d6 钝击）

进化状态 帮助Speculil真正反思其内在自我，并发现隐藏其中的秘密真相。

元素能力 排斥之光 你运用镜子的力量来排斥被你的光显映的敌人。你对抗被你的光之力量或涌动显映的敌人时，AC获得+1状态加值。

形态能力 镜反弹回 当敌人的魔法完全未能命中你时，你用储存的光能将魔法反弹回去。只要你的镜子中储存着光能，当敌人以法术或力量对你进行攻击掷骰并严重失败时，其必须以相同调整值对其自身重骰该次攻击掷骰。若其命中，则其将该法术或力量的效果作用于自身。这会消耗储存的光能，而光能会在接下来的10分钟内恢复。

进化能力 内在真相 你的进化形态不会变为大型；取而代之的是，你会剥离一切矫饰并显露你的内在一角，将你变为一只拥有镜翼的超小型仙灵，飞行速度为40尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.jE2fqzrw7qCC5lu3]{Speculil}

Speculils often engage in self-reflection after they take action, analyzing their own decisions in a metaphysical mirror and trying to think about why they made the choices they did. Sometimes the answer is obvious in retrospect, but other times it comes as a great shock.

Mirror on the Wall

Some particularly ancient speculils gain the ability to show secret truths in their reflections that transcend beyond the inner self and into the world around them. Villains and cunning heroes who find such a speculil make an effort to befriend such a speculil, treating the mirror eldamon well and giving them a prominent place on the wall, where the mortal friend can indulge their ulterior motives by asking the light eldamon all sorts of questions.

Speculil, Speculight, and Specuspright

RARE

ELDAMON

LIGHT

Element Light

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Luxan

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Deception, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision

Resistance death, force, light

Weaknesses darkness, mental, shadow, sonic

Speed 25 feet (fly 40 feet when evolved only)

Melee 1 mirror (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping speculil truly reflect on their inner self and discover the secret truths hidden within.

Elemental Ability Repel Light You use the power of mirrors to repel foes limned in your light. You gain a +1 status bonus to AC against foes limned by your light powers or surges.

Form Ability Mirrored Rebound When a foe's magic misses you completely, you use your stored light energy to bounce the magic back at them. While your mirror has light energy stored up, when a foe critically fails an attack roll with a spell or power against you, they must reroll the attack roll with their same modifier against themself. If they hit, they deal the effects of their spell or power to themself. This uses the stored light energy, which returns over the course of the next 10 minutes.

Evolution Ability Inner Truth Instead of becoming Large, your evolved form peels away all pretensions and reveals your inner corner, transforming you into a Tiny fairy with mirror wings and a fly Speed of 40 feet.

Meese, Psychic Mouse Eldamon.name: 米斯，灵能鼠艾达蒙 Meese, Psychic Mouse Eldamon
Meese, Psychic Mouse Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.QWW66UG3hET5UFfm]{米斯}

米斯在各类宝石方面可能有点“囤货癖”。因此，有时某个社群会担心有小偷进城，实际上只是好奇的米斯在收集露天放着的石头。米斯并无恶意，但这对丢了宝石的人也无济于事。

米斯（复数）

学术界对于“meese”的复数形式存在一些分歧：究竟应当使用不规则复数“meese”，还是规则复数“meeses”。因此，在各种文本中，这两种形式有时会被交替使用。就米斯本身而言，典型的米斯并不怎么在乎这类事情。它们更感兴趣的是编目有趣的宝石，并发现更多关于珍贵珠宝的知识。

米斯、罗登与赛拉特

ELDAMON

MENTAL

元素 心智

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon语言 Astral

Eldamon生命值 4

Eldamon技能 Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野

抗力 electricity, light, mind, teleportation

弱点 黑暗, sonic, 灵体, 时代

速度 25 feet

近战 1 尾巴（agile, finesse, 仅在进化后触及 20 feet）；伤害 1d4 钝击 外加 1 心智（仅在进化后为 1d6 钝击 外加 1 心智）

进化状态 帮助米斯在其对宝石的热爱上达到巅峰（例如找到一颗真正惊人的宝石，或完成不同宝石的收藏）。

元素能力 利用破绽 你的心智力量对那些因困惑或恐惧而使其心智显露脆弱的生物造成更多伤害。你的心智力量获得伤害的状态加值，其数值等于以下两者取高：该生物来自任何来源的 stupified 数值，或其受到你心智力量、你的 Demoralize，或（若你为eldamon）你的凡人朋友的 Demoralize 所给予的 frightened 数值；最高为 +2。若你在力量DC上为专家，你的心智力量伤害的最大状态加值为 +3。若你为大师，只要生物处于任意数值的 frightened 或 stupified，你的状态加值提高 1，总上限为 +5；若你为传奇，只要生物处于任意数值的 frightened 或 stupified，你的状态加值总共提高 2，总上限为 +6。

形态能力 紫水晶雪橇 你使用一颗心智紫水晶，使你能轻松地用雪橇滑过散落的瓦砾、沙地或积雪。你无视由瓦砾、沙地或积雪造成的困难地形。

进化能力 四重尾巴 你的尾巴分裂为四条盘旋的尾巴，使其触及增加至 20 feet。此外，你的四条尾巴帮助你稳定愈发强大的紫水晶雪橇，使你能无视地面上的所有困难地形，而不再仅限于由瓦砾、沙地或积雪造成的困难地形。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.QWW66UG3hET5UFfm]{Meese}

A meese can be a bit of a pack rat when it comes to gemstones of all sorts. As such, sometimes a community is worried a thief has come to town when it's really a curious meese collecting stones left out in the open. The meese doesn't mean any harm, but that doesn't help the person who lost the gem.

Meeses

There's some disagreement among the scholarly community about whether the plural of meese is the irregular plural meese or the regular plural meeses. As such, the two are sometimes used interchangeably in various texts. For their part, a typical meese doesn't really care about those sorts of things. They're far more interested in cataloging interesting gemstones and discovering more about precious jewels.

Meese, Rhoden, and Psyrat

ELDAMON

MENTAL

Element Mind

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

Eldamon Language Astral

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Intimidation, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision

Resistance electricity, light, mind, teleportation

Weaknesses darkness, sonic, spirit, time

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse, reach 20 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning plus 1 mental (1d6 bludgeoning plus 1 mental when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping meese reach a pinnacle in their love for gemstones (such as by finding a truly amazing gem or completing a collection of different gems).

Elemental Ability Exploit Lapse Your mind powers deal more damage to creatures whose mind is vulnerable due to being befuddled or afraid. You gain a status bonus to damage with your mind powers equal to the highest of a creature's stupefied value from any source or their frightened value they received from your mind powers, your Demoralize, or your mortal friend's Demoralize if you're an eldamon, to a maximum of +2. If you're an expert in power DCs, the maximum status bonus to damage with your mind powers is +3. If you're a master, the status bonus increases by 1 as long as a creature is either frightened or stupefied at any value, to a total maximum of +5, and if you're legendary, the status bonus increases by a total of 2 as long as a creature is frightened or stupefied at any value, to a total maximum of +6.

Form Ability Amethyst Sled You use a mind amethyst to sled across scattered rubble, sand, or snow with ease. You ignore difficult terrain from rubble, sand, or snow.

Evolution Ability Quadruple Tails Your tails split into four spiralling tails, increasing their reach to 20 feet. Additionally, your four tails help you steady your increasingly powerful amethyst sled, allowing you ignore all difficult terrain on the ground, not just difficult terrain from rubble, sand, or snow.

Simiens, Mind Monkey Eldamon.name: 猿类，心智猴灵兽 Simiens, Mind Monkey Eldamon
Simiens, Mind Monkey Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Z7b5dJbJGW0zhl3h]{西米恩斯}

现实的本质是什么？善与恶这些概念又是什么？生命与来世的意义何在？这个世界是否只是一场诸神的宇宙游戏，他们把我们当作棋子摆弄，为了自己的娱乐而旁观并引导我们的挣扎？西米恩斯会冥想这些乃至更深层的宇宙问题，希望通过哲学与他们永不止息的好奇心获得真正的智慧。

不思恶念

大多数西米恩斯相信，通往哲学与道德启迪的道路始于最细微的念头。崇高不仅是“不见恶、不闻恶、不言恶”，甚至还要“不思恶念”。对除最睿智、最具灵性的一小部分西米恩斯之外的所有人而言，这说起来容易做起来难，因为这要求在那些零星的负面想法尚未掠过意识之前，先将心灵清空。若无法达到这种完美，西米恩斯也不会贬低自己，因为他们知道这标准何其之高。相反，他们只是更加努力，力求下次表现得再好一点点。

西米恩斯、记忆猴与语念猿

非普通

艾达蒙

精神

元素 心灵

近战 1 颌骨（敏捷、灵巧、仅在进化后具有10英尺触及）；伤害 1d4穿刺（仅在进化后为1d6穿刺）

进化状态 帮助西米恩斯达成一次哲学上的突破。

元素能力 沉思一刻 当你在战斗中停顿片刻进行沉思时，你的精神防御会提高。在一次战斗遭遇中，当你在自己的回合使用一次刷新力量或一次涌动且未使用主动力量时，你获得+2状态加值于意志豁免，持续到你的下个回合。若你使用心灵宫殿，则改为获得+4状态加值。

形态能力 灵巧手 作为猴子，你比其他艾达蒙拥有更高的手部敏捷。你可以进行交互动作并持握基础物体。这不会让你能够挥用武器、盾牌，或大多数需持握的魔法或炼金物品，不过你可以拾起并给自己喂服药水、灵药与类似的简单饮品。

进化能力 心灵花环 你的头部与上半身缠绕着强大的心灵能量。任何生物试图对你进行一次近战徒手打击或一次非触及的近战打击（无论是否命中你），都会承受4点心灵伤害，并以你的力量DC进行一次基础意志豁免。到第19等级时，该伤害提高至5点心灵伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.Z7b5dJbJGW0zhl3h]{Simiens}

What is the nature of reality? Of the concepts of good and evil? What is the meaning of life and the afterlife? Is this world just a cosmic game of the gods, who toy with us as pawns, watching and guiding our struggles for their own amusement? Simiens meditate on these and even deeper questions of the universe, hoping to achieve true wisdom through philosophy and their ever inquisitive nature.

Think No Evil

Most simens believe that the path to philosophical and moral enlightenment begins with the smallest thoughts. To be sublime is not only to see no evil, hear no evil, and speak no evil, but even to think no evil. That's easier said than done for all but the most wizened and spiritual of simiens, as it requires emptying the mind before the stray negative thoughts can drift across their consciousness in the first place. Simiens don't put themselves down if they can't achieve this perfection, since they know what a high standard it is. Instead, they simply strive harder to perform just a little bit better next time.

Simiens, Mnemonkey, and Semnostic

Evolution Condition Helping simiens reach a philosophical breakthrough.

Elemental Ability Moment of Contemplation When you pause for a moment to contemplate during a battle, your mental defenses increase. During a combat encounter, when you use a refresh power or a surge on your turn and don't use an active power, you gain a +2 status bonus to Will saves until your next turn. If you use Mind Palace, you gain a +4 status bonus instead.

Form Ability Manual Dexterity As a monkey, you have more manual dexterity than other eldamon. You can perform Interact actions and hold basic objects. This doesn't allow you to wield weapons, shields, or most held magical or alchemical items, though you can pick up and feed yourself potions, elixirs, and similar simple potables.

Evolution Ability Mental Wreath Your head and upper body are wreathed with powerful mental energy. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes 4 mental damage, with a basic Will save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to 5 mental damage.

Myrmind, Hivemind Ant Eldamon.name: 麦尔明德，蚁巢群智蚁艾达蒙 Myrmind, Hivemind Ant Eldamon
Myrmind, Hivemind Ant Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.kRt7y3Bf5ez3FqN8]{Myrmind}

Myrmind在完全独处时会感到有些焦虑与不适，相较之下，它们更喜欢待在舒适的群体中，在其中拥有明确的角色与位置。因此，它们很适合加入冒险小队，也很容易接受群体的决策。对Myrmind而言，群体的需求高于它们自身的个人需求。

蚂蚁与舅舅

Myrmind的各个形态与研究蚂蚁的学科“蚁学”（myrmecology）中的术语共享名称。Myrmind这个名字源自该领域的整体名称；而formipsy则取名自蚂蚁的一个属名formica；hymontops则来自hymenoptera（膜翅目），这是一类也包含黄蜂与蜜蜂在内的昆虫目。就它们自身而言，Myrmind并不太在意自己的eldamon名字，反而乐于采用能指涉昆虫世界各科属的名字，并将其纳入集体整体之中。由于与黄蜂和蜜蜂存在科属关联，传奇中记载着罕见的Myrmind，其体色与蜜蜂相似，并且以螫针取代大颚。

抗力 electricity, light, mind, teleportation

弱点 黑暗, sonic, 灵体, 时代

速度 25 feet

近战 1 mandibles（agile, finesse，仅在进化时触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 slashing（仅在进化时为1d6 slashing）

进化状态 帮助myrmind真正成为群体的一部分，并在其中充分体现它的角色。

元素能力 精神协助 你的力量会锁定敌人的弱点，以帮助盟友打击敌人。在你对一个或多个敌人使用一次主动的精神力量后，选择一个你以力量的攻击掷骰成功命中的敌人，或一个对你的力量进行豁免却失败的敌人。在你下个回合开始前，对该敌人进行攻击掷骰的下一名盟友，其攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。

形态能力 蜂巢思维触角 由于你与盟友的联结，你的触角能捕捉敌人的行动。除非你的所有盟友也都处于夹击，否则你不会因与你同等级或更低等级的夹击生物而处于措手不及状态。然而，它们仍然可以帮助其盟友形成夹击。只要与你同等级或更低等级的生物并非对你所有盟友都处于隐藏或未觉察，你也不会因隐藏或未觉察的生物而处于措手不及状态。

进化能力 复眼 你众多的复眼能帮助你更容易看清周遭，并传递视觉数据以帮助盟友避开攻击。你获得黑暗视觉以及视觉相关的察觉检定+2环境加值。每当你进行搜寻（Seek）时，你可以在两个区域而非一个区域进行搜寻；而当你进行搜索（Search）时，你搜索的速度提高为两倍。只要这些生物并非对你处于隐藏或未觉察状态，你的盟友就不会因与你同等级或更低等级的隐藏或未觉察生物而处于措手不及状态。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.kRt7y3Bf5ez3FqN8]{Myrmind}

Myrminds feel a bit anxious and uncomfortable when they're completely alone, rather than in a comfortable group where they have a defined role and place. As such, they fit in well with adventuring parties and accept group decisions easily. To a myrmind, the needs of the group outweigh their own personal needs.

Ants and Uncles

Myrmind's forms share their names with terms from myrmecology, the study of ants. Myrmind derives from the name of the field as a whole, while formipsy is named for the ant's genus formica, and hymontops comes from hymenoptera, an order of insects that also includes wasps and bees. For their part, myrminds don't really care about their eldamon name and are happy to take names that allude to the families of the insect world and make them part of the collective whole. Due to the familial connection to wasps and bees, legends tell of rare myrminds with coloration similar to that of a bee and stingers instead of mandibles.

Mrymind, Formipsy, and Hymontops

UNCOMMON

ELDAMON

MENTAL

Element Mind

Attribute Modifiers Str -1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int +1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Astral

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Stealth, Survival

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision (darkvision when evolved only)

Resistance electricity, light, mind, teleportation

Weaknesses darkness, sonic, spirit, time

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 mandibles (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 slashing (1d6 slashing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping myrmind truly become part of a group and fully embody their role in it.

Elemental Ability Mental Assistance Your powers hone in on the enemies' weak points to help your allies strike your foes. After you use an active mental power against one or more foes, choose one foe that you successfully hit with a power attack roll or that failed their saving throw against your power. Your next ally to make an attack roll against that foe before your next turn gains a +1 circumstance bonus to their attack roll.

Form Ability Hivemind Antennae Thanks to your connection to your allies, your antennae pick up your foes' movements. Unless all your allies are also flanked, you aren't off-guard to flanking creatures of your level or lower. However, they can still help their allies flank. You also aren't off-guard to hidden or undetected creatures of your level or lower unless they're hidden or undetected to all your allies.

Evolution Ability Compound Eyes Your many compound eyes help you see more easily and transmit your visual data to help your allies avoid attacks. You gain darkvision and a +2 circumstance bonus to visual Perception checks. Whenever you Seek, you can Seek in two areas instead of one, and when you Search, you Search twice as quickly. Your allies aren't off-guard to hidden or undetected creatures of your level or lower as long as the creatures aren't hidden or undetected to you.

Cerebella, Brain Eldamon.name: 小脑，脑灵埃尔达蒙 Cerebella, Brain Eldamon
Cerebella, Brain Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.fEzysVJwxtep1drX]{小脑怪}

大多数艾达蒙没法像凡人生物那样，以同样的方式记住凡世的事物。另一方面，小脑怪字面意义上就是大脑。若不是它们痴迷于晦涩冷门的琐碎知识，而非大多数凡人倾向于认为有用的那类学识，小脑怪或许会在各自领域成为备受尊敬的学者。即便如此，它们依然是酒吧问答之夜的绝佳队友。

大脑大点子

由于小脑怪痴迷于古怪的冷知识，它们有时会冒出一些依赖晦涩事实的疯狂、杂糅或独特的点子。这些点子偶尔很天才，更多时候则只是离谱且无用。无论如何，人们有时会把这些称作“大脑大点子”，至于是在夸奖还是在讽刺，则取决于环境。

小脑怪、脑灵怪与脑霸怪

稀有

艾达蒙

精神

元素 心灵

属性调整值 力量+0，敏捷+1，体质+3，智力+2，感知+4，魅力-1

艾达蒙语言 星界语

艾达蒙生命值 4

艾达蒙技能 奥秘，自然，神秘学

艾达蒙豁免 意志

感官 弱光视野（仅在进化后获得黑暗视觉）

抗力 电击，光，心灵，传送

弱点 黑暗，音波，灵体，时代

速度 25尺

近战 1 脑脊（灵活，娴熟；仅战斗形态）；伤害 1d4 挥砍

近战 1 颌骨（灵活，娴熟；仅进化形态）；伤害 1d6 穿刺

进化条件 帮助小脑怪将冷知识掌握到过度的程度。

元素能力 魔法扰乱 你令敌人陷入呆滞（状态）的力量会比通常更能扰乱施法。当目标因你的心灵力量而陷入呆滞（状态）时，其在呆滞期间施放法术所需的纯骰检定DC从“5 + 呆滞（状态）值”提高为“7 + 呆滞（状态）值”。

形态能力 脑力 由于你是一颗大脑，当你相位进入时，你比其他艾达蒙更容易专注于近在咫尺的威胁，从而记住更多关于它们的信息。在战斗遭遇中相位进入时，你可以对正在与之战斗的生物进行回忆知识，并在该检定上获得+1环境加值。每当你使用“灵感迸发”来进行回忆知识时，你可以选择由你进行回忆知识，或由你的凡人伙伴进行回忆知识。

进化能力 罐中之脑 你通过罐中的大脑并行处理思绪，使你能够优雅地失败并躲避精神效果。当你意志豁免失败时，你可以将效果转移到你的副脑中，以重掷该次豁免并取较好结果；这是一个幸运效果。若你如此做，你的副脑会停机1小时，并且在此之前你无法再次使用该能力。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.fEzysVJwxtep1drX]{Cerebella}

Most eldamon can't quite remember things about the mortal world in the same way as mortal beings do. On the other hand, cerebella are literally brains. If it weren't for the fact that they were obsessed with obscure pieces of trivia rather than the sorts of knowledge most mortals tend to find useful, cerebella might be respected scholars in their fields. As-is, they're still a great teammate for a pub trivia night.

Big Brain Ideas

Due to cerebellas' obsession with bizarre trivia, they sometimes have zany, eclectic, or unique ideas that depend on obscure facts. These ideas are occasionally brilliant, and other times they are simply outlandish and useless. Either way, people have sometimes taken to calling them "big brain" ideas, either praisingly or sarcastically, depending on the circumstances.

Cerebella, Cerebro, and Cereboss

RARE

ELDAMON

MENTAL

Element Mind

Attribute Modifiers Str +0, Dex +1, Con +3, Int +2, Wis +4, Cha - 1

Eldamon Language Astral

Eldamon Hit Points 4

Eldamon Skills Arcana, Nature, Occultism

Eldamon Saving Throw Will

Senses low-light vision (darkvision when evolved only)

Resistance electricity, light, mind, teleportation

Weaknesses darkness, sonic, spirit, time

Speed 25 feet

Melee 1 ridge (agile, finesse; battle form only); Damage 1d4 slashing

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse; evolved form only); Damage 1d6 piercing

Evolution Condition Helping cerebella master trivia to an excessive degree.

Elemental Ability Magical Disruption Your powers that stupefy foes disrupt spellcasting more than normal. The flat check DC to Cast a Spell while stupefied by your mind powers increases from 5 plus the stupefied condition's value to 7 plus the stupefied condition's value.

Form Ability Brainpower Thanks to bring a brain, when you're phased in, you can focus more easily than other eldamon on proximal threats to remember more about them. When phased in during a combat encounter, you can Recall Knowledge about the creatures you're fighting, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to do so. Each time you use Rush of Insight to Recall Knowledge, you can choose whether you Recall Knowledge or your mortal friend Recalls Knowledge.

Evolution Ability Brains in a Jar You multiprocesses thoughts through the brains in your jar, allowing you to fail gracefully and elude mental effects. When you fail a Will save, you can shunt the effects into your subsidiary brains in order to reroll the saving throw and take the better result; this is a fortune effect. If you do, your subsidiary brains are out of commission for 1 hour, and you can't use this ability again until then.

Boteau, Water Dolphin Eldamon.name: 波托，水海豚艾达蒙 Boteau, Water Dolphin Eldamon
Boteau, Water Dolphin Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.mZtj78Zc5f3rrYp6]{Boteau}

在许多社会中，海豚都以聪明友善的动物形象而闻名；作为形态相近的水艾达盟，波特欧也同样享有这种名声。与它们的鲸豚类近亲一样，波特欧也有狡黠的一面，而且由于其强效的智力，这一面更为明显，使它们会煽动复杂的计划与诡计来获得想要的东西。这并不意味着波特欧不友好，但它们也可能有点狡猾并善于操控。

计中计

有时看起来波特欧的阴谋似乎已经被挫败，却会揭示波特欧足够聪明，早已在第一个阴谋之中藏了另一个阴谋，使得即便原计划可能失败，更深层的计划仍会得以实现。正如波特欧能在陆地与水中无缝流转，它们也能以一种天然的从容在这些诡计与密谋之间乘风破浪、随潮汐而行。

Boteau, Botorrent, and Botocean

两栖

艾达盟

水

元素 水

属性调整值 Str -1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha +1

艾达盟语言 Thalassic

艾达盟生命值 6

艾达盟技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception

艾达盟豁免 Reflex

感官 弱光视野

抗力 火, 水

弱点 electricity, plant, wood

速度 30 feet（进化时为40 feet）, swim 35 feet（进化时为40）

近战 1 尾巴（agile, finesse, 仅在进化时触及 20 feet）；伤害 1d4 钝击伤害（仅在进化时为 1d6 钝击伤害）

进化状态 帮助波特欧认清它们的计谋，并在陆地与水之间完全连结。

元素能力 涌动水流 当你用你的水力量将一名敌人移动至少10 feet时，你可以额外将其移动至多5 feet；当你用你的水力量将一名敌人移动至少30 feet时，你可以额外将其移动至多10 feet。

形态能力 两栖突击 你在陆地与海中都格外迅捷。尽管你是水艾达盟，你的陆地速度仍为30 feet，且你的游泳速度为40 feet。此调整已包含在数据表中。

进化能力 触手尾巴 你的尾巴分裂成八条触手，使其触及提高至20 feet。此外，你的陆地速度与游泳速度提高至40 feet。这些调整已包含在数据表中。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.mZtj78Zc5f3rrYp6]{Boteau}

Dolphins have a positive reputation as clever and friendly animals in many societies that boteaus, share as water eldamon with similar forms. Like their cetacean counterparts, boteaus have a conniving side, though more pronounced with their greater intelligence, leading them to instigate convoluted plans and tricks to get what they want. That doesn't mean boteaus aren't friendly, but they can be a bit tricky and manipulative too.

Schemes Within Schemes

Sometimes it seems like a boteau's schemes have been foiled, only to reveal that the boteau had been wise enough to include another scheme hidden within the first, such that the deeper scheme would be fulfilled even though the original plan might have failed. Just as a boteau flows seamlessly between the land and the water, they ride the waves and tides between these plots and conspiracies with a natural ease.

Boteau, Botorrent, and Botocean

Speed 30 feet (40 feet when evolved), swim 35 feet (40 when evolved)

Melee 1 tail (agile, finesse, reach 20 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 bludgeoning (1d6 bludgeoning when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping boteau realize their schemes and fully connect between land and water.

Elemental Ability Surging Currents When you move a foe at least 10 feet with your water powers, you can move them up to 5 additional feet, and when you move a foe at least 30 feet with your water powers, you can move them up to 10 additional feet.

Form Ability Amphibious Assault You're especially quick both on land and in the sea. Your land Speed is 30 feet, despite being a water eldamon, and your swim Speed is 40 feet. This adjustment is included in the statblock.

Evolution Ability Tentacle Tail Your tail splits into eight tentacles, increasing its reach to 20 feet. Additionally, your land Speed and swim Speed increase to 40 feet. These adjustment are included in the statblock.

Puhide, Eel Dragon Eldamon.name: 普海德，鳗鱼巨龙艾尔达蒙 Puhide, Eel Dragon Eldamon
Puhide, Eel Dragon Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.934qNihwOBAfCdyh]{Puhide}

尽管噗兽皮很胆小且动作迅速，常常躲藏起来，但这些微小的鳗形艾达兽皮蕴藏着深不可测的内在。只要它们能克服紧张与恐惧，便会释放出体内的水巨龙，解锁真正的潜能。

噗兽皮与寻觅

噗兽皮喜欢练习自己躲避危险的技能，而它们常用的方法之一就是游戏。这些游戏通常会包含某种变化：一只或多只噗兽皮躲藏起来，而朋友则尝试找到躲起来的噗兽皮。之后，寻找者与所有躲藏的噗兽皮会聚在一起，讨论哪些藏身处奏效、哪些不奏效，是什么让一只或多只噗兽皮暴露出来，以及下次如何藏得更好。这种建设性的合作让这些游戏成为噗兽皮发展技能的绝佳方式。

Puhide、Anguillake 与 Qinglongue

元素能力 蜿蜒逆流 当你使用一个区域水能力时，若你位于该区域内，或你的区域水能力以你的方格为起点（例如线形或锥形（区域）能力），你可以选择让你的能力推动你移动，移动距离可与盟友所能选择的距离相同。然而，你的移动方向与其他生物相反。例如，这意味着你会从高潮线形或锥形（区域）向后、向外移动，进一步拉开与你那些被推开的敌人的距离；而在低潮线形或锥形（区域）中，你会向前移动，更进一步接近那些被拉向你的敌人。若该区域能力是爆发或放射，且以你为中心，则无论潮汐如何，你都可以选择任意方向移动。

形态能力 滑溜鳗鱼 当你躲避敌人时，敌人尤其难以抓住你或找到你。你获得+2环境加值，适用于逃脱的检定以及用于躲藏的隐匿检定。若你在一次逃脱检定中掷出成功，则你改为获得大成功。

进化能力 巨龙之魂 你的自信涌动，赋予你巨龙之魂以解除你的恐惧。你获得+1环境加值，适用于对抗恐惧效果的豁免。当你对抗某个恐惧效果进行一次意志豁免并掷出成功时，你改为获得大成功。此外，每当你获得惊惧（状态）时，将其数值降低1。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.934qNihwOBAfCdyh]{Puhide}

While puhides are timid and quick to hide, these tiny eel eldamon hide hidden depths. If they can overcome their nerves and fear, they unleash the water dragon within them, unlocking their true potential.

Puhide and Seek

Puhides love practicing their skills at hiding away from danger, and one of the ways they do so is through games. These games typically include some variation on one or more puhides hiding while a friend attempts to locate the hidden puhides. Afterward, the seeker and all the hiding puhides gather to discuss what worked about their hiding places and what didn't, anything that gave one or more of the puhides away, and how to hide better next time. This constructive cooperation makes these games a wonderful way for puhides to develop their skills.

Puhide, Anguillake, and Qinglongue

UNCOMMON

AMPHIBIOUS

ELDAMON

WATER

Element Water

Attribute Modifiers Str +1, Dex +3, Con +2, Int +0, Wis +4, Cha -1

Eldamon Language Thalassic

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

Eldamon Saving Throw Reflex

Senses low-light vision

Resistance fire, water

Weaknesses electricity, plant, wood

Speed 20 feet, swim 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (agile, finesse, reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d4 piercing (1d6 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping puhide accept and work through their nerves and fear.

Elemental Ability Sinuous Backflow When you use an area water power, if you're in the area, or your area water power originates from your square (such as a line or cone area power), you can choose to let your power move you any of the same distances your allies can choose to move. However, you move in the opposite direction as the other creatures. For example, this means you move back and away from a high tide line or cone, further distancing yourself from any foes who were pushed back, and toward a low tide line or cone, further approaching foes who were pulled toward you. If the area power is a burst or an emanation, and it's centered on you, you can move in whichever direction you choose regardless of the tide.

Form Ability Slippery Eel It's especially difficult for your foes to hold onto you or find you when you're hiding from them. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to Escape and to Stealth checks to Hide. If you roll a success on a check to Escape, you get a critical success instead.

Evolution Ability Dragon Soul Your confidence surges, granting you the soul of a dragon to dispel your fears. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against fear effects. When you roll a success at a Will save against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead. In addition, anytime you gain the frightened condition, reduce its value by 1.

Etmoist, Water Shark Eldamon.name: 埃特莫伊斯特，水鲨埃尔达蒙 Etmoist, Water Shark Eldamon
Etmoist, Water Shark Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.bWFnDySLZJMn3j4l]{埃特湿}

埃特湿对凡人关于亲族与家庭的观念抱有深刻的迷恋，尽管以艾达蒙的标准来看，这类事物并不常见。艾达蒙并非通过生物繁殖产生，而是从元素能量中诞生，其方式至今仍未被很好地理解。

跳过鲨鱼

一些社群有个奇怪的传统：他们会寻找一只已进化的“巨鲨溺者”，让其相位切入并潜伏在下方，然后尝试从其上方跳过，同时避免被这只鲨鱼艾达蒙身上的尖刺刺伤自己。这种如同亡命徒般的活动既危险又毫无意义，因此这一传统通常不受欢迎。大体上，仍会尝试的人多是冒险者，或其他依赖体能、并开始感受到衰老效果的人。于是，他们试图通过跳过“卡鲨刃”来说服自己与他人自己还好。对那些能看清此举本质的人来说，“跳过鲨鱼”这一说法逐渐用来指代一种害怕自己已过巅峰者的绝望之举。

埃特湿、卡鲨刃与巨鲨溺者

非普通

两栖

艾达蒙

水

元素 水

艾达蒙生命值 6

艾达蒙技能 杂技、运动、威吓

艾达蒙豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 火，水

弱点 电，植物，木

速度 20尺，游泳25尺

近战 1 颌骨（仅进化时触及10尺）； 伤害 1d6穿刺（仅进化时为1d8穿刺）

进化状态 帮助埃特湿真正理解家庭的意义。

元素能力 狂怒循环 你的力量与防御会随潮汐起伏而波动。在使用一次高潮能力后，你的AC在1轮内承受-1减值。在使用一次低潮能力后，你的AC在1轮内获得+1状态加值。当你使用高潮水能力时，你的伤害掷骰获得+2状态加值。若你在能力DC上为专家，该加值提升至+3；若为大师则为+4；若为传奇则为+5。

形态能力 绯红咽喉 当你准备使用高潮能力时，你体内狂怒的水元素能量会发出绯红光辉。当你处于高潮时，你将狂怒循环提供的伤害掷骰状态加值加到你的徒手颌骨打击的伤害掷骰上。此外，若你在一次擒抱检定中成功将一名敌人抓入你口中，该敌人会因这股横冲直撞的水能量而受到等同于该状态加值数值的钝击伤害。

进化能力 护甲尖刺 你的身体覆有装甲尖刺，能刺穿敌人。一名生物若尝试对你进行一次近战徒手打击或一次不具触及的近战打击（无论是否命中你），都会受到4点穿刺伤害，并需以你的能力DC进行一次基础反射豁免。到19级时，该伤害提升至5点穿刺伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.bWFnDySLZJMn3j4l]{Etmoist}

Etmoists are deeply fascinated by the mortal ideas of kinship and family, even though such things are unusual by eldamon standards. Eldamon arise from elemental energies in a way that's not well understood, rather than from biological reproduction.

Jumping the Shark

Some communities have a strange tradition of seeking out an evolved megalodrown to phase in and lurk below as they attempt to leap over the megalodrown without stabbing themselves on the shark eldamon's spikes. This daredevil-like activity is so dangerous and pointless that the tradition is typically frowned upon. For the most part, the only people who still attempt it are adventurers or others who rely on their physical prowess and who are beginning to feel the effects of aging. Thus, they try to convince both themselves and others that they are fine by leaping over the carcharain. To those who see this act for what it is, the expression "jumping the shark" has come to represent a desperate act of someone afraid of having peaked.

Etmoist, Carcharain, and Megalodrown

UNCOMMON

AMPHIBIOUS

ELDAMON

WATER

Element Water

Attribute Modifiers Str +2, Dex +1, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

Eldamon Language Thalassic

Eldamon Hit Points 6

Eldamon Skills Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation

Eldamon Saving Throw Fortitude

Senses low-light vision

Resistance fire, water

Weaknesses electricity, plant, wood

Speed 20 feet, swim 25 feet

Melee 1 jaws (reach 10 feet when evolved only); Damage 1d6 piercing (1d8 piercing when evolved only)

Evolution Condition Helping etmoist truly come to see the meaning of family.

Elemental Ability Raging Cycle Your power and defenses fluctuate with the tides. After using a high tide power, you take a -1 penalty to your AC for 1 round. After using a low tide power, you gain a +1 status bonus to AC for 1 round. When using a high tide water power, you gain a +2 status bonus to damage rolls. This increases to +3 if you're an expert in power DCs, +4 if you're a master in power DCs, and +5 if you're legendary in power DCs.

Form Ability Crimson Gullet The raging water energy within you glows crimson when you're ready to use a high tide power. When you're in high tide, you add the status bonus to damage rolls from raging cycle to your unarmed jaws Strikes. Additionally, if you succeed at a Grapple check to grab a foe in your mouth, they take an amount of bludgeoning damage equal to that status bonus from the rampaging water energy.

Evolution Ability Armor Spikes You are covered in armored spikes that pierce your foes. A creature that attempts a melee unarmed Strike or a non-reach melee Strike against you (whether or not it hits you) takes 4 piercing damage, with a basic Reflex save against your power DC. At 19th level, this increases to 5 piercing damage.

Kuddle, Cuttlefish Eldamon.name: 库德尔，乌贼埃尔达蒙 Kuddle, Cuttlefish Eldamon
Kuddle, Cuttlefish Eldamon.text:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.eldamon-ancestries.Item.gBXr3iB3qfBgmnCO]{库德尔}

虽然你可以轻轻触碰处于相位移出状态的艾达兽来摸摸它或拥抱它，但库德尔更喜欢那种持续更久的接触——这往往需要双方共享相位以进入物质世界，或以一种形而上的拥抱方式与某个生物相融。这种理念让它们的行为方式显得有些与众不同：它们更倾向于去寻找一位艾达兽训练师，或与某个生物相融，并从其体内保持更活跃的状态。

海墨滤净

作为一种稀有的水艾达兽，库德尔能够随着时间推移帮助过滤并净化水，尤其是在其海墨或阿帕玛雷形态时。过滤水时，它们会用小小的手臂环抱住水流，几乎像是在拥抱它。有时，当一片水域被化学物质或其他污染物严重破坏时，多个海墨必须协同工作，形成强力的海墨滤净，并在某一天让水恢复到先前清澈纯净的状态。

库德尔、海墨与阿帕玛雷

稀有

两栖

艾达兽

水

元素 水

属性调整值 Str +1, Dex +2, Con +3, Int -1, Wis +4, Cha +0

艾达兽语言 Thalassic

艾达兽生命值 6

艾达兽技能 Acrobatics, Athletics, Stealth

艾达兽豁免 强韧

感官 弱光视野

抗力 火, 水

弱点 electricity, plant, wood

速度 20 feet, swim 25 feet

近战 1 手臂（agile, finesse, 仅在进化后触及 10 feet）；伤害 1d4 钝击（仅在进化后为 1d6 钝击）

进化状态 帮助库德尔完善拥抱的艺术。

元素能力 水之触手 你可以将你的水之力量的驱动力转化为触须，以此来扰乱敌人的站姿。若你的水之力量本应将一名敌人移动至少 10 feet，你可以选择不移动该敌人，改为使其陷入 off-guard，直到你下个回合开始。若你的水之力量本应将其移动至少 20 feet 且你选择不移动它，则其陷入 off-guard 直到你下个回合结束；若本应移动至少 40 feet 且你选择不移动它，则其陷入 off-guard 持续 2 轮。

形态能力 擒抱之臂 你众多的手臂能够轻松擒抱敌人，即使在使用强力攻击之后也是如此。你在进行擒抱的 Athletics 检定时获得 +1 环境加值，并且你用于擒抱的 Athletics 检定不会因具有 attack 特征的威能而承受多重攻击减值（它们仍会承受其他多重攻击减值，且仍会增加你的多重攻击减值）。若你处于进化形态，用于擒抱的 Athletics 检定所获得的环境加值提高至 +2。

进化能力 伪装 你可以变形为任何必要的颜色，以融入你的环境。即使没有掩蔽或处于隐蔽，你也能躲藏与潜行。
