You've trained with your eldamon extensively in a variety of techniques, and all that training paid off by increasing their versatility. Your eldamons' proficiency bonus to their untrained skills becomes equal to their level. Additionally your eldamon gain four attribute boosts, one to each of their four lowest attributes. This typically increases their four lowest modifiers from +2, +1, +0, and –1 to +3, +2, +1, and +0.

Your eldamon also gain several other proficiencies and abilities at 5th level, including the capacity to learn an additional power, although it does so even if you don't have this class feature.

By training side by side, you improve your own capabilities, not just your eldamons'. This allows you to prepare to phase four eldamon each day, instead of three, as long as your key attribute modifier is at least +4.

Reflex Expertise Level 7

Your reflexes are lightning fast. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Eldamon Expert Level 9

Having traveled across the region, searching all around, the eldamon you know are legion with the knowledge that you've found. Your proficiency rank for eldamon trainer class DCs increases to expert.

Trainer's Heart Level 9

Your bonds strengthen your heart. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success at a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Eldamon Evolution Level 11

You've hit a major breakthrough in training your eldamon, allowing you to help them evolve. Each eldamon has evolution conditions, and if you meet them, the eldamon gains a new evolved battle form. This evolved form gains increased proficiencies, an attribute boost to the eldamon's three highest attributes, and a new special ability.

Your eldamon also gain several other proficiencies and abilities at 11th level, although it does so even if you don't have this class feature.

By working hard with your eldamon, you have come to understand your own limits as well. This allows you to prepare to phase five eldamon each day, instead of four, as long as your key attribute modifier is at least +5.

Weapon Expertise Level 11

You've dedicated yourself to learning the intricacies of your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increase to expert.

Alertness Level 13

You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Elemental Defense Level 13

You use the power of your eldamon, combined with your own defensive movements, to enhance your protection. Your proficiency ranks for light armor and unarmored defense increase to expert.

Melded Phase Level 13

When you (but not your eldamon) Phase Eldamon, instead of becoming rooted in place, you can choose to meld your phased out form with your eldamon. This takes a visual form of your choice: you can disappear inside the eldamon's battle form, appear as if mounted on the eldamon, or take a different form. However you appear, you move alongside your phased in eldamon, and when you phase back in, you do so in the same position where your eldamon phased out.

Weapon Specialization Level 13

You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you are an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Incarnate Eldamon Details

Incarnating an eldamon is somewhat parallel to summoning a creature, but there are some significant differences involved in the way the magic works. First, it doesn't conjure a generic nameless facsimile of a creature to be your minion as long as you Sustain the effect. Instead, it conjures one of your eldamon for 2 rounds, allowing your eldamon to charge up and use one elemental power. On the turn you incarnate them, your eldamon partially phases in adjacent to you and Steps, Strides, or takes another action corresponding to a type of movement it has (such as Swim for a water eldamon or Fly for an air eldamon). At the end of your next turn, the eldamon spends two actions to use one of their two-action powers of your choice. The incarnation then ends and your eldamon phases out.

While partially phased in briefly due to an incarnation, your eldamon isn't fully present. In this state, they can't take any other actions except the ones mentioned above, but in exchange for this restriction, they also can't be targeted or harmed by any effects except those that would be able to end or disrupt a spell effect (such as dispel magic). Hypothetical effects that can harm even a fully phased-out eldamon can still affect an incarnated eldamon, but normally there's nothing a phased-in creature can do that would accomplish that. While partially phased in, your eldamon isn't solid enough to block other creatures' movement, just like when the eldamon is phased out.

Due to the restrictions and the intense strain on the eldamon compared to a full phase, many eldamon trainers don't learn how to perform an incarnation. Those that do so use it to quickly pivot by incarnating one eldamon and then phasing in another on their next turn. Incarnation is also crucial for multiclass eldamon trainers, since they can't sustain a full phase.

Apex Training Level 15

By pushing past your limits together, your training with your eldamon has achieved fantastic results, allowing your eldamon friends to express incredible powers. Your eldamon gains four attribute boosts, one to each of their three lowest attributes, and one to the attribute that was originally their second-highest.

Your eldamon also gain master proficiency in power DCs at 15th level as well as the capacity to learn an additional power, although it does so even if you don't have this class feature.

Pushing past your own limits while training with your eldamon grants you additional benefits as well. This allows you to prepare to phase one more eldamon each day, to a maximum of six eldamon, or your key attribute +1, whichever is lower.

Eldamon Master Level 17

When it comes to eldamon trainers, you're among the very best and earned a great deal of fame. Befriending eldamon is truly your quest, and training them is your aim. Your proficiency rank for eldamon trainer class DCs increases to master.

Greater Trainer's Heart Level 17

Your bonds with your eldamon friends reach a new level. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to legendary. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success. When you roll a critical failure on a Will save, you get a failure instead. When you roll a failure on a Will save against a damaging effect, you take half damage.

Ultimate Power Level 17

Your eldamon have achieved the pinnacle of elemental power, granting them the ability to use an ultimate power. Each of your eldamon learns one of the ultimate powers from their element, in addition to their other powers. An ultimate power is extremely powerful and doesn't work like other powers. Ultimate powers significantly alter the elemental energies around them and drastically alter your phase whenever an eldamon uses them. As such, after any of your eldamon uses an ultimate power, none of your eldamon can use an ultimate power again for 1 hour, as the energies take time to coalesce and reshape.

Single Element Trainers

It’s possible that a player might be interested in playing an eldamon trainer who focuses on only a single eldamon element, to the exclusion of being able to befriend anything else. If they do, consider granting them Siphoning Element from the elemental avatar, and access to the Disruptive Siphon, Overwhelming Element, and Distracting Element feats, which all help deal with resistances and immunities. In that case, the trainer’s eldamon gain the ability to use the metapower actions, rather than the trainer themself. Given the loss in versatility from only having one element, a character with only one element of eldamon and these optional benefits will still be less effective in most campaigns than a normal eldamon trainer, but it should be enough to make an otherwise-difficult character concept more viable.

Elemental Avatar.name: 元素化身 Elemental Avatar
Elemental Avatar.text:
无论你是否理解它是如何发生的，你都已化身为一种被称为“艾达蒙（eldamon）”的神秘元素存在，从而获得了神秘的元素力量。通过敞开心智与灵魂，并与自身内在沉眠的存在调谐，你能够显现出越来越多的元素力量。然而，你远不只是艾达蒙力量的容器。通过将你自身独特的特质与你新获得的元素力量结合，你可以超越元素的限制，使用甚至连艾达蒙本身都从未能够做到的能力。你是二十种元素的活化身——一位元素化身！

关键属性

感知

在1级时，你的职业给予你一次对感知的属性提升。

生命值

8加上你的体质调整值

你在1级以及其后的每一级，都将你的最大HP提高该数值。

在战斗遭遇中……

你一次轮换一种元素力量，选择恰到好处的时机进行复苏，为了再次打开你的选择空间而放缓攻势，随着战斗持续推进。

在社交遭遇中……

由于你专注于内省与冥想以便与元素调谐，你或许不是注意力的中心，但你常常能察觉到你所遇之人身上的细节，并能悄然与盟友分享，从而帮助引导讨论的走向。

在探索时……

你将敏锐的直觉与元素力量结合，用以发现隐藏的道路，并开启在其他情况下你与盟友无法获得的机会。

在休整模式中……

你会花些时间专注于内在自我，并与体内的艾达蒙调谐，探索你之元素本质的诸多侧面。

你可能会……

  • 开始显露出受你内在元素影响的生理特征或性格特性。
  • 每天花时间与内在的艾达蒙以及你的元素力量建立联系。
  • 在凡人世界中感到些许格格不入，仿佛你有一小部分与周围之人处于不同相位。

他人很可能会……

  • 尊重你之元素的原初力量，以及你对该力量的掌控。
  • 害怕一旦他们激怒你到足以让你将元素力量倾泻到他们身上，你会做出什么。
  • 把你误认为更常见、也更熟悉的另一种元素使用者，例如元素使施法者或动能使。

初始熟练度

在1级时，你在以下数据中获得所列的熟练度等级。除非你以其他方式获得更高的熟练度等级，否则你在未列出的任何内容上均为未受训

察觉

察觉为专家

豁免

强韧为专家

反射为受训

意志为专家

技能

自然为受训

额外受训的技能数量等于3加上你的智力调整值

攻击

简易武器为受训

徒手攻击为受训

防御

轻甲为受训

无甲防御为受训

力量

以你之元素的元素力量进行攻击为受训

你之元素的元素力量DC为受训

职业DC

元素化身职业DC为受训

职业特性

作为元素化身，你获得这些能力。更高等级获得的能力，会在特性名称旁标注你获得它们的等级。

你的等级职业特性
1先祖与背景、初始熟练度、元素、元素化身专长、元素操控、元素力量、元素护盾、虹吸元素
2元素化身专长、技能专长
3通用专长、新力量、反射专精、技能提升
4元素化身专长、技能专长
5先祖专长、属性提升、调谐化身、元素攻击专精、新力量、技能提升
6元素化身专长、技能专长
7专家元素强度、通用专长、新力量、技能提升
8元素化身专长、技能专长
9先祖专长、内在感知、新力量、技能提升
10属性提升、元素化身专长、技能专长
11元素强韧、交织化身、通用专长、新力量、技能提升、武器专精
12元素化身专长、技能专长
13先祖专长、元素攻击精通、元素防御、元素二元性、新力量、技能提升、武器专精化
14元素化身专长、技能专长
15属性提升、通用专长、大师元素强度、新力量、技能提升、超越元素
16元素化身专长、技能专长
17先祖专长、新力量、一心、技能提升
18元素化身专长、技能专长
19通用专长、传奇元素强度、技能提升、终极力量
20属性提升、元素化身专长、技能专长

先祖与背景

除你在1级从职业获得的内容之外，你还拥有你所选择的先祖与背景带来的所有增益。

初始熟练度

在1级时，你获得若干熟练度，以体现你的基础训练。这些熟练度已在本职业开头注明。

元素

你会根据你作为元素化身所体现的艾达蒙而获得一种元素的力量。你很可能会获得与你的元素、你体内的艾达蒙、或两者都相关的一项或多项轻微生理特征。此外，选择一个你之元素的常见、非普通或稀有艾达蒙来体现（见 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.SUEJ4rJaCs7WNc2B]{第4章：艾达蒙条目}）。你获得该艾达蒙的元素能力。

元素化身专长

在1级以及之后的每个偶数等级，你获得一个元素化身职业专长。

元素操控

汲取你体内的元素能量，你可以操控周围的元素，作为一个两动作活动进行，该活动具有专注（特征）、魔法特性，以及你之元素相关的特性或多项特性。这使你能够产生你之元素中所列的元素操控效果。

元素力量

你体内的艾达蒙会基于你的元素赐予你不可思议的力量。力量（powers），也称为元素力量，是一种特殊的魔法能力类型，与法术不同。作为元素化身，你用力量与敌人战斗。一旦你使用了某个力量，你通常无法再次使用该力量，直到你进行复苏（见 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt.JournalEntryPage.eRfWb2pyr5IQMdrf#using-and-refreshing-powers]{使用与复苏力量}）来补充你的力量，但该限制不适用于复苏力量。力量的攻击与DC使用独立的熟练度，它们不同于法术、职业DC、武器或徒手熟练度。不过，若你的力量DC更高，你可以用力量DC来替代基于你的职业DC的能力所需的职业DC。作为元素化身，你将强力击打缠手布提供的物品加值加入你以元素力量进行的攻击检定，但强击符文与性质符文不起作用。你也可以选择投入一把魔法武器，从而改为将该武器强效符文提供的物品加值加入你的力量攻击检定。你的力量DC与力量攻击调整值基于你的关键属性：感知。

作为新晋元素化身，你学会1个1级反应力量、1个1级复苏力量，以及另外两个1级力量。你所学会的所有元素力量（无论来自此特性或其他来源）都必须是你之元素的力量，或通用力量。在你每日准备期间，每天你可以选择准备四个力量；其中一个必须是反应力量，一个必须是复苏力量，另外两个可以是任意类型的力量（主动、反应或复苏），不过大多数元素化身会选择主动力量，以便在无需复苏的情况下坚持更久。刚开始时你只知道四个力量，所以你每天都会选择相同的力量，但随着等级提升你会学到更多力量。

在3级、5级、7级、9级、11级、13级、15级与17级时，你会额外学会1个元素力量，且其等级必须不高于你的等级。在19级时，你改为学会一个终极力量（详见终极力量职业特性）。

元素护盾

你可以唤起你的元素来保护自己免受伤害。你获得“元素护盾”动作。当你使用元素护盾时，它获得你之元素相关的特性或多项特性。当你使用元素护盾时，若你选择用一只空闲手持握该元素护盾，你可以将元素护盾提供的环境加值提高至+2。

虹吸元素

由于你的凡躯与体内艾达蒙之间的相互作用，你以多面向的方式与自身元素相联系，使你能够以不同于常规的方式使用元素力量：虹吸或消除元素能量，而非将其显现。你获得“虹吸元素”动作。

技能专长 2级

在2级以及之后每隔2级，你获得一个技能专长。你必须在对应技能上为受训或更高，才能选择该技能专长。

通用专长 3级

在3级以及之后每隔4级，你获得一个通用专长。

反射专精 3级

你的反射如闪电般迅捷。你的反射豁免熟练度等级提升至专家。

技能提升 3级

在3级以及之后每隔2级，你获得一次技能提升。你可以用这次提升来使你在一个你未受训的技能上变为受训，或使你在一个已受训的技能上变为专家。

在7级时，你可以使用技能提升使你在一个你已为专家的技能上变为大师；在15级时，你可以使用它们使你在一个你已为大师的技能上变为传奇。

属性提升 5级

在5级以及之后每隔5级，你获得四次对不同属性的自由提升。若某项属性已为+4或更高，则需要两次提升才能使其提高；你会先获得一次部分提升，并必须在更高等级再次提升该属性，才能使其提高1点。

先祖专长 5级

除你起始获得的先祖专长外，你在5级以及之后每隔4级获得一个先祖专长。

调谐化身 5级

你已与体内的艾达蒙深度调谐，使你能够一次处理更多元素力量。你每天可以准备第5个元素力量，其可以是主动、反应或复苏。你额外学会1个元素力量；此力量与在5级时从你的元素力量职业特性中学会的力量叠加。

元素攻击专精 5级

你学会谨慎地瞄准你的元素力量，以针尖般的精确度打击敌人。你以你之元素的元素力量进行攻击检定的熟练度等级提升至专家。

专家元素强度 7级

当你与灵魂中艾达蒙的力量调谐时，你的元素力量增强。你之元素的元素力量DC熟练度等级提升至专家。

内在感知 9级

由于你花费了大量时间向内审视，你也学会了如何留意周遭事物。你的察觉熟练度等级提升至大师。

元素强韧 11级

你的身体与体内艾达蒙相协调，使你愈发坚韧。你的强韧豁免熟练度等级提升至大师。当你在一次强韧豁免中掷出成功时，改为获得大成功。

交织化身 11级

你已与体内的艾达蒙交织得如此紧密，以至于你的共生之力超越了艾达蒙自身所能产生的力量。你每天可以准备第6个元素力量，其可以是主动、反应或复苏。你额外学会1个元素力量；此力量与在11级时从你的元素力量职业特性中学会的力量叠加。

武器专精 11级

你已投身于学习你的武器之精微。你对简易武器与徒手攻击的熟练度等级提升至专家。

元素攻击精通 13级

你与自身元素深度调谐，使你能够以神秘且近乎本能的精准度瞄准你的元素力量。你以你之元素的元素力量进行攻击检定的熟练度等级提升至大师。

元素防御 13级

你运用你之元素的力量，并结合自身的防御性动作，来增强你的防护。你对轻甲与无甲防御的熟练度等级提升至专家。

元素二元性 13级

你将多条元素力量之路刻入你的生命力、心智、身体与灵魂，使你能够在两套力量之间做出选择。每当你准备你的元素力量时，你改为准备两套力量，而非一套，但任一时刻只有其中一套可供你使用。在一次遭遇中你第一个回合开始时，以及每当你复苏时，选择两套力量中的哪一套对你可用。你只能使用你所选择那一套中的力量。

武器专精化 13级

你已学会如何用你最熟悉的武器造成更严重的创伤。你以你为专家的武器与徒手攻击造成额外2点伤害。若你为大师则该伤害提高至3点；若你为传奇则提高至4点。

大师元素强度 15级

你与体内艾达蒙的羁绊变得极其深厚，你的力量几乎膨胀至爆裂。你之元素的元素力量DC熟练度等级提升至大师。

超越元素 15级

你那与艾达蒙元素能量交织的独特潜能，使你得以超越自身元素的常规边界，深入那些通常只会对你所选择的另一种元素开放的力量。选择一个不同于你自身的元素；你从该元素的列表中获得1个1级力量、1个7级或更低的力量，以及1个11级或更低的力量。当你获得新力量时，你可以从该元素的列表中选择一个力量来替代从你自身列表中选择，只要该力量的等级至少比你的等级低4级（例如：15级时可选11级，17级时可选13级，以此类推）。你所选择的这些力量会成为你之元素的力量，但除此之外，该力量具有其正常效果，即便那意味着它会产生对于你之元素而言极不寻常的伤害类型或状态（例如冰元素化身造成火焰伤害）。请构思一个解释，说明你如何用你之元素显现这些力量。例如，若你的元素是寒冷，你可能选择电击，并将你的超越描述为低温产生超导现象。

你也可以不选择你自身以外的元素，而选择超越进入你自身元素。在这种情况下，你从你之元素或通用力量中获得任意三个力量，其等级至多为15级。

一心 17级

你体内的艾达蒙增强了你的心智。你的意志豁免熟练度等级提升至大师。当你在一次意志豁免中掷出成功时，改为获得大成功。

传奇元素强度 19级

你与你所体现的艾达蒙真正合成为一，使你获得了溢出般的力量，超越艾达蒙自身潜能。你之元素的元素力量DC熟练度等级提升至传奇。

终极力量 19级

你的超越已抵达元素力量的巅峰，使你能够使用一种终极力量。你从你之元素中学会一个终极力量。除你其他已准备的元素力量外，你每天都会自动准备该终极力量。终极力量极其强大，并不按其他力量的方式运作。终极力量会显著改变其周围的元素能量，并且每次使用都会从你身上抽取大量能量。因此，在使用一个终极力量后，你在1小时内无法再次使用终极力量，因为这些能量需要时间来凝聚并重塑。

Whether you understand how it happened or not, you've come to embody a mystical elemental being known as an eldamon, granting you mysterious elemental powers. By opening up your mind and soul and attuning to the dormant being within yourself, you are able to manifest more and more of its elemental power. You're far more than just a receptacle for the eldamon's powers, however. By combining your own unique properties with your new elemental powers, you can transcend the element's limits and use abilities that even the eldamon itself never could. You are a living embodiment of the twenty elements, an elemental avatar!

Key Attribute

Wisdom

At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to Wisdom.

Hit Points

8 plus your Constitution modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

During Combat Encounters...

You cycle through your elemental powers one at a time, choosing exactly the right time to refresh, slowing down your offense in order to open up your options again as the battle continues.

During Social Encounters...

While you might not be the center of attention due to your focus on introspection and meditation in order to attune to your element, you often notice things about the people you meet that you can surreptitiously share with your allies to help shape the course of a discussion.

While Exploring...

You use a combination of your sharp instincts and your elemental powers to locate hidden paths and open up opportunities that wouldn't otherwise be available to you and your allies.

In Downtime...

You take some time to focus on your inner self and attune to the eldamon within, exploring the many facets of the nature of your element.

You Might...

  • Begin to exhibit physical features or personality traits influenced by your inner element.
  • Take time each day to get in touch with your inner eldamon and your elemental power.
  • Feel slightly out of place in the mortal world, almost as if a tiny part of you was out of phase with those around you.

Others Probably...

  • Respect the primal power of your element and your mastery of that power.
  • Fear what you might do if they angered you enough to unleash your elemental powers against them.
  • Mistake you for a different and more familiar elemental user, such as an elementalist spellcaster or a kineticist.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain the listed proficiency ranks in the following statistics. You are untrained in anything not listed unless you gain a better proficiency rank in some other way

Perception

Expert in Perception

Saving Throws

Expert in Fortitude

Trained in Reflex

Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in Nature

Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 3 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Trained in simple weapons

Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in light armor

Trained in unarmored defense

Powers

Trained in attacks with elemental powers of your element

Trained in elemental power DCs of your element

Class DC

Trained in elemental avatar class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as an elemental avatar. Abilities gained at higher levels list the level at which you gain them next to the features' names.

Your LevelClass Features
1Ancestry and background, initial proficiencies, element, elemental avatar feat, elemental manipulation, elemental powers, elemental shield, siphoning element
2Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
3General feat, new power, reflex expertise, skill increase
4Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
5Ancestry feat, attribute boosts, attuned avatar, elemental attack expertise, new power, skill increase
6Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
7Expert elemental potency, general feat, new power, skill increase
8Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
9Ancestry feat, inner senses, new power, skill increase
10Attribute boosts, elemental avatar feat, skill feat
11Elemental fortitude, entwined avatar, general feat, new power, skill increase, weapon expertise
12Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
13Ancestry feat, elemental attack mastery, elemental defense, elemental duality, new power, skill increase, weapon specialization
14Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
15Attribute boosts, general feat, master elemental potency, new power, skill increase, transcend element
16Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
17Ancestry feat, new power, one mind, skill increase
18Elemental avatar feat, skill feat
19General feat, legendary elemental potency, skill increase, ultimate power
20Attribute boosts, elemental avatar feat, skill feat

Ancestry and Background

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain a number of proficiencies that represent your basic training. These proficiencies are noted at the start of this class.

Element

You gain the power of an element depending on the eldamon you embody as an elemental avatar. You likely gain one or more mild physical features related to your element, the eldamon within you, or both. Additionally, choose a common, uncommon, or rare eldamon of your element to embody (see @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.SUEJ4rJaCs7WNc2B]{Chapter 4: Eldamon Entries}). You gain the elemental ability of that eldamon.

Elemental Avatar Feats

At 1st level and every even-numbered level, you gain an elemental avatar class feat.

Elemental Manipulation

Drawing upon the elemental energies within you, you can manipulate the elements around you, as a two-action activity, which has the concentrate trait, the magical trait, and your element's associated trait or traits. This allows you to produce the elemental manipulation effect listed in your element.

Elemental Powers

The eldamon within you grants you incredible powers based on your element. Powers, also known as elemental powers, are a special type of magical ability, different from spells. As an elemental avatar, you use powers to battle your foes. Once you use a power, you normally can't use that power again until you Refresh (see @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt.JournalEntryPage.eRfWb2pyr5IQMdrf#using-and-refreshing-powers]{Using and Refreshing Powers}) to replenish your powers, though that limit doesn't apply to refresh powers. Powers have separate proficiencies for attacks and DCs, which aren't the same as spells, class DCs, or weapon or unarmed proficiencies. However, you can use your power DC in place of your class DC for abilities based on your class DC, if it's higher. As an elemental avatar, you add the item bonus to attack rolls from handwraps of mighty blows to your attack rolls with elemental powers, though striking runes and property runes have no effect. You can also choose to Invest a magic weapon in order to add the item bonus to attack rolls from the weapon's potency rune to your power attack rolls instead. Your power DC and power attack modifier are based on your key attribute, Wisdom.

As a new elemental avatar, you learn one 1st level reactive power, one 1st level refresh power, and two other 1st level powers. All elemental powers you learn, from this feature or elsewhere, must be powers from your element, or universal powers. Each day during your daily preparations, you can choose four powers to prepare; one must be a reactive power, one must be a refresh power, and the other two can be any type of power (active, reactive, or refresh), though most elemental avatars choose active powers so that they can go longer without refreshing. When you're just starting out, you only know four powers, so you'll pick those same powers each day, but you learn more powers as you increase in level.

At 3rd level, 5th level, 7th level, 9th level, 11th level, 13th level, 15th level, and 17th level, you learn one additional elemental power, which must be of your level or lower. At 19th level, you instead learn an ultimate power (see the ultimate power class feature for more details).

Elemental Shield

You can call forth your element to protect you from harm. You gain the Elemental Shield action. When you use Elemental Shield, it gains your element's associated trait or traits. When you use Elemental Shield, you can increase the circumstance bonus from Elemental Shield to +2 if you choose to hold the elemental shield in a free hand.

Siphoning Element

Because of the interaction between your mortal body and the eldamon within, you relate to your element in a multifaceted way, allowing you to use elemental powers in a way different than ordinary, to siphon or nullify elemental energy rather than manifest it. You gain the Siphoning Element action.

Skill Feats Level 2

At 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill feat. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

General Feats Level 3

At 3rd level and every 4 levels thereafter, you gain a general feat.

Reflex Expertise Level 3

Your reflexes are lightning fast. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Skill Increases Level 3

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use this increase to either become trained in one skill you're untrained in, or become an expert in one skill in which you're already trained.

At 7th level, you can use skill increases to become a master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to become legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Attribute Boosts Level 5

At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attributes. If an attribute is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost, and must boost again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Ancestry Feats Level 5

In addition to the ancestry feat you started with, you gain an ancestry feat at 5th level and every 4 levels thereafter.

Attuned Avatar Level 5

You've attuned deeply with the eldamon within you, granting you the ability to process more elemental power at once. You can prepare a fifth elemental power each day, which can be active, reactive, or refresh. You learn an additional elemental power, which is cumulative with the power you learn at 5th level from your elemental power class feature.

Elemental Attack Expertise Level 5

You learn to aim your element powers carefully, striking your foes with pinpoint accuracy. Your proficiency rank for attack rolls with elemental powers of your element increases to expert.

Expert Elemental Potency Level 7

As you attune to the power of the eldamon within your soul, your elemental power increases. Your proficiency rank for elemental power DCs of your element increases to expert.

Inner Senses Level 9

By spending so much time looking within yourself, you've learned how to notice things around you as well. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master.

Elemental Fortitude Level 11

Your body is in tune with the eldamon within, causing you to grow hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Fortitude save, you get a critical success instead.

Entwined Avatar Level 11

You've become so entwined with the eldamon within that your symbiotic power exceeds what the eldamon can produce on its own. You can prepare a sixth elemental power each day, which can be active, reactive, or refresh. You learn an additional elemental power, which is cumulative with the power you learn at 11th level from your elemental power class feature.

Weapon Expertise Level 11

You've dedicated yourself to learning the intricacies of your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increase to expert.

Elemental Attack Mastery Level 13

You attune yourself deeply to your element, allowing you to aim your elemental powers with mystical and almost instinctual precision. Your proficiency rank for attack rolls with elemental powers of your element increases to master.

Elemental Defense Level 13

You use the power of your element, combined with your own defensive movements, to enhance your protection. Your proficiency ranks for light armor and unarmored defense increase to expert.

Elemental Duality Level 13

You etch multiple paths of elemental power into your life force, mind, body, and soul, allowing you to choose between two sets of powers. Whenever you prepare your elemental powers, prepare two sets of powers instead of one, though only one is available to you at a time. At the beginning of your first turn in an encounter, and whenever you refresh, choose which of the two sets of powers are available to you. You can only use powers from the set you chose.

Weapon Specialization Level 13

You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you are an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Master Elemental Potency Level 15

Your bond with the eldamon within you becomes so extensive that your power swells nearly to bursting. Your proficiency rank for elemental power DCs of your element increases to master.

Transcend Element Level 15

Your unique capacities intertwined with your eldamon's elemental energies have allowed you to transcend the normal boundaries of your element, delving into powers that would ordinarily only be available to one other element of your choice. Choose an element other than your own; you gain one 1st level power from that element's list, one power of 7th level or lower from that element's list, and one power of 11th level or lower from that element's list. When you gain new powers, you can choose a power from that element's list instead of your own, as long as the power is at least 4 levels lower than your level (11th level at 15th, 13th level at 17th, and so on). The powers you choose become powers of your element, though otherwise the power has its normal effects, even if that means it produces a damage type or condition that would be highly unusual for your element (such as fire damage for an ice elemental avatar). Think of an explanation as to how you can manifest these powers using your element. For instance, if your element is cold, you might choose electricity and describe your transcendence as cold temperatures producing superconductivity.

Instead of choosing an element other than your own, you can choose to transcend into your own element. In that case, you gain any three powers from your element, or universal powers, up to level 15.

One Mind Level 17

The eldamon within bolsters your mind. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success at a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Legendary Elemental Potency Level 19

Your true synthesis with the eldamon you embody brings you overflowing power beyond the eldamon's own potential. Your proficiency rank for elemental power DCs of your element increases to legendary.

Ultimate Power Level 19

Your transcendence has achieved the pinnacle of elemental power, granting you the ability to use an ultimate power. You learn one of the ultimate powers from your element. You automatically prepare that ultimate power each day, in addition to your other prepared elemental powers. An ultimate power is extremely powerful and doesn't work like other powers. Ultimate powers significantly alter the elemental energies around them and take significant energy from you each time you use them. As such, after using an ultimate power, you can't use an ultimate power again for 1 hour, as the energies take time to coalesce and reshape.

Elemental Avatar Key Terms.name: 元素化身 关键术语 Elemental Avatar Key Terms
Elemental Avatar Key Terms.text:
你会在许多元素化身职业特性中看到以下术语。

元力量：带有元力量特征的动作（通常来自元力量专长）会调整你的元素力量的属性。你必须在引导你想要改变的力量之前，直接使用一个元力量动作。若你在其后未直接引导该力量而是使用了任何其他动作（包括自由动作（）与反应动作（）），你将浪费该元力量动作带来的收益。与依赖你下一个动作的效果的常规规则相同，若你的回合在引导该力量前结束，你同样会浪费该元力量动作带来的收益。由元力量动作加入的任何额外效果都属于该力量的效果，而不属于元力量动作本身。

力量：力量（也称为元素力量）是一种特殊的魔法能力类型，不同于法术。Eldamon与元素化身使用力量与他们的敌人战斗。一旦一个el damon或元素化身使用了某个力量，他们通常在使用一个刷新力量之前不能再次使用该力量，但该限制不适用于刷新力量本身。力量的攻击与DC使用独立的熟练度，它们不同于法术、职业DC、武器或徒手熟练度。若某个能力通常使用“取你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者”，你总可以在你的力量DC高于你的职业DC与法术DC任一者时，以你的力量DC替代之。你的力量DC与力量攻击调整值基于你的关键属性。

刷新：带有刷新特征的力量会重新校准当地的元素能量，使一个el damon或元素化身能够再次使用他们的力量。所有刷新力量都包含一次刷新行动的使用。Eldamon与元素化身可以使用刷新力量任意次数，而无需再次刷新；这通常只在某个刷新力量被打断时才重要。

涌动：当一个el damon或元素化身无法使用某个力量时，他们有时会使用一种较弱的效果，称为元素涌动。关于元素涌动的更多细节见@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt.JournalEntryPage.eRfWb2pyr5IQMdrf#elemental-surge]{此处}。

终极：带有终极特征的力量极其强大，且其运作方式不同于其他力量。终极力量会显著改变其周围的元素能量，并会从使用它的元素化身身上，或从使用它的el damon之el damon训练师身上，抽取大量能量。因此，在使用一个终极力量后，该元素化身，或该元素训练师的el damon，在1小时内不能再次使用终极力量，因为这些能量需要时间凝聚并重塑。

You'll see the following terms in many elemental avatar class features.

Metapower: Actions with the metapower trait, usually from metapower feats, tweak the properties of your elemental powers. You must use a metapower action directly before channeling the power you want to alter. If you use any action (including free actions and reactions) other than channeling the power directly after, you waste the benefits of the metapower action. As normal for effects dependent on your next action, if your turn ends before channeling the power, you waste the benefits of the metapower action as well. Any additional effects added by a metapower action are part of the power's effect, not of the metapower action itself.

Power: Powers, also known as elemental powers, are a special type of magical ability, different from spells. Eldamon and elemental avatars use powers to battle their foes. Once an eldamon or elemental avatar uses a power, they normally can't use that power again until they use a refresh power, though that limit doesn't apply to refresh powers themselves. Powers have separate proficiencies for attacks and DCs, which aren't the same as spells, class DCs, or weapon or unarmed proficiencies. If an ability normally uses the "higher of your class DC or spell DC," you can always substitute your power DC if it's higher than either your class DC or spell DC. Your power DC and power attack modifier are based on your key attribute.

Refresh: A power with the refresh trait realigns the local elemental energies, allowing an eldamon or elemental avatar to use their powers again. All refresh powers include a use of the Refresh activity. Eldamon and elemental avatars can use refresh powers any number of times without needing to Refresh again; this normally only matters if a refresh power is disrupted.

Surge: When an eldamon or elemental avatar can't use a power, they sometimes use a weaker effect called an elemental surge. There are more details on elemental surges @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.QsiJY2HP4WuA7Ntt.JournalEntryPage.eRfWb2pyr5IQMdrf#elemental-surge]{here}.

Ultimate: A power with the ultimate trait is extremely powerful and doesn't work like other powers. Ultimate powers significantly alter the elemental energies around them and take significant energy from the elemental avatar who uses them, or the eldamon trainer of the eldamon who uses them. As such, after using an ultimate power, that elemental avatar, or that elemental trainer's eldamon, can't use an ultimate power again for 1 hour, as the energies take time to coalesce and reshape.

Eldamon Trainer Multiclass Archetype.name: 艾达兽训练师多职业变体 Eldamon Trainer Multiclass Archetype
Eldamon Trainer Multiclass Archetype.text:
你可以让你的艾达兽相位现身，但持续不了多久，也无法像那些愿意与自己的艾达兽交换自身相位的人那样拥有强大的力量。

专长 2

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.Sbuz39ZIywYbBWOC]{艾达兽训练师奉献}

先决条件 魅力 +2，至少一位艾达兽朋友

你可以暂时让你的艾达兽朋友相位现身，使其能够施展元素力量，并影响与物质世界同相位的其他生物；但你分散了注意力，因此你每天能准备相位现身的艾达兽朋友数量比专注的训练师少 1。每天，选择一定数量的你的艾达兽朋友：该数量为 2 或你的魅力调整值，两者取较低者。当天之中，你可以让他们相位现身为你作战。你获得具现艾达兽专长，这是你能让艾达兽相位现身的唯一方式；你永远无法获得相位艾达兽或其他任何让你自己相位脱离、或让你的艾达兽相位现身的专长或特性。由于你以这种方式让艾达兽相位现身时，你们的连结比专职的艾达兽训练师更不稳定，他们的力量攻击掷骰与力量 DC 受到 –2 减值；且他们可使用的力量及其效果也受到限制。他们只能使用等级不超过你等级一半的力量，并且在决定其力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级增长的收益（如临时生命值与射程）时，他们的有效等级等同于你等级的一半（若他们自身等级更低则使用其自身等级，但艾达兽通常会与其朋友一同升级）。例如，在 6 级时，你的艾达兽的最大有效等级为 3，因此可使用至多 3 级的力量；其力量的反制等级为 2；若其力量造成 1d6 伤害外加每拥有 1 级再加 1d6 伤害，则他们将造成 4d6 伤害。与常规相同，当艾达兽以这种方式相位退场时，他们会刷新。

与其他拥有艾达兽朋友的角色一样，由于你没有获得艾达兽训练师的进阶训练、艾达兽进化或巅峰训练职业特性，你的艾达兽的属性调整值在 17 级之前都保持其起始数值，并在 17 级时获得一次最终属性提升至感知，使感知提升至 +5。

特殊 在你从艾达兽训练师变体中获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

专长 4

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.7NFnAI5XY0dtcch6]{基础友谊}

先决条件 艾达兽训练师奉献

你获得一个你选择的 1 级或 2 级艾达兽训练师专长。

专长 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.HqFrA2GmvlmcnBjB]{进阶友谊}

先决条件 基础友谊

你获得一个艾达兽训练师专长。为满足其先决条件之目的，你的艾达兽训练师等级等同于你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你选择它时，你获得另一个艾达兽训练师专长。

专长 12

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.hR59T9K2s2zaAAur]{进阶训练}

先决条件 艾达兽训练师奉献

你已将你的艾达兽训练至更高境界。你获得进阶训练职业特性。这意味着你的艾达兽在其未受训技能上的熟练加值变为等同于其等级，且你的艾达兽获得四次属性提升，分别提升其四个最低的属性调整值各一次。这通常会将其四个最低调整值从 +2、+1、+0 与 –1 提升至 +3、+2、+1 与 +0。通过并肩训练，你提升的不仅是你的艾达兽，也包括你自身的能力。这使你每天可以准备让三只艾达兽相位现身，而非两只，只要你的魅力调整值至少为 +3。

此外，在决定其力量的伤害、反制等级与其他随等级增长的收益（如临时生命值与射程），以及决定他们能使用哪些力量时，你的有效等级提高为你的等级 – 5。

专长 18

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.iafOvqFzrm4EggCf]{艾达兽进化}

先决条件 进阶训练

你已学会如何帮助你的艾达兽进化。你获得艾达兽进化职业特性。每只艾达兽都有进化条件；这意味着当你满足这些条件时，该艾达兽获得一种新的已进化战斗形态。此已进化形态获得更高的熟练度，并对该艾达兽的三个最高属性调整值各获得一次属性提升，同时获得一项新的特殊能力。

通过与你的艾达兽努力达成其进化门槛，你也更加理解自身的极限。这使你每天可以准备让四只艾达兽相位现身，而非三只，只要你的魅力调整值至少为 +4。

此外，在决定其力量的伤害、反制等级与其他随等级增长的收益（如临时生命值与射程），以及决定他们能使用哪些力量时，你的有效等级提高为你的等级 – 3。

You can phase in your eldamon, though not for long and not with as much power as those willing to exchange their own phase with their eldamon.

Feat 2

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.Sbuz39ZIywYbBWOC]{Eldamon Trainer Dedication}

Prerequisites Charisma +2, at least one eldamon friend

You can temporarily phase in your eldamon friends, allowing them to perform an elemental power and affect other creatures in phase with the physical world, though you're diverting your focus, so you can prepare to phase one fewer eldamon friends than a focused trainer. Each day, choose a number of your eldamon friends that is either 2 or your Charisma modifier, whichever is lower. Throughout the day, you can phase them in to fight for you. You gain the Incarnate Eldamon feat, which is the only way you can phase in an eldamon; you can never gain Phase Eldamon or other feats or features that phase yourself out or your eldamon in. Because your connection is less stable than a dedicated eldamon trainer when you phase in an eldamon in this way, they take a –2 penalty to their power attack rolls and power DCs, and they're limited in which powers they can use, and those powers' effects. They can only use powers whose level are at most half your level, and their effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), is equal to half your level (or their level if it is lower, but eldamon usually level up alongside their friends). For instance, at 6th level, your eldamon's maximum effective level would be 3, so could use up to a 3rd level power, their powers would have a counteract level of 2, and if their power deals 1d6 damage plus 1d6 damage for each level they have, they would deal 4d6 damage. As normal, when an eldamon phases out in this way, they Refresh.

Like other characters with eldamon friends, since you don't gain the eldamon trainer's advanced training, eldamon evolution, or apex training class features, your eldamon's attribute modifiers remain at their starting values until 17th level and then gain a final attribute boost to Wisdom, raising Wisdom to +5.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the eldamon trainer archetype.

Feat 4

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.7NFnAI5XY0dtcch6]{Basic Friendship}

Prerequisites Eldamon Trainer Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level eldamon trainer feat of your choice.

Feat 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.HqFrA2GmvlmcnBjB]{Advanced Friendship}

Prerequisites Basic Friendship

You gain one eldamon trainer feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your eldamon trainer level is equal to half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another eldamon trainer feat.

Feat 12

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.hR59T9K2s2zaAAur]{Advanced Training}

Prerequisites Eldamon Trainer Dedication

You've trained your eldamon to greater heights. You gain the advanced training class feature. This means that your eldamons' proficiency bonus to their untrained skills becomes equal to their level, and your eldamon gain four attribute boosts, one to each of their four lowest attribute modifiers. This typically increases their four lowest modifiers from +2, +1, +0, and –1 to +3, +2, +1, and +0. By training side by side, you improve your own capabilities, not just your eldamons'. This allows you to prepare to phase three eldamon each day, instead of two, as long as your Charisma modifier is at least +3.

Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for determining what powers they can use, increases to your level – 5.

Feat 18

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.iafOvqFzrm4EggCf]{Eldamon Evolution}

Prerequisites Advanced Training

You've learned how to help your eldamon evolve. You gain the eldamon evolution class feature. Each eldamon has evolution conditions, and this means that if you meet them, the eldamon gains a new evolved battle form. This evolved form gains increased proficiencies and an attribute boost to the eldamon's three highest attribute modifiers, as well as a new special ability.

By working hard with your eldamon to reach their evolution thresholds, you come to understand your own limits as well. This allows you to prepare to phase four eldamon each day, instead of three, as long as your Charisma modifier is at least +4.

Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for determining what powers they can use, increases to your level – 3.

Elemental Avatar Multiclass Archetype.name: 元素化身多职业变体 Elemental Avatar Multiclass Archetype
Elemental Avatar Multiclass Archetype.text:
你与体内的艾达兽之间存在一种简单的联系，使你能够偶尔显现出元素力量。

专长 2

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.i739bMI6mMipbWHA]{元素化身奉献}

先决条件 感知 +2

选择一种元素化身的元素。你获得该元素的元素操控特性，并学会该元素的一个1级主动力量。每天，你可以准备你元素的一个主动力量，并且你可以使用该力量。你在力量攻击掷骰与力量DC方面成为受训。你无法以正常方式或通过刷新力量进行刷新行动，不过与你其他元素化身一样，你仍会在遭遇或紧张情境结束后自动刷新你的力量。你用于决定其力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级成长的增益（如临时生命值与射程），以及用于选择要获得的新力量（通常来自元素化身专长或变体专长）的有效等级，等同于你等级的一半。例如，在6级时，你的有效等级将为3，因此你最多可学会3级力量，你的力量将具有2级反制等级，并且若其造成1d6伤害外加你每有1级再加1d6伤害，则它将造成4d6伤害。在每个偶数等级时，你可以将你所知的一个主动力量替换为一个不高于你有效等级的不同主动力量。你不会获得你所选元素的任何其他能力或增益。

特殊 在你从元素化身变体获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

专长 4

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.bdmcaLtw3mYYx4jc]{基础具现}

先决条件 元素化身奉献

你获得一个由你选择的1级或2级元素化身专长。

专长 4

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.Sjj9ppNYaA0JsLPQ]{元素护盾}

先决条件 元素化身奉献

你已经学会如何运用你的元素来保护自己。你获得元素护盾特性，其效果取决于你的元素。

专长 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.2QUZdjkmXChpKVzU]{进阶具现}

先决条件 基础具现

你获得一个元素化身专长。为满足其先决条件之目的，你的元素化身等级等同于你角色等级的一半。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你选择它时，你获得另一个元素化身专长。

专长 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.tLqWHSq54vtQEm15]{化身的反应动作}

先决条件 元素化身奉献

你学会如何使用你元素的反应。你获得你元素的1级反应力量，并且每天你可以准备一个反应力量。

专长 12

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.ZJY6H0vMoPmLCHjN]{专家化身}

先决条件 元素化身奉献

你已将具现的元素力量精炼至专家水平。你在力量攻击掷骰与力量DC方面成为专家。此外，你用于决定其力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级成长的增益（如临时生命值与射程），以及用于从元素化身专长中选择要获得的新力量的有效等级，提高到你的等级 – 5。除了通常可将你所知的一个主动力量替换为一个不高于7级的新主动力量之外，你还从你的元素中学会一个不高于5级的额外元素力量；你仍然每天只能准备一个主动力量，但你可以像其他元素化身一样在你所知的力量之间进行选择。在14级时，你可以同时准备两套力量，并在遭遇开始时选择使用其中一套。每天，准备两套可替换的元素力量（通常意味着你准备两种可替换的主动力量，不过若你拥有化身的反应动作专长，你也可能准备可替换的反应力量）。你还从你的元素中学会一个不高于9级的额外主动力量，并且若你拥有（或之后获得）化身的反应动作专长，你再学会一个不高于你最大有效等级的额外反应力量。

专长 18

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.vvqrwpPvKqaH0FYN]{大师化身}

先决条件 专家化身

你已在某种程度上掌握了具现的元素力量，接近完整的化身。你在力量攻击掷骰与力量DC方面成为大师。此外，你用于决定其力量的伤害、反制等级以及其他随等级成长的增益（如临时生命值与射程），以及用于从元素化身专长中选择要获得的新力量的有效等级，提高到你的等级 – 3。除了通常可将你所知的一个主动力量替换为一个不高于15级的新主动力量之外，你还从你的元素中学会一个不高于13级的元素力量。

You have a simple connection to an eldamon within you, allowing you to occasionally manifest elemental powers.

Feat 2

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.i739bMI6mMipbWHA]{Elemental Avatar Dedication}

Prerequisites Wisdom +2

Choose an elemental avatar element. You gain the elemental manipulation feature for that element, and you learn one of the element's 1st-level active powers. Each day, you can prepare one active power of your element, and you can use that power. You're trained in power attack rolls and power DCs. You can't take the Refresh activity normally or via a refresh power, though you still refresh your powers automatically after an encounter or stressful situation is over, like other elemental avatars. Your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for choosing new powers to gain (typically from Elemental Avatar feats or archetype feats), is equal to half your level. For instance, at 6th level, your effective level would be 3, so you could learn up to a 3rd level power, your powers would have a counteract level of 2, and if they deal 1d6 damage plus 1d6 damage for each level you have, they would deal 4d6 damage. At every even level, you can replace one of the active powers you know with a different active power up to your effective level. You don't gain any of the other abilities or benefits of the element you chose.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the elemental avatar archetype.

Feat 4

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.bdmcaLtw3mYYx4jc]{Basic Embodiment}

Prerequisites Elemental Avatar Dedication

You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level elemental avatar feat of your choice.

Feat 4

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.Sjj9ppNYaA0JsLPQ]{Elemental Shield}

Prerequisites Elemental Avatar Dedication

You've learned how to use your element to defend yourself. You gain the elemental shield feature with the effects based on your element.

Feat 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.2QUZdjkmXChpKVzU]{Advanced Embodiment}

Prerequisites Basic Embodiment

You gain one elemental avatar feat. For the purpose of meeting its prerequisites, your elemental avatar level is equal to half your character level.

Special You can select this feat more than once. Each time you select it, you gain another elemental avatar feat.

Feat 6

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.tLqWHSq54vtQEm15]{Avatar's Reaction}

Prerequisites Elemental Avatar Dedication

You learn how to use your element's reactions. You gain the 1st level reactive power of your element, and you can prepare one reactive power each day.

Feat 12

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.ZJY6H0vMoPmLCHjN]{Expert Avatar}

Prerequisites Elemental Avatar Dedication

You've refined your embodied elemental powers to an expert level. You become an expert in power attack rolls and power DCs. Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range) as well as for choosing new powers to gain from Elemental Avatar feats increases to your level – 5. In addition to the normal ability to swap one of the active powers you know for a new active power up to 7th level, you learn an additional elemental power from your element of up to 5th level; you can still only prepare one active power each day, but you can choose between the powers you know, like other elemental avatars. At 14th level, you can prepare two sets of powers at once and choose which one to use at the beginning of an encounter. Each day, prepare two alternative sets of elemental powers (typically that means you prepare two alternative active powers, though you might also prepare alternative reactive powers if you have the Avatar's Reaction feat). You also learn one additional active power from your element of up to 9th level, and one additional reactive power of up to your maximum effective level if you have (or later gain) the Avatar's Reaction feat.

Feat 18

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-eldamon-pf2e.feats.Item.vvqrwpPvKqaH0FYN]{Master Avatar}

Prerequisites Expert Avatar

You've mastered your embodied elemental powers to an extent, approaching a full avatar. You become a master in power attack rolls and power DCs. Additionally, your effective level for the purpose of determining their powers' damage, counteract level, and other scaling benefits (like temporary Hit Points and range), as well as for choosing new powers to gain from Elemental Avatar feats, increases to your level – 3. In addition to the normal ability to swap one of the active powers you know for a new active power up to 15th level, you learn an elemental power from your element of up to 13th level.
